HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Something powerful happened →
body:
---
Derek, In the days after Election Day, we sent several messages recognizing the incredible campaign Kamala Harris ran this year, and explaining why the Democratic Party still needs your support as we look to the fights ahead. We’ll be honest: We did not know how Democrats would respond -- especially after such a draining election cycle. But after we sent those initial messages, something powerful happened: Diane from Ohio chipped in $5. Andrea from North Carolina contributed $10. José from Florida pitched in another $10. And suddenly... it was clear that Democrats all over the country are committed to building the strongest possible Party for the fight ahead. Right now, we’ve got a LOT of work cut out for us. In a matter of weeks, Trump and a Republican Congress will be sworn in. They will undoubtedly get right to work issuing executive orders and pushing policies aimed at weakening our democracy, attacking our fundamental rights, and undoing the progress we fought so hard for. We’re already seeing how disastrous this could be. That’s why we’ll need a strong Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and hold Trump and his allies accountable. [**So we’re asking you to join Democrats like Diane, Andrea, and José by making your first contribution to the Democratic National Committee today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241222_2451_fr&refcode2=2451_22930333_V9JWdJ&akid=2451%2E22930333%2EV9JWdJ) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241222_2451_fr&refcode2=2451_22930333_V9JWdJ&akid=2451%2E22930333%2EV9JWdJ)**

| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_20241222_2451_fr&refcode2=2451_22930333_V9JWdJ&akid=2451%2E22930333%2EV9JWdJ)**

****
We know that we’ve asked a lot of you, but the truth is that here at the DNC, a large percentage of our funding comes from supporters like you, chipping in whatever you can whenever you can.
As we think about what’s next, it’s clearer than ever that our ability to fight back and organize hinges on the response to messages like this one.
Thank you in advance for stepping up today.
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 12/22/2024
body:
A weekend at TPUSA's AmericaFest, plus an overview of the drama in Congress this weekend
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**December 22, 2024** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST** **By Heidi Ganahl**
| | Dear Readers,
This weekend, our team had the incredible opportunity to attend Turning Point's AmericaFest 2024 in Phoenix, Arizona, a four-day event that showcased the energy and vision driving today’s conservative movement, especially for young people. The event featured keynote speakers such as Tucker Carlson, Ben Shapiro, and Steve Bannon, all of whom emphasized the importance of revitalizing the Republican Party with a focus on youth and innovation.
Tucker Carlson described a shift in the nation’s tone, highlighting the optimism spreading across the country, while Ben Shapiro hailed President-elect Donald Trump as a pivotal figure in modern American history. Charlie Kirk, the host of the event, called for conservatives to seize this moment to transform the GOP into a “Grand Young Party” that prioritizes the next generation. President Trump closed the weekend with a bold speech outlining plans for his administration, including revisiting tech policies surrounding TikTok and advocating for infrastructure projects like reclaiming the Panama Canal.
For us at Rocky Mountain Voice, the event was an invaluable chance to network, gain insights, and develop strategies to expand our platform and amplify the conservative voice in Colorado. We have pages and pages and pages of notes we're excited to implement in the new year!
Back in Washington, the House narrowly [avoided a government shutdown](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) by passing a last-minute funding bill, extending federal operations through mid-March. While the bill included over $100 billion in disaster relief and aid for farmers, it notably lacked a provision to address the debt ceiling—a measure that President-elect Trump had championed to pave the way for his tax reforms. Trump’s push for an early debt ceiling resolution would have bolstered his ability to deliver on campaign promises, including revisions to previous tax policies.
However, key Republicans in the House, including Colorado’s own Greg Lopez and Doug Lamborn, failed to unite behind this effort, leaving Trump unable to secure the support he needed. While House Speaker Mike Johnson hailed the vote as a victory, the lack of action on the debt ceiling highlights fractures within GOP leadership that could lead to more contentious battles early next year.
As we reflect on the insights and inspiration from AmericaFest, we remain committed to delivering the stories and perspectives that matter most to our community. Whether in the halls of Congress or on the national stage of conservative advocacy, these are pivotal moments shaping our future. This weekend really did reinforce the work we're doing to get TRUTH out in Colorado. Thank you for being part of our journey!
In liberty and truth, Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Overwhelming ‘wolves are not welcome’ message the result of Garfield Co. ‘come to Jesus’ meeting](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) More than 300 residents from Garfield, Eagle and Pitkin Counties flocked recently to the New Hope Church in New Castle at the invitation of the Garfield County officials.

**[‘Something is seriously wrong, and we’re going to try and fix it,’ APD Chief Chamberlain says in vision for future](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) It was a long night for Todd Chamberlain and the Aurora Police Department. Oft the subject of news reports during the last year, The Edge at Lowry apartments were yet again the location of overnight police activity Tuesday, Dec. 17.
**[Tina Peters is now a Larimer Co. inmate. Here’s detail on why Mesa Co. chose to transfer Peters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Fears expressed by Tina Peters to Mesa County Sheriff’s Office deputies during her stay in the county’s jail led to the decision this week to relocate the former Mesa County clerk, the Rocky Mountain Voice has learned.

|
---
**STATE**
**[Court of Appeals vacates contempt conviction against Tina Peters in iPad recording case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) In a court order filed Thursday, Dec. 19, 2024, the Court of Appeals ruled that the case against Tina Peters concerning a contempt of court conviction over an iPad recording in Mesa County be vacated.
**[Boebert calls upon Senate to get her ZIP code bill to President’s desk](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) “While this may seem like a niche issue to some, it is extremely important to these cities and towns that asked for this bill to be put forward on their behalf,” Congresswoman Lauren Boebert told her colleagues on the House floor as she urged them to pass her bipartisan ZIP Code bill, H.R. 8753.
**[Rep.-elect Jeff Hurd will be a vote for energy dominance in Western Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) One of the most repeated campaign promises U.S. Rep.-elect Jeff Hurd made to the people of Colorado’s 3rd District was to pursue the Trump agenda of energy dominance.

**[At odds over union law, business and labor groups sharpen arguments ahead of Capitol fight](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) As the fight over proposed changes to an 80-year-old labor law takes shape, unions and businesses have begun sharpening their arguments, with both sides notably claiming their approach is best for Colorado’s economy.

**[Who will Democrats support for governor in 2026? Poll is inconclusive](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A majority of voters are undecided about their next choice for Colorado governor among a few potential Democratic aspirants. The poll only offered potential Democratic candidates.
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Incoming Trump ‘border czar’ has a message for Aurora chief of police after arrest of suspected gang members](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Incoming Trump “border czar” Tom Homan called on the Aurora chief of police to hand suspected Tren de Aragua (TdA) gang members over to U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents so they can be removed from the country.

**[‘We cannot live in a world with a nuclear Iran,’ newly-elected Rep. Evans says on Middle East](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[JEWISH INSIDER](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Rep.-elect Gabe Evans (R-CO), a Colorado state House member and Army veteran, is set to bring personal experience as a service member in the Middle East, under fire from Iranian rockets, to Capitol Hill in January.

**[NRA sees national concealed carry, ATF reform under Trump](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The National Rifle Association is growing hopeful that after four years of fighting off anti-gun policies in Washington and several state capitals, having an ally in the White House will result in several pro-firearms policies.

**[Luigi Mangione staying at same ‘barbaric’ NYC prison as Sean ‘Diddy’ Combs, whose lawyer is married to his lawyer](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[NEW YORK POST](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Accused UnitedHealthcare CEO killer Luigi Mangione spent his first night back in the Big Apple under the same NYC federal prison as disgraced rap mogul Sean “Diddy” Combs.

**[Madison, Wisc., school shooting suspect identified as 15-year-old girl](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A 15-year-old girl killed a teacher and teen student in a shooting on Monday at a private Christian school in Madison, Wisconsin, and wounded six others, according to authorities.
**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[‘Bound, pistol-whipped, beat, victimized and terrorized’: Aurora PD chief describes home invasion](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) More than a dozen persons were arrested overnight related to an armed home invasion in the 1200 block of Dallas St. in Aurora. “This is without question a gang incident,” said Police Chief Todd Chamberlain. “It could be [Tren de Aragua], it could be [a gang] other than TdA. This is gang activity and there are Venezuelans involved.”
**[Aurora police seek charges for suspects in Colorado apartment torture case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) The Aurora Police Department is seeking charges against 11 suspects in its investigation into a violent kidnapping and assault earlier this week at an apartment complex in Aurora.
**[Kevin Van Winkle to make early arrival as Douglas County commissioner](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Following the recent turn of events in Douglas County, Kevin Van Winkle, a state senator, joined his soon-to-be colleagues on Thursday night to host the annual state of the county report.

**[Denver court dismisses Douglas County’s lawsuit over Colorado’s ‘sanctuary’ laws](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) A Denver district court has dismissed a lawsuit that Douglas County filed against the state of Colorado over its “sanctuary” statutes that restrict local law enforcement officials from working with federal authorities on illegal immigration, according to the county’s lawyer.

**[DA-elect in Colorado’s new judicial district says criminals should expect jail time](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Colorado’s newest judicial district will take form in January. The 23rd Judicial District will serve Douglas, Elbert and Lincoln counties which are separating from Arapahoe County and the 18th Judicial District.
**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Schumann: Socialist seeds in conservative soil? The new battle for Western Colorado’s identity](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Beneath the wide-open skies of Western Colorado, a clash of ideologies is quietly unfolding that could shake the foundations of its conservative stronghold._
**[Solomon: A pop tab, a campfire and small act of kindness makes a big difference](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Five years ago, while working with Cameron Advanced Mobility (CAM), I had an interaction around the campfire in Moab that has since garnered a global response. It highlights that in this season of giving and joy, even the most dedicated warriors embody kindness._ __
**[Garbo: The people’s will to stand tall against crime manifested in JD23](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _In an era when too many jurisdictions have abandoned the very principles that uphold civilized society, the 23rd Judicial District (JD23) emerges as a bastion of bold, unified leadership._
**[Gaines: Educate yourself, Logan County, a Metro District may be coming](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Sage Pointe, a neighborhood just outside of Sterling, Colo., in Logan County, might have a Metro District coming._ _Since such things might be new to a lot of people out here; I thought it worth taking a minute to hit the high notes on Metro Districts.___
**[Devotional: Reprogram your thinking to transform your life](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) _Most Christians are familiar with the Great Commandment: “Love the Lord your God with all your heart, with all your soul, and with all your mind” (Matthew 22:37)._
_**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**_
|

|
---
**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** The U.S. Constitution—drafted in 1787, ratified in 1788, and implemented in 1789—was undoubtedly groundbreaking, but it drew inspiration from the **Iroquois Confederacy**. This alliance of six Indigenous nations—the Mohawk, Oneida, Onondaga, Cayuga, Seneca, and later the Tuscarora—spanned modern-day Ontario, New York, and Pennsylvania. Their Great Law of Peace, which balanced collective governance with individual sovereignty, significantly shaped John Adams' constitutional research.
|

This election was a mandate against that insanity. We won resoundingly because Americans want common sense back, and it has not been common at all for far too long." - Donald Trump, Jr. (AmericaFest 2024)

subject: They take every advantage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
How did this skew happen? Simply, opponents of voting rights control the drawing of many more districts. In some states, nonpartisan commissions or state courts have actually produced fairer maps. But in most places, politicians are free to press for partisan advantage. And the vote suppressors take every advantage.
Team: RUSH $25 or more today to fight for the fair maps we deserve across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-redistricting?refcode=122224_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122224_2&amount=25]
BCJ: Gerrymandering Decided House Control [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-redistricting?refcode=122224_2&amount=25]
Post-election analysis has shown this to be true, Team: Unfair maps helped opponents of voting rights win a razor-thin majority. .
It's clear that control of the House of Representatives will matter greatly. Right now that control is very, very narrow. And it turns out to rest on a shaky foundation of gerrymandering and manipulated maps, all encouraged by the Supreme Court.
Analysis from the nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice has found that " Republicans won a net 16-seat advantage due to manipulated maps drawn for party advantage. (Democrats garnered an edge in 7 seats through gerrymandering, but the GOP gained a total of 23 seats that way — hence, 16 seats.) " With such a close margin -- 220 to 215 -- it's clear that one party's 16-seat advantage via gerrymandering got them control.
Gerrymandered districts have long been a tool to silence voters and have been under fire for decades. It's time to put people's interests first and make sure that everyone is able to have their voice fairly heard.
We’re mobilizing a grassroots effort to fight rigged electoral maps across the country, and we need your help. Pitch in $25 or whatever you can right now so we can fund this critical work and protect the voice of the people in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-redistricting?refcode=122224_2&amount=25]

clean_body: How did this skew happen? Simply, opponents of voting rights control the drawing of many more districts. In some states, nonpartisan commissions or state courts have actually produced fairer maps. But in most places, politicians are free to press for partisan advantage. And the vote suppressors take every advantage. Team: RUSH $25 or more today to fight for the fair maps we deserve across the country >> [] Voter Action Project Logo [] BCJ: Gerrymandering Decided House Control [] Post-election analysis has shown this to be true, Team: Unfair maps helped opponents of voting rights win a razor-thin majority. . It's clear that control of the House of Representatives will matter greatly. Right now that control is very, very narrow. And it turns out to rest on a shaky foundation of gerrymandering and manipulated maps, all encouraged by the Supreme Court. Analysis from the nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice has found that " Republicans won a net 16-seat advantage due to manipulated maps drawn for party advantage. (Democrats garnered an edge in 7 seats through gerrymandering, but the GOP gained a total of 23 seats that way — hence, 16 seats.) " With such a close margin -- 220 to 215 -- it's clear that one party's 16-seat advantage via gerrymandering got them control. Gerrymandered districts have long been a tool to silence voters and have been under fire for decades. It's time to put people's interests first and make sure that everyone is able to have their voice fairly heard. We’re mobilizing a grassroots effort to fight rigged electoral maps across the country, and we need your help. name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj6d2ov4heh0pcrmvjj815lj1rv0r65b3ojembtg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm2ob6c1h2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

_" Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." _

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7bdbgfesbk2tjeerh7tri4tn45j03ojquc23vpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm2ob6c1h2bs)
**You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ by clicking on the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1o8vvqsr4s5krj11nmpaoov1el77a5ts2tfamm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm2ob6c1h2bs)

clean_body: Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites. This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile. " Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites. The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser. But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol." Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of A Christmas Carol , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation. In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine. Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year. And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of A Christmas Carol by clicking on the link below: And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well. Merry Christmas to you and yours, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College | | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Jeff Frazee
subject: Catch the Liberty Wave
body:
Operation Win at the Door remains the largest and most effective door-to-door program in the country.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqnk9oofclnjhv7ru0p728voku6ljr4pm4u68e6o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs)
Friend,

If you thought President Trump’s victory was big, wait till you hear about what we accomplished for liberty!

The _red wave_ may have been impressive, but the _liberty wave_ was even more impressive, thanks to Young Americans for Liberty’s Operation Win at the Door and dedicated activists like Sam.

Let me tell you about Sam Farrington.

**Sam Farrington puts the _Young_ in Young Americans for Liberty.**
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztid94iobg4om6gj0jcdvpagndosi996k1oagpvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs)
Sam took out a four-term Democratic incumbent with the help of YAL-trained student doorknockers. He will be one of the youngest state representatives in the country.

Not only will he be serving in Concord, but Sam is currently a junior at the University of New Hampshire, where he is actively engaged in YAL's Student Rights Campaign, working to legalize campus carry.

Sam represents exactly how Young Americans for Liberty is creating a new generation of pro-liberty leaders and activists.

Thanks to the thousands of other OWD-recruited activists, liberty candidates outperformed President Trump in swing states, even topping the Republican wave in places like Minnesota, Maine, and New Hampshire.

[Please click here to help YAL scale Operation Win at the Door’s victories and defend freedom in every corner of the country. >>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zauoa0dom596q1e9up0ndccti9v3frarlplnueng_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs)
[**Donate**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8leljpj0epjbm857439bhvd29jvmtr7dqqt8qio_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs)
Operation Win at the Door remains the largest and most effective door-to-door program in the country.

OWD-trained students achieved the goal of flipping and defending state legislatures.

Not a single state flipped blue.

Liberty candidates gained ground in these crucial states, proving that grassroots action works.

**Here are just a few highlights:**
* In Minnesota, the Democrat majority in the State House is over, and it’s on the verge of flipping toward liberty!

* In Maine, Laurel Libby, one of Young Americans for Liberty’s rising stars, defended her seat for her third term.

* In Texas, Shelley Luther, who was arrested for refusing to shut down her salon during the COVID lockdown in 2020, won a seat in the Texas State House.

**In total, Operation Win at the Door-recruited activists helped flip 36 blue seats and ousted 23 Democrat incumbents!**

Young Americans for Liberty now has _over 400 liberty legislators in its coalition_!

Now, the mission is to scale our operation and create even more Liberty Lighthouse states by electing liberty legislators and passing pro-liberty legislation.

Every dollar raised fuels our proven grassroots strategy, which turns razor-thin margins into decisive wins for liberty.

[By donating today, you can help YAL continue to spread a pro-liberty message as we take on crucial battles, district by district, to get pro-liberty legislation passed all across the country!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqa3jrh57m1gk0686ngpmggfg95uo9s59qgpdo28_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs)

Our vision is to build a bench of principled leaders who will champion pro-liberty policies at every level.

**Through the Hazlitt Coalition, we’ve grown to over 400 pro-liberty legislators across the country — 10 times the number we had in 2018!**

These champions have passed over 750 pro-liberty laws since then, including:
* Constitutional Carry in Texas
* Property Tax Relief in North Dakota
* School Choice in Arizona
* Free Speech Protections on college campuses in Indiana

These victories are possible because of supporters like you.

Now, it’s your turn to step up.

Please chip in today to ensure we can create more Liberty Lighthouse states and train a new generation of activists to defend our values.
**[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2go5lhfb6jj2pdi1v1b766r3llekuaenhlhfp3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs)**

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrr5m2ghaj8le2bn7mge0ckd570iaj3emcrkfjc0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

_" Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." _

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpihbpqror95mrm769mup7emmjpbuvvj40s9r9v8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs)
**You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ by clicking on the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmqh2gdfduhu7en4omtj8e7f6qakmlmuphli7q0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs)

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Merry Christmas to you and yours,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkafjgtcbhullcs26750pvo7651vle1dd86rjb28_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpge8p37c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3pok6hqrei7uj43bt21meurkr617akqp6m6nft0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs)_

name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: 50-year Wall Street legend: “Everything just changed for U.S. stocks”
body:
But one of my most senior analysts has been sending this around – and it's startling.

# Is Your Portfolio Caught in A "Post-Election Trap"?
* * *
Most investors don't see [the problem](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zncniaq8gqa8tnk7htm0niism3pu4r4l1ga15hm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs) yet... and many think this current rally could keep going for months or even years.
But one of my most senior analysts has been sending this around - and it's startling.
The last time the country looked like it does today, the "rally" at the time didn't keep going at all.
In fact, the market abruptly crashed...
But that was just the beginning of the problem.
Next...
Stocks proceeded to go nowhere for 16 years. And that _still_ wasn't the worst part...
The worst part was, by the end, many investors lost 80% of their biggest positions in real terms.
That number is hard to imagine... but this really happened - at a time in American history that looks eerily similar to today.
I can't possibly explain this all in a single e-mail.
[So it's best you go hear it directly from senior analyst Dan Ferris](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zefh3ijdjpn7gtphh8oc21guve8an60rh201js5o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs).
Dan once wrote to an entire list of people and told them one of the world's biggest banks was about to collapse. He wrote these exact words:
_"These guys are hiding something. I expect a wipeout."_
It was March 2008, and he was writing about Lehman Brothers.
Few wanted to hear it.
But Dan was right about Lehman and the mortgage crisis. Lehman collapsed 5 months later.
And Dan has been right about nearly every bubble of the last 25 years including the COVID crash, the collapse of crypto in 2017, and the end of the Nasdaq bubble in 2021.
That's why Dan's work is followed by employees at banks like Wells Fargo, Barclays, and UBS. And it's why he has been featured in publications like _Barron's_ and Bloomberg.
Now that the election is over... as he puts it:
"_Millions are about to be blindsided_ _unless they take the time now to prepare. The last time anything close to this happened in America, our economy suffered a large surprise crash. The market netted 0% over the following sixteen years. And by the end, adjusted for inflation, American investors lost 80% of their wealth. This time, I expect much worse."_
To defend yourself - and potentially profit...
He recommends you consider [moving money to a new type of investment, right away](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2cbnlv8bhc428evj63boajp5hanucqdnh93lad0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs). (It's not gold, real estate, or cryptocurrency.)
Because time is running low, Ferris has agreed to [publish his latest findings online, for free](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqn9543tok61t01gh6taq3n7qbc73859ghdj8480_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs).
[Click here to see his new message now](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1q7ucqvm6gcfg1shljji0938i1rtdo5elcscjig_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs).
Regards,
Brett Aitken
Publisher, Stansberry Research
This ad is sent on behalf of Stansberry Research, 1125 N Charles St, Baltimore, MD 21201.

Updates for Great Americans

name: The Exodus Effect
subject: bumbling Biden just started WW3?
body:
Maybe you thought the situation in the Middle East was isolated to the other side of the world...

Hey,

Maybe you thought the situation in the Middle East was isolated to the other side of the world...

But it turns out bumbling Biden has just stuck his boot in.

And some believe he's made such a massive slip up...

[That the U.S. and Iran are already at war.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbqlt2bl07aheac0cbeh2gllu940mdd7tnunccao_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs)

You will not believe what Biden did to make them so mad.

It's insane. And it's also worrying as hell.

Because, if the latest intelligence is correct, Iran could have the capability to carry out a unique type of attack - right here on American soil.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4qhe41hd9hss997brsh92ibg19r9v3cvmca0pt0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1o32clh2bs)
Do you think it's going to be the guys in Washington that feel the Revolutionary Guard's wrath?

Or that it'll more likely affect us everyday Americans?

One Military expert, Teddy Daniels, has blown the whistle on how and where he believes a strike could occur.

And he's shared the 5-min preparation secret he's using to protect his family.

It's a tactic that solely high up military personnel know about.

But this situation is so dire, he's revealed it to the public for the first time.

I suggest you take a look at his short vid below if you want to keep your family safe.

name: Read Immediately [From Team Scalise]
subject: Secure memo (enclosed here)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We’d be remiss if we didn’t share this information with you before 2024 is over and done with.

| |
---
| | | Friend - we'd be remiss if we didn't share this information with you before we close the books for 2024.

Here's the gist:

Our Conservative House Majority could be on the precipice of disaster. Three NEW Special Elections are around the corner and we're running out of time to set Republicans up for success in the new year.

_We just released our FINAL memo of 2024 and need you to read it immediately. We attached it below:_

---
FROM: House Republicans
TO: Concerned American Patriots
RE: Our Final Memo of 2024
* * *

Fellow Patriot -

NEW Special Elections were just announced in _FL-01_ for Matt Gaetz's seat, in _FL-06_ for Mike Waltz's seat, and in _NY-21_ for Elise Stefanik's seat.

But after the most expensive election in HISTORY, our campaign accounts are dangerously low. **It was expensive to defeat the Democrat Machine and deliver a Conservative House Majority for President Trump AND the American People.**

Right now we're short on funds to flood these districts with positive ads, volunteers, and doorknockers to help win these Special Elections decisively.
| | [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ug1bp5k959u4clim79d8pd3ib1llra1rvhgtso_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1p71c1h2bs "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US?")
---

Now that the dust has settled, it's official that House Republicans hold a razor-thin Majority. The margins couldn't be closer.

That means if the Democrats manage to win these Special Elections in Florida and New York, we might as well kiss our Conservative Majority - and our Republican Trifecta along with it - goodbye.

That's not all...

These Special Elections will be our first major test of 2025. And if we fail, the consequences could be unthinkable. Losing our House Majority could put President Trump's entire legislative agenda at risk!

So we're reaching out to every grassroots Conservative for help to replenish our campaign accounts before our End-of-Year deadline on 12/31/2024.
| [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr1u0fsk5jq67l1agj9v3103cj7hlr1dbaa446eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1p71c1h2bs "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US?")
---

Every contribution will help Republicans refuel before the new year and help us make key budgetary decisions ahead of these three Special Elections. _That 's how we'll save our fragile House Majority._

**Everything we 've fought so hard for could be in jeopardy without your help.**

So we're pleading with you to help House Republicans with one FINAL wave of support before our End-of-Year deadline.
| [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z849fa7ksjko2q7gnnamkta6nainuek367n0g5r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1p71c1h2bs "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US?")
---

Thanks for all you do,
House Republicans

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze2erlrnpsdoogkke2h7bjrt7u55m4q00pj6t7k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1p71c1h2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeoh8q39dbrnb8joh8bkj3aqmm1o7kt6nq1n967g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1p71c1h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8llj7jeiqm1th3o8nv7ecadobquveb3abm7km10_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1p71c1h2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

body:
If Democrats get their way, they’ll sabotage our vision for America

|
---
| | |
**ATTN: Friend **

The Left is panicking as we near the start of our Republican Trifecta. In a desperate attempt to undermine our progress, they're targeting the Special Elections in Florida for the seats currently held by Republicans.

Democrats are lining up their most radical candidates to seize control of these critical House seats and stall the America First agenda in Congress. **If we fail to act, the floodgates of dark money will open, and the Left will pour in thousands of dollars to sabotage our vision for America.**

---
| | | [DEFEND OUR HOUSE MAJORITY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zndd85e2nacsb6878httsnsgjc7epr98ll6gl040_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjgm1p76cdh2bs "Generic Button")

---

We must act NOW to protect these seats and ensure the continued success of our America First movement. That's why we need your immediate support to stop the Democrats' scheme in its tracks.

subject: Secure memo (enclosed here)

body:
We’d be remiss if we didn’t share this information with you before 2024 is over and done with.

| |
---
| | | Friend - we'd be remiss if we didn't share this information with you before we close the books for 2024.

Here's the gist:

Our Conservative House Majority could be on the precipice of disaster. Three NEW Special Elections are around the corner and we're running out of time to set Republicans up for success in the new year.

_We just released our FINAL memo of 2024 and need you to read it immediately. We attached it below:_

---
FROM: House Republicans
TO: Concerned American Patriots
RE: Our Final Memo of 2024
* * *

Fellow Patriot -

NEW Special Elections were just announced in _FL-01_ for Matt Gaetz's seat, in _FL-06_ for Mike Waltz's seat, and in _NY-21_ for Elise Stefanik's seat.

But after the most expensive election in HISTORY, our campaign accounts are dangerously low. **It was expensive to defeat the Democrat Machine and deliver a Conservative House Majority for President Trump AND the American People.**

Right now we're short on funds to flood these districts with positive ads, volunteers, and doorknockers to help win these Special Elections decisively.
| | [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zc2jd3kogn76jk838o3s640sgjiaqq9u7qat6jvo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or4cdh2bs "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US?")
---

Now that the dust has settled, it's official that House Republicans hold a razor-thin Majority. The margins couldn't be closer.

That means if the Democrats manage to win these Special Elections in Florida and New York, we might as well kiss our Conservative Majority - and our Republican Trifecta along with it - goodbye.

That's not all...

These Special Elections will be our first major test of 2025. And if we fail, the consequences could be unthinkable. Losing our House Majority could put President Trump's entire legislative agenda at risk!

So we're reaching out to every grassroots Conservative for help to replenish our campaign accounts before our End-of-Year deadline on 12/31/2024.
| [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdguamcjg0dfhts5koe219q7brdmjbd0h75gbbmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or4cdh2bs "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US?")
---

Every contribution will help Republicans refuel before the new year and help us make key budgetary decisions ahead of these three Special Elections. _That 's how we'll save our fragile House Majority._

**Everything we 've fought so hard for could be in jeopardy without your help.**

So we're pleading with you to help House Republicans with one FINAL wave of support before our End-of-Year deadline.
| [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8rjl8su8qtu89de5pdl8q3eqiet4osl39ckgjjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or4cdh2bs "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US?")
---

Thanks for all you do,
House Republicans

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zuv8hutmi2sifujupgqe3864rq802c28ins19eh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or4cdh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z52108cmu5ggs2lqldvg4coibk4fc26sdr4rhi38_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or4cdh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zris1p5ksapgjcq99nkntaatf76ej21alk9u19v0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or4cdh2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: American Briefing
subject: 50-year Wall Street legend: “Everything just changed for U.S. stocks”
body:
But one of my most senior analysts has been sending this around – and it's startling.

# Is Your Portfolio Caught in A "Post-Election Trap"?
* * *
Most investors don't see [the problem](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn08phtu1uns28h54bggvj1p33qa4ht7i9tcvaj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or2cth2bs) yet... and many think this current rally could keep going for months or even years.
But one of my most senior analysts has been sending this around - and it's startling.
The last time the country looked like it does today, the "rally" at the time didn't keep going at all.
In fact, the market abruptly crashed...
But that was just the beginning of the problem.
Next...
Stocks proceeded to go nowhere for 16 years. And that _still_ wasn't the worst part...
The worst part was, by the end, many investors lost 80% of their biggest positions in real terms.
That number is hard to imagine... but this really happened - at a time in American history that looks eerily similar to today.
I can't possibly explain this all in a single e-mail.
[So it's best you go hear it directly from senior analyst Dan Ferris](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqi8piel8i2b54rsf5rff25sfs34n2o49uac650g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or2cth2bs).
Dan once wrote to an entire list of people and told them one of the world's biggest banks was about to collapse. He wrote these exact words:
_"These guys are hiding something. I expect a wipeout."_
It was March 2008, and he was writing about Lehman Brothers.
Few wanted to hear it.
But Dan was right about Lehman and the mortgage crisis. Lehman collapsed 5 months later.
And Dan has been right about nearly every bubble of the last 25 years including the COVID crash, the collapse of crypto in 2017, and the end of the Nasdaq bubble in 2021.
That's why Dan's work is followed by employees at banks like Wells Fargo, Barclays, and UBS. And it's why he has been featured in publications like _Barron's_ and Bloomberg.
Now that the election is over... as he puts it:
"_Millions are about to be blindsided_ _unless they take the time now to prepare. The last time anything close to this happened in America, our economy suffered a large surprise crash. The market netted 0% over the following sixteen years. And by the end, adjusted for inflation, American investors lost 80% of their wealth. This time, I expect much worse."_
To defend yourself - and potentially profit...
He recommends you consider [moving money to a new type of investment, right away](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcd9ou1p7ga0o96su1as53rvt34nlq5ibiuomfeg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or2cth2bs). (It's not gold, real estate, or cryptocurrency.)
Because time is running low, Ferris has agreed to [publish his latest findings online, for free](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv1nm2vrnj5vlsrsqsl0f7clqc10e1qikcncm3l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or2cth2bs).
[Click here to see his new message now](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3ldbguulo2toas8hut5tt6cgfu5rrq7datfl55g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or2cth2bs).
Regards,
Brett Aitken
Publisher, Stansberry Research
This ad is sent on behalf of Stansberry Research, 1125 N Charles St, Baltimore, MD 21201.

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8jggkm0ohkpkgs0fmc1g7ie2qv804tdcs7duc0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni6co74chge8oh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbjbsjpursi245su4h43bj4lolbado8n0pjn46do_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or2cth2bs)_

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z260cit7kpelrpc50hsdttmjcd5ebnjtfl82l73o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5ieap33c9jm49fg)

name: Jamie Janosz, Managing Editor at Today in the Word
subject: Live Like Jesus in a Changing World
body:
Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2baridnlmm07d66taodecqtu8qr96fvmma9gkfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or4c3h2bs)
---

Hey there Friend, ____ Even as we celebrate the Christmas season and reflect on the incredible gift of hope we have in Jesus Christ, I am sure you are reminded of the challenge before us: how do we live out that hope in a world that seems so increasingly distant from God?

It's a question we all wrestle with, especially as we witness significant cultural shifts that oppose our biblical convictions. In times like these, we need practical wisdom, encouragement, and a clear vision for how to live as faithful followers of Christ.

[That's where This Light of Mine: Living Like Jesus in a Non-Jesus World comes in.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0jur5sm5lqcnokgiqddf1geto8hhd587ba86i6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or4c3h2bs)

In this powerful book, Dr. Joseph Stowell (a name you may recognize as the former president of Moody Bible Institute) offers a timely call for Christians to stop fighting battles for an earthly kingdom and instead embrace the privilege of advancing Christ's Kingdom. Drawing from Scripture and the life of Jesus, Dr. Stowell shows how we can respond to today's challenges with hope, courage, and grace.

As we interact with a culture that often feels divided and broken,_This Light of Mine_ encourages us to reflect Jesus' love and truth in a way that draws others to the Gospel--without alienating them. It encourages us to rise above the noise and shine God's light in a world desperately in need of it.

We'd love to send you an exclusive, pre-release copy of _This Light of Mine_ as a thank-you for your generous gift of any amount to support the mission of _Today in the Word_. Your gift today will help us continue providing Bible-centered resources to readers across the globe.

Whether you're seeking practical advice for living out your faith in a complex world or simply need encouragement to stay steady in your walk with Christ, _This Light of Mine_ is a timely and powerful tool for your journey.

Give today at this link and receive this book as a thank-you: [https://give.todayintheword.org/cye-tdw](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmljeubhjdroqmhe43kqrn5ac8j9l9uqmve1cch0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or4c3h2bs)

When you give today, you not only support the mission of _Today in the Word_ to spread the Gospel but you will also receive this transformative book that will inspire and equip you to live out your Christian faith with boldness and love.

[Can I count on you to partner with us in this season of giving? Together, we can shine the light of Jesus in a world that desperately needs it.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrm7fa4kh390gv6bgqbj89s6nk9ifp094m0g29j0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim8or4c3h2bs)

Thank you for your generosity and for being part of this important mission.

With gratitude,

Jamie Janosz
Managing Editor, _Today in the Word_
---
|
---

GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zda89msei2ns57bnbuvkgql87auoteuqfbolbf50_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim4pb6cph2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

_" Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." _

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztahuho37egvuut8gqhnitv16d4h29ob6qv0mrn0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim4pb6cph2bs)
**You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ by clicking on the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv84cl5f49db0d63sg0dkcgb3ojrn33o6q3451uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjim4pb6cph2bs)

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Merry Christmas to you and yours,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

# **[Sri Lankan cardinal mandates male-only altar servers in Colombo Archdiocese](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9NDEyMTQifQ/7iZ2O1GAut9_3aF57snXNQ)**
---
Altar servers. / Credit: Mazur/catholicnews.org.uk (CC BY-NC-SA 2.0) Washington, D.C. Newsroom, Dec 22, 2024 / 08:00 am (CNA). Sri Lankan Cardinal Malcolm Ranjith has mandated that girls are not permitted to serve as altar servers in parishes within the Archdiocese of Colombo.“No girls should be invited to serve at the altar, as altar servers, in the archdiocese,” Ranjith wrote in an Oct. 22 letter to parish priests that was made public this week.According to the letter, the cardinal issued the order because serving as an altar server can be a pathway to the priesthood and should therefore be a position reserved for boys.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: They’ve promoted American decline for decades
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsjHVXeWNN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osjHVXeWNN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

You know that most institutions of higher education have been hotbeds of anti-Americanism for decades.

In recent years, the radical ideologies hatched in higher education have spread into the mainstream of American life.

The need to push back aggressively has become urgent.

Next year, we must do even more for the cause of liberty and the American way of life. And I think the opportunities are significantly better than in the past.

We must do all we can to revive and preserve the principles and practices of liberty and limited constitutional government on the battlefield of education.

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty Through Education in 2025.

The focus of this vital project is to foster informed patriotism nationwide, especially among younger Americans. And we need your help.

Before the end of 2024, would you consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift? We have set a goal to raise $6,000,000 from our friends nationwide by December 31.

Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty has never been more urgent than it is today. That's because efforts to undermine patriotism and destroy the American way of life have been increasing-with the ultimate goal
of transforming American government and society.

Your year-end gift will help us to promote informed patriotism by educating millions of Americans-especially younger Americans-about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

One way we accomplish this is through our free online courses-courses such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "Land of Hope: The Great American Story," and "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

We must increase the number of citizens we reach and teach through these free online courses, as well as through our several other educational outreach efforts-efforts such as Imprimis and our ongoing work to help launch and
support Hillsdale-affiliated K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Defeating the anti-American Left on the battlefield of education is an essential part of reviving and preserving the American way of life.

Hillsdale College refuses to accept even one penny of government support-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. This principled independence frees us from many burdensome and corrupting
federal regulations and allows us to remain true to our mission.

It also means that we depend entirely on the support of citizens like you.

I see the tremendous impact of this support as I travel around the nation and talk to those who benefit from Hillsdale's educational outreach. It is especially gratifying to see the impact on younger Americans.

Your year-end contribution will help us expand Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty in 2025.

If you agree that it is vitally important to promote informed patriotism by educating increasing millions of citizens (especially younger Americans) about our nation's great heritage of liberty, please make your best
tax-deductible gift to Hillsdale College by December 31.

You can give your year-end tax-deductible gift using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/64078056:sjHVXeWNN:m:3:2532013465:DA1E58783497A483A02834AC05BDC21A:r

We are honored by your partnership in the crucial year ahead.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z02b0na1dhkku166692gfljhd4c1n22oo8qmn07g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjimeo34chh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zucob146j2fgj65u3241hie6n0mkqusrfdaaprio_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjimeo34chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za1uvd60q8447qfkplrrvsrpcu3p3ls8dvv1v560_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cjimeo34chh2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

body:
An Army Veteran and doctor of over three decades, he’s speaking out for the first time.

_“What in the world is happening to our country?”_
It’s a question Americans like you can’t help but ask right now.
Seems like just yesterday, a wrecking ball was sent our way from a far-off corner of the world.

name: Kelly Loeffler
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
a note from Kelly
| | | | | [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K4t2j7CrldTA5DaOBno1BUZOFuFZyIEZ_aNAbpkrUT66eFZfkI8vhEljMP5M7ORwKsB_fUf5NuyqkYAN5nbtDTmTzXz3sGvaoCR4D_B3YzzBC2x9ojHVu-5tqyX55d3pAM_IWocP1AY_7WsGqLGYTwonvsRScHN1&c=TRYkmHEcd_O54iHP19IWXvhTRrh3vpqV7Yx5AxkjqcqjMljAFePr8A==&ch=cDVYvgOL9UNPxS-H4QHeGATnh7FZve0T-X6nAZUJ4mx6gRs8kt45vA==)
---
| As we near the end of a year filled with huge wins for our state and nation, I want to wish you a very Merry Christmas on behalf of my team at Greater Georgia.
It's hard to believe that nearly four years have passed since I first launched this organization. In that time, Greater Georgia has become our state's leading conservative voter registration group - and the only group working year-round to mobilize diverse communities. We have been one of the loudest voices for election integrity, and a proud watchdog for government accountability.
Year after year, we continue to grow our impact. In 2024, Greater Georgia registered more than 7,000 conservatives and "re-activated" more than 4,000. We made over 14 million voter contacts and held dozens of events - with a strong focus on mobilizing minority, youth, and women voters. We worked to hold our elected officials accountable to the taxpayers - and advocated for strong legislation.
There is no doubt that Greater Georgia is now a major player in our state's conservative ecosystem, with thousands of volunteers, dozens of partners, and a full-time staff dedicated to our mission. With the backing of supporters like you, we helped deliver a tremendous victory for President Trump - while also protecting majorities in the State House and Senate.
The November election is now in the rear-view mirror, but our work carries on. Georgia's legislative session is just around the corner and our team will continue to advocate on key issues ranging from education to public safety - while gearing up for critical municipal elections.
For now, we head into the holiday season with a renewed sense of optimism for America. Strong conservative leadership at the state and national levels alike will unlock a new era of strength, safety, and opportunity for families, communities, and job creators alike. We look forward to all that will be accomplished under conservative control - and to continuing the fight to defend our values and future.
On behalf of Greater Georgia, I hope you have a wonderful Christmas season filled with peace and joy. We are blessed to have your support - and look forward to our continued partnership in the New Year.
For to us a child is born, to us a son is given, and the government will be on his shoulders. And he will be called Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace. -- Isaiah 9:6
Merry Christmas!
---
| |
---
| Kelly Loeffler Greater Georgia Chairwoman
---
| |
---

body:

|

| | |
**ATTN: Friend **

The Left is panicking as we near the start of our Republican Trifecta. In a desperate attempt to undermine our progress, they're targeting the Special Elections in Florida for the seats currently held by Republicans.

Democrats are lining up their most radical candidates to seize control of these critical House seats and stall the America First agenda in Congress. **If we fail to act, the floodgates of dark money will open, and the Left will pour in thousands of dollars to sabotage our vision for America.**

name: Night Vision Monoscope
subject: Night Vision: Now Available to the Public (shipping covered...)
body:
A group of renegade tactical engineers finally did it...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19454/6374453/a36d6afc9e69dd410324be283c254049da88dd9c/c8a8fe7d510f1ea3cddffbc35899fa1ff416d26c)
---
| | |
---
_December 23rd, 2024_
---
| | |
---
Hey Reader,

A group of renegade tactical engineers finally did it...

After months of grinding, they came out with this prototype that blew everyone's minds.

It uses this patented military tech that makes it 20X more badass than anything as regular Joes can buy.
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19454/6374453/a36d6afc9e69dd410324be283c254049da88dd9c/c8a8fe7d510f1ea3cddffbc35899fa1ff416d26c)
---
Literally, you can spy on SWAT teams with this.

It looks just like you’re shining a spotlight on your targets...

It uses military-graded nanotech to magnify 10X more than any other IR binoculars out there.

Thanks to an exclusive distribution agreement, I’m able to offer this Raven optic to you at an **[INSANE discount...](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19454/6374453/a36d6afc9e69dd410324be283c254049da88dd9c/c8a8fe7d510f1ea3cddffbc35899fa1ff416d26c)**

These won’t last long at this price.

In fact, I’m positive these will run out soon.

**[Check here to see if NightVision Binoculars are still available](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19454/6374453/a36d6afc9e69dd410324be283c254049da88dd9c/c8a8fe7d510f1ea3cddffbc35899fa1ff416d26c)**

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Spend your Christmas with Dickens’ Story of Faith and Generosity
body:
Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e5068eafb324096b964279e522e1130&_e=vZaF4SMc9OXZ0BP5n78Ujn_Gt-piQboYx8PCdXaxduUj5GyLEKk7BrkA072ylXVNneC0avwLdP6417uU-eg0USF6CHPyWToIcaYCNnTaHVbcwsIyja72qClixszTEJ-wIjkOjRWWsNQJ-APiX1cCitZArmbLtuLB-jVhTORp_LmNXJE2ECa0nYjXzJaMfk7uc_eM8vq8OZxe4j-UPnkdfnex57ukF96ujV3b_dQw7K3XgpBTzrkUJqmSPrWWpbj2559vHoG_jPmU_KzEA0cd0l5Fg9LuTYm62RDPzWlnAVLb7ZfyhtTiVBQ77t86V3kvROo9aiouJw0BOiaKUKV5KqMUdxUlq4Zm8XaCifNrq6WUMBLMvKCWr_Dw_4l7aVrXT0vPQs9YQ3TGNwNHFr4GtBOzPeoKhCbc4sc2o8a2YXM%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

_" Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." _

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. clean_body: Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile. " Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites. The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser. But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol." Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of A Christmas Carol , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation. In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine. Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year. And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of A Christmas Carol by clicking on the link below: And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well. Merry Christmas to you and yours, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College | | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

| | Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

_" Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." _

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86e725770f8c49ee81662f78a7e4d126&_e=MBF6Trf7VdUtCw5OIAEIaknNKCzfWKQmXjyVA9iocNBc_qvMeJ_LFypPVBMlAe15h8U6-8FQ-PAbU5oC0xCV9bAG3wIVyav1FvOZXu0KdE-_wAsgBM8LKp6WygMQJqNVN6UVdnH3ifLM4iCTOut-VbnfdRP7OvCUNY5sLGmVKgklhfAnIUwUxXuOJASm1vbw3N5gNUVURuMA0PzyYfSjmH4nhkw23cHX0915BoI2ZCtaej4ZtPg6sU_srp5cAbDST8gpnnn6-thKIO9WFXeh_OXetjBe95AbSjDfHf2yWt0IDE6XRWnyQZV6JAMqcXbK-TCpOOpNyil8LXUGcpeECMHdY61Ekr1F_bqq189fI8vF7iIpM-OoDZUfXeLJmmLuvnMnFqhdk046XchQw242fjWoQ45qpbSsDw_IZm0lCyc%3D)

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Merry Christmas to you and yours,

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=062262cf4d384dc2a90b72c2423f8b3f&_e=3N8gXATep1iOjKVjW_StTSA28WjojOrVwI9TujeKBP4cGlq7UebIkEPtXoi_v7Vb6sWqA-TjojMD-Nq48njbv4J1nqzS3sLA6mTZKwXv2YZXyb2ChGMZ6IFastpLrGkm2UEmIU2wkdrKLeQQ6ScdKz8M1jSysAIdP7RBJFsxM24AkRPhrLG5zCA7dBUlLNEJ4z9QeLj2ltCY3VmrSDVuiwcIfxGbC8f5xgf4jWe3E0jZADlLiwg9ytMaecSu_H7zJPJjnfu4KuYhsoJfRS0swnsbz9GCwwK7QZ7mW9VBEDGJxpPvD4PTR4O8rNhJEWt4XOW22Xj_Ge3pT68iNbhRycZClaxSJ0pR7N7sDHel0JY01ML8QARM1jNjhZAZ97_sIbb9IRgnT6eQQRk4xdLUdA%3D%3D)

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=062262cf4d384dc2a90b72c2423f8b3f&_e=3N8gXATep1iOjKVjW_StTSA28WjojOrVwI9TujeKBP4cGlq7UebIkEPtXoi_v7Vb6sWqA-TjojMD-Nq48njbv4J1nqzS3sLA6mTZKwXv2YZXyb2ChGMZ6IFastpLrGkm2UEmIU2wkdrKLeQQ6ScdKz8M1jSysAIdP7RBJFsxM24AkRPhrLG5zCA7dBUlLNEJ4z9QeLj2ltCY3VmrSDVuiwcIfxGbC8f5xgf4jWe3E0jZADlLiwg9ytMaecSu_H7zxB7izrOSqROoYv5aKTSYlkX1fjoddMjP-D6qldyNTnjqUIJMwYPWFnfA-X49DOfJCEoKzgdVN9j-oNfideWyqGiWUGZ3VM6G-FYTOJQc6Kc8jNXukMD607GMXcON1Umn7cPoV-Kxtsd3qFnv0Jg4Zw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Our Conservative House Majority could be on the precipice of disaster. Three NEW Special Elections are around the corner and we're running out of time to set Republicans up for success in the new year.

_We just released our FINAL memo of 2024 and need you to read it immediately. We attached it below:_

FROM: House Republicans
