* * *

Fellow Patriot -

NEW Special Elections were just announced in _FL-01_ for Matt Gaetz's seat, in _FL-06_ for Mike Waltz's seat, and in _NY-21_ for Elise Stefanik's seat.

But after the most expensive election in HISTORY, our campaign accounts are dangerously low. **It was expensive to defeat the Democrat Machine and deliver a Conservative House Majority for President Trump AND the American People.**

Right now we're short on funds to flood these districts with positive ads, volunteers, and doorknockers to help win these Special Elections decisively.
| | [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eC4PAOhFfXgp1KzS9H3Qvw~~/AARclAA~ "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ")
---

Now that the dust has settled, it's official that House Republicans hold a razor-thin Majority. The margins couldn't be closer.

That means if the Democrats manage to win these Special Elections in Florida and New York, we might as well kiss our Conservative Majority - and our Republican Trifecta along with it - goodbye.

That's not all...

These Special Elections will be our first major test of 2025. And if we fail, the consequences could be unthinkable. Losing our House Majority could put President Trump's entire legislative agenda at risk!

So we're reaching out to every grassroots Conservative for help to replenish our campaign accounts before our End-of-Year deadline on 12/31/2024.
| [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/eC4PAOhFfXgp1KzS9H3Qvw~~/AARclAA~ "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ")

Every contribution will help Republicans refuel before the new year and help us make key budgetary decisions ahead of these three Special Elections. _That 's how we'll save our fragile House Majority._

**Everything we 've fought so hard for could be in jeopardy without your help.**

So we're pleading with you to help House Republicans with one FINAL wave of support before our End-of-Year deadline.

Right now we're short on funds to flood these districts with positive ads, volunteers, and doorknockers to help win these Special Elections decisively. | | "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? " Now that the dust has settled, it's official that House Republicans hold a razor-thin Majority. The margins couldn't be closer. That means if the Democrats manage to win these Special Elections in Florida and New York, we might as well kiss our Conservative Majority - and our Republican Trifecta along with it - goodbye. That's not all... These Special Elections will be our first major test of 2025. And if we fail, the consequences could be unthinkable. Losing our House Majority could put President Trump's entire legislative agenda at risk! So we're reaching out to every grassroots Conservative for help to replenish our campaign accounts before our End-of-Year deadline on 12/31/2024. | "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? " Every contribution will help Republicans refuel before the new year and help us make key budgetary decisions ahead of these three Special Elections. That 's how we'll save our fragile House Majority. Everything we 've fought so hard for could be in jeopardy without your help. So we're pleading with you to help House Republicans with one FINAL wave of support before our End-of-Year deadline. | "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? " Thanks for all you do, House Republicans | | | ~ "Majority Leader Survey" A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise: I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. ~ "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link." | | | ~ "RESPOND NOW →" Thank you, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. US Conservative Network PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1fdd8e71f01946ceb460d05e350c1cf6&_e=FvbKtZPfQX7tat7lycW-RIox_99O94NVzrJvIj0OKwzdWpJKYeRv_6wLra7q_L3-UNi60eeW_oXNbwbCL_pfYVeaibegwCkV_9zCgX6uIma9-zw-gm0iSwpb8QoIOfQFRvYtpdFAFrfoPYFDjb-lkCVnFT0kPFV32zFUNZhxKr2MnK33yc4ISeDKjCrlMNFk8a_S7ntxtlr_ygtH3T51e83ffNKn5K6FV0sfBlUdXQzhqGVOgeVp7F27J1uJNbTUf8ZyN_DDMWrrcD2lFsb2tgsVA1dorRWzDm6Gn204cmDgA2UwZPazKjeNaF6xj-zPxgbAN9N0vH5jdcgAinWTnDF2Tv4pJd8utMO0g4vHvEBWjoPhC5z-MPCftcfFq0dfIGiZ-NJ9ZDIjFPLXO0bxkg%3D%3D)

| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1fdd8e71f01946ceb460d05e350c1cf6&_e=FvbKtZPfQX7tat7lycW-RIox_99O94NVzrJvIj0OKwzdWpJKYeRv_6wLra7q_L3-UNi60eeW_oXNbwbCL_pfYVeaibegwCkV_9zCgX6uIma9-zw-gm0iSwpb8QoIOfQFRvYtpdFAFrfoPYFDjb-lkCVnFT0kPFV32zFUNZhxKr2MnK33yc4ISeDKjCrlMNFk8a_S7ntxtlr_ygtH3T51e83ffNKn5K6FV0sfBlUdXQzhqGVOgeVp7F27J1uJNbTUsuf-vNf9BZH5CzVqBsmJ57X1N4xxIhg0wZ02IAV08Cj49fpVvHGafWRrejjys7PAlMhH9ePtlBWsDBZ0Hd4dN1rOEl7eMOnjYBv7xLWfAxCpfoQwz2YEtZkBmL46gWqRRN_JaOOJUC6XrJ3k1mhpuQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1fdd8e71f01946ceb460d05e350c1cf6&_e=FvbKtZPfQX7tat7lycW-RIox_99O94NVzrJvIj0OKwzdWpJKYeRv_6wLra7q_L3-UNi60eeW_oXNbwbCL_pfYVeaibegwCkV_9zCgX6uIma9-zw-gm0iSwpb8QoIOfQFRvYtpdFAFrfoPYFDjb-lkCVnFT0kPFV32zFUNZhxKr2MnK33yc4ISeDKjCrlMNFk8a_S7ntxtlr_ygtH3T51e83ffNKn5K6FV0sfBlUdXQzhqGVOgeVp7F27J1uJNbTUcvqxRcGmRouwROVDzgNemmedVbVWbvjNDa8c6xnX1kSpawI0NjcCu1L_IuB7tZdrh9fZH9rClhgHw4V8M5I7tbZuOmwuOhZaMjVppZRSQE_1QgBtda7OoXag3hTTpkNi-1ObgNsFGirqYgfJETIrgw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Warm regards,

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen
subject: Sending gratitude and reflecting on what's ahead
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
Thank you for your advocacy and support this year
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3176449/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi Friend,

I feel grateful for this time of year when I get to take a few quiet moments to reflect on our triumphs and setbacks as Evergreen and the broader climate movement, plans for the year to come, and gratitude to you and all those who championed a better world alongside us.

As Team Evergreen looks forward to 2025, "finding hope" isn’t some philosophical platitude to us; **it's an essential affirmation of our theory of change.** Check out my message below to hear some reflections on the election and the path ahead. |
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3176450/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| It's true that we face a challenging landscape, but I am so grateful to be in this movement, doing this critical work with each of you. **Together, we will persevere—because our planet and our communities are worth it.** |
---
| Wishing you and your loved ones a peaceful and restful holiday season, |
---
| | |
---
### Lena Moffitt
Executive Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |

subject: We have just months to make this happen
body:
But by 2008, Democrats had regained control and unleashed Obama’s radical agenda.

| |
---
| | I’m reaching out because my research shows you are a strong voice for conservative values in your community.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkMGOmzAQQL_G3IzsGWPwwYesSPaUqorQ9mgNxglWMSAw6e9XWaUf0OM8aUbvza-ru1Kc4vz4QSnYvGW37a4fHCXyPC1zHneeF57od3AgQHEJHNBBMVhVw4C6CFbWqExVgVbFaE1TK2MqNEOvPArVENRV1UBQRI3Rpoj2dUcCoBTKSFEi9g0GXUu8ey17zZSgKWx5L_MYtrAe_RQ9zTlQKv2SismOOa87wxODC4PLS5V8jstcbuH5LP3C4LISUl9Jhfd7qEAiw8uRk9uXY_OBYfvRfvLb-YuBfuEUhngkhu35-iae0krxMTNs37rCfbSf7nQ9dQ6EgO_pdv5yP0-8u3XvtewZtt2t4_8ai80O6584TXHXNVPikShO3xn5f779tPA3AAD__0gIgqs)
---
| | My Fellow Patriot, I’m reaching out because my research shows you are a strong voice for conservative values in your community.And today, I need to warn you about what’s at stake, **[**and tell you how you can help.**](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkMGOmzAQQL_G3IzsGWPwwYesSPaUqorQ9mgNxglWMSAw6e9XWaUf0OM8aUbvza-ru1Kc4vz4QSnYvGW37a4fHCXyPC1zHneeF57od3AgQHEJHNBBMVhVw4C6CFbWqExVgVbFaE1TK2MqNEOvPArVENRV1UBQRI3Rpoj2dUcCoBTKSFEi9g0GXUu8ey17zZSgKWx5L_MYtrAe_RQ9zTlQKv2SismOOa87wxODC4PLS5V8jstcbuH5LP3C4LISUl9Jhfd7qEAiw8uRk9uXY_OBYfvRfvLb-YuBfuEUhngkhu35-iae0krxMTNs37rCfbSf7nQ9dQ6EgO_pdv5yP0-8u3XvtewZtt2t4_8ai80O6584TXHXNVPikShO3xn5f779tPA3AAD__0gIgqs)** Do you remember the 2002 election? Republicans had won the House, Senate, and White House for the first time since Eisenhower.**But by 2008, Democrats had regained control and unleashed Obama’s radical agenda.** The opportunity for lasting conservative change had been wasted. Now, the results of the 2024 election have given us the chance to undo the damage of Biden and Harris. But if we don’t demand action from Republicans, _this victory could slip through our fingers just like it did in 2008._ **[You can take action today by partnering with AMAC Action, the most influential group in America when it comes to standing up for the values of conservative seniors!](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkMGOmzAQQL_G3IzsGWPwwYesSPaUqorQ9mgNxglWMSAw6e9XWaUf0OM8aUbvza-ru1Kc4vz4QSnYvGW37a4fHCXyPC1zHneeF57od3AgQHEJHNBBMVhVw4C6CFbWqExVgVbFaE1TK2MqNEOvPArVENRV1UBQRI3Rpoj2dUcCoBTKSFEi9g0GXUu8ey17zZSgKWx5L_MYtrAe_RQ9zTlQKv2SismOOa87wxODC4PLS5V8jstcbuH5LP3C4LISUl9Jhfd7qEAiw8uRk9uXY_OBYfvRfvLb-YuBfuEUhngkhu35-iae0krxMTNs37rCfbSf7nQ9dQ6EgO_pdv5yP0-8u3XvtewZtt2t4_8ai80O6584TXHXNVPikShO3xn5f779tPA3AAD__0gIgqs)** My friend, it’s simple: The Democrats work as a cohesive unit that bands together to push their agenda forward. But too many Republicans in Congress are content to sit on the sidelines.Donald Trump has already hit the ground running with stellar cabinet picks and a vision for;
---
| |
* Lowering inflation and taxes
* Saving Medicare and social security from insolvency
* Protecting our children and grandchildren from woke left-wing ideologies
* Protecting our constitutional freedoms
* Keeping America safe and strong
* Securing our election

---
And so much more. **But none of this happens without the Republican majorities in congress getting their act together – and no one is in a better position to whip them into shape than AMAC Action.** Remember, Donald Trump’s first term was undermined at every turn not just by the radical left, but by weak RINOs. name: Read Immediately - From Team Scalise
subject: ATTACHED: Our Final Memo of 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We’d be remiss if we didn’t share this information with you before 2024 is over and done with.

| |
---
| | | Friend - we'd be remiss if we didn't share this information with you before we close the books for 2024.

Here's the gist:

Our Conservative House Majority could be on the precipice of disaster. Three NEW Special Elections are around the corner and we're running out of time to set Republicans up for success in the new year.

_We just released our FINAL memo of 2024 and need you to read it immediately. We attached it below:_

---
FROM: House Republicans
TO: Concerned American Patriots
RE: Our Final Memo of 2024
* * *

Fellow Patriot -

NEW Special Elections were just announced in _FL-01_ for Matt Gaetz's seat, in _FL-06_ for Mike Waltz's seat, and in _NY-21_ for Elise Stefanik's seat.

But after the most expensive election in HISTORY, our campaign accounts are dangerously low. **It was expensive to defeat the Democrat Machine and deliver a Conservative House Majority for President Trump AND the American People.**

Right now we're short on funds to flood these districts with positive ads, volunteers, and doorknockers to help win these Special Elections decisively.
| | [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4GVeNoa2wVvP6qyFpiN54w~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS9j- "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ")
---

Now that the dust has settled, it's official that House Republicans hold a razor-thin Majority. The margins couldn't be closer.

That means if the Democrats manage to win these Special Elections in Florida and New York, we might as well kiss our Conservative Majority - and our Republican Trifecta along with it - goodbye.

That's not all...

These Special Elections will be our first major test of 2025. And if we fail, the consequences could be unthinkable. Losing our House Majority could put President Trump's entire legislative agenda at risk!

So we're reaching out to every grassroots Conservative for help to replenish our campaign accounts before our End-of-Year deadline on 12/31/2024.
| [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4GVeNoa2wVvP6qyFpiN54w~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS9j- "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ")
---

Every contribution will help Republicans refuel before the new year and help us make key budgetary decisions ahead of these three Special Elections. _That 's how we'll save our fragile House Majority._

**Everything we 've fought so hard for could be in jeopardy without your help.**

So we're pleading with you to help House Republicans with one FINAL wave of support before our End-of-Year deadline.
| [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4GVeNoa2wVvP6qyFpiN54w~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS9j- "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ")
---

Thanks for all you do,
House Republicans

---
| |
* * *

---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/sc9_nUZUg6l2SvxBEq3wfA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS9j-P0TUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvbWwtc3VydmV5LWZvb3Rlci8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIyX1BBLUNCMS4xMTM1NzFfdDE1ODg5ODYtMTc1NiZleF90aWQ9MjAyNDEyMjJfUEEtQ0IxLjExMzU3MV90MTU4ODk4Ni0xNzU2JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXR2LWNiLTIwMjQxMjIzJnh1bnY9dHYtY2ItMjAyNDEyMjNXA3NwY0IKZ2XYQGlnuR8yoVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~ "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_

| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XpcESlNtW_BHQcHjB019jA~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=259ec4f29a5e417ba0c32c957d47594a&_e=QeVHhpDhTTi69YADjbSupMJG5ZG3vbGwHBH46n49UEjR-epVmPR4a6ZG6hesYUh_fLtu2YFG1tTp40wEr5WY0ZKQ-U6MY9yzBkvhqDjcnS-37JbuWBt4NOHvlpw_VZt69VjpuU8k1MNAz7l5qcEuHlKDKOLAEaJrjDH5f1VbpsHVssbR9Cdqmjq7ywUurlrh2szOcft4b40izZ_Bpq3JUlWZzOeSf8IOc-MSA3sHldbwsfqjkuVga-acYfQBePlP3uKtK1XovUNCk5wvAwIrKWsl8HNIx3BEqESJyLC2ciuKpbZ5gZnjAQgDp8RT7wADZL8kkNEmm6KdYRtRoFg6cEe3gJKZbTa1w8K_fMaDt2WaXsqwTpoXkvWiNjovqCsTY3W9n_qpp-nSP_95pcyTluYmHEzORCK67pj69M4Jvlw%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

_" Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." _

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=259ec4f29a5e417ba0c32c957d47594a&_e=QeVHhpDhTTi69YADjbSupMJG5ZG3vbGwHBH46n49UEjR-epVmPR4a6ZG6hesYUh_fLtu2YFG1tTp40wEr5WY0ZKQ-U6MY9yzBkvhqDjcnS-37JbuWBt4NOHvlpw_VZt69VjpuU8k1MNAz7l5qcEuHlKDKOLAEaJrjDH5f1VbpsHVssbR9Cdqmjq7ywUurlrh2szOcft4b40izZ_Bpq3JUlWZzOeSf8IOc-MSA3sHldbwsfqjkuVga-acYfQBePlP3uKtK1XovUNCk5wvAwIrKcvrvGi7FSkXc2O84wyGVzf9_HeUs4rn6vYHJXazmLQLWakgLcwA90W_25bG_RNKS-XvwVRnYQLd1pCXiG7ywczlkT6m57-ccHXAC7AgzgvXt8ImgPxkp8P9U365Npq_jWsz0uKrZgJIy8w2gs3VbZ0%3D)
**You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ by clicking on the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=259ec4f29a5e417ba0c32c957d47594a&_e=QeVHhpDhTTi69YADjbSupMJG5ZG3vbGwHBH46n49UEjR-epVmPR4a6ZG6hesYUh_fLtu2YFG1tTp40wEr5WY0ZKQ-U6MY9yzBkvhqDjcnS-37JbuWBt4NOHvlpw_VZt69VjpuU8k1MNAz7l5qcEuHlKDKOLAEaJrjDH5f1VbpsHVssbR9Cdqmjq7ywUurlrh2szOcft4b40izZ_Bpq3JUlWZzOeSf8IOc-MSA3sHldbwsfqjkuVga-acYfQBePlP3uKtK1XovUNCk5wvAwIrKZe5fubGQCvttW7ssofn641cD5-Fzjd4VWobiuNfKPBcurEuyrpd78OEG253ycBPqaIZK2W023n2v6I0Vq8XuUWxCSiDwlEXNw9sPek5vUXV2n5sfD_1nGAWP3g5rDzxwImLDNRhgvezHOgBESTBw7Q%3D)

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Merry Christmas to you and yours,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Freedom Nation Today
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=259ec4f29a5e417ba0c32c957d47594a&_t=tICeLLnumhVJUhMnhkR4bWW5JH86Rb-sTURB7hzSc3s44MSY7SKrMfaVWMKphWcycTrb0FKU8_YL4vvSjoviBnhiWVPLSdac3_Rj49irqta9nO-yKND1od16l8fe6KMVFhzAbWOs2QXZdKcRH0TKX_PSmcoDEgnKUAuZSXXjOTA%3D)

Friend,

If you thought President Trump’s victory was big, wait till you hear about what we accomplished for liberty!

The _red wave_ may have been impressive, but the _liberty wave_ was even more impressive, thanks to Young Americans for Liberty’s Operation Win at the Door and dedicated activists like Sam.

Let me tell you about Sam Farrington.

**Sam Farrington puts the _Young_ in Young Americans for Liberty.**
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acac3fb6a5f14f218078bf5b9b1717a7&_e=ouFAvBI4Mahy1YHP7i0aGCGWxnvqCZIFM56jqimZGVv9jL6vpYMne_KPayreOSdtklu4IgQSSlznuCVL-F_RfBZVQoEDgI-V4xHeviLHLvSXkfgViSjnPx74cHh2nONdFiuZDMQ7rMwN9g_VFY_Y0CKb12DHsMu6hfL61nGWYc-BrS2bYMW-qk6tSqrrdmpHGR5pZAS2rK_cfLbOTZrH_2PeK_7gJBonF6vmbxm61JCbq87eEWuNu60GcMQCuaqJPT3Gn_lGALU3lUbxpRf9HPRzpGw2f1bRqAPQgKvcm1YgId_4kCff3RPsNySB0parHsA2YHkYqR3mHIfPhH1d0Q%3D%3D)
Sam took out a four-term Democratic incumbent with the help of YAL-trained student doorknockers. He will be one of the youngest state representatives in the country.

Not only will he be serving in Concord, but Sam is currently a junior at the University of New Hampshire, where he is actively engaged in YAL's Student Rights Campaign, working to legalize campus carry.

Sam represents exactly how Young Americans for Liberty is creating a new generation of pro-liberty leaders and activists.

Thanks to the thousands of other OWD-recruited activists, liberty candidates outperformed President Trump in swing states, even topping the Republican wave in places like Minnesota, Maine, and New Hampshire.

[Please click here to help YAL scale Operation Win at the Door’s victories and defend freedom in every corner of the country. >>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acac3fb6a5f14f218078bf5b9b1717a7&_e=ouFAvBI4Mahy1YHP7i0aGCGWxnvqCZIFM56jqimZGVv9jL6vpYMne_KPayreOSdtklu4IgQSSlznuCVL-F_RfBZVQoEDgI-V4xHeviLHLvSXkfgViSjnPx74cHh2nONdFiuZDMQ7rMwN9g_VFY_Y0CKb12DHsMu6hfL61nGWYc-381DH1j-Sh1PtgV2DrjpIX2Zs9vU6U_TCvXyF7ly0_vVBQ01oJroKUKUHMK6X-5UQlyO_FP2KWGIgEadvXQWN2fgt_11yKygD3cPWqufptkA97SPAMEZUwb6MjEG1KjzhX5uOkt5mdM9ZH1q_r_SAs90aAbTjxjXDgwczZV3Ecg%3D%3D)

Operation Win at the Door remains the largest and most effective door-to-door program in the country.

OWD-trained students achieved the goal of flipping and defending state legislatures.

Not a single state flipped blue.

Liberty candidates gained ground in these crucial states, proving that grassroots action works.

**Here are just a few highlights:**
* In Minnesota, the Democrat majority in the State House is over, and it’s on the verge of flipping toward liberty!

* In Maine, Laurel Libby, one of Young Americans for Liberty’s rising stars, defended her seat for her third term.

* In Texas, Shelley Luther, who was arrested for refusing to shut down her salon during the COVID lockdown in 2020, won a seat in the Texas State House.

**In total, Operation Win at the Door-recruited activists helped flip 36 blue seats and ousted 23 Democrat incumbents!**

Young Americans for Liberty now has _over 400 liberty legislators in its coalition_!

Now, the mission is to scale our operation and create even more Liberty Lighthouse states by electing liberty legislators and passing pro-liberty legislation.

Every dollar raised fuels our proven grassroots strategy, which turns razor-thin margins into decisive wins for liberty.

[By donating today, you can help YAL continue to spread a pro-liberty message as we take on crucial battles, district by district, to get pro-liberty legislation passed all across the country!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=acac3fb6a5f14f218078bf5b9b1717a7&_e=ouFAvBI4Mahy1YHP7i0aGCGWxnvqCZIFM56jqimZGVv9jL6vpYMne_KPayreOSdtklu4IgQSSlznuCVL-F_RfBZVQoEDgI-V4xHeviLHLvSXkfgViSjnPx74cHh2nONdFiuZDMQ7rMwN9g_VFY_Y0CKb12DHsMu6hfL61nGWYc-yOAkUpW2PFTxSAJeDiTiF3vcoaFJlri_gNEgp7lSUO_OuT-7sBAm2qaLczYCOKmwEBO-0w-wjbmqIUtotpYKra-Rsgi0OrcLsQW41-eVNspJWXW6oSrHYH3ErE9tEy2Ue01Q8g1Q5PuR7-mkkP1j_I9_kZNFKt7WT18gOOlEHgw%3D%3D)

Our vision is to build a bench of principled leaders who will champion pro-liberty policies at every level.

**Through the Hazlitt Coalition, we’ve grown to over 400 pro-liberty legislators across the country — 10 times the number we had in 2018!**

These champions have passed over 750 pro-liberty laws since then, including:
* Constitutional Carry in Texas
* Property Tax Relief in North Dakota
* School Choice in Arizona
* Free Speech Protections on college campuses in Indiana

These victories are possible because of supporters like you.

Now, it’s your turn to step up.

clean_body: Operation Win at the Door remains the largest and most effective door-to-door program in the country. | | | Friend, If you thought President Trump’s victory was big, wait till you hear about what we accomplished for liberty! The red wave may have been impressive, but the liberty wave was even more impressive, thanks to Young Americans for Liberty’s Operation Win at the Door and dedicated activists like Sam. Let me tell you about Sam Farrington. Sam Farrington puts the Young in Young Americans for Liberty. Sam took out a four-term Democratic incumbent with the help of YAL-trained student doorknockers. He will be one of the youngest state representatives in the country. Not only will he be serving in Concord, but Sam is currently a junior at the University of New Hampshire, where he is actively engaged in YAL's Student Rights Campaign, working to legalize campus carry. Sam represents exactly how Young Americans for Liberty is creating a new generation of pro-liberty leaders and activists. Thanks to the thousands of other OWD-recruited activists, liberty candidates outperformed President Trump in swing states, even topping the Republican wave in places like Minnesota, Maine, and New Hampshire. Operation Win at the Door remains the largest and most effective door-to-door program in the country. OWD-trained students achieved the goal of flipping and defending state legislatures. Not a single state flipped blue. Liberty candidates gained ground in these crucial states, proving that grassroots action works. Here are just a few highlights: In Minnesota, the Democrat majority in the State House is over, and it’s on the verge of flipping toward liberty! In Maine, Laurel Libby, one of Young Americans for Liberty’s rising stars, defended her seat for her third term. In Texas, Shelley Luther, who was arrested for refusing to shut down her salon during the COVID lockdown in 2020, won a seat in the Texas State House. In total, Operation Win at the Door-recruited activists helped flip 36 blue seats and ousted 23 Democrat incumbents! Young Americans for Liberty now has over 400 liberty legislators in its coalition! Now, the mission is to scale our operation and create even more Liberty Lighthouse states by electing liberty legislators and passing pro-liberty legislation. Every dollar raised fuels our proven grassroots strategy, which turns razor-thin margins into decisive wins for liberty. Our vision is to build a bench of principled leaders who will champion pro-liberty policies at every level. Through the Hazlitt Coalition, we’ve grown to over 400 pro-liberty legislators across the country — 10 times the number we had in 2018! These champions have passed over 750 pro-liberty laws since then, including: Constitutional Carry in Texas Property Tax Relief in North Dakota School Choice in Arizona Free Speech Protections on college campuses in Indiana These victories are possible because of supporters like you. Now, it’s your turn to step up. Please chip in today to ensure we can create more Liberty Lighthouse states and train a new generation of activists to defend our values. For Liberty, | | | Jeff Frazee** | Founder & CEO Email: jeff@yalibertyorg ---|--- "...we mutually pledge to each other our Lives, our Fortunes, and our sacred Honor." Young Americans for Liberty, Inc. is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. name: Troy Downing
subject: The voice of reason
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I need your help shaping the Republican agenda in 2025

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning._8KSCLI7tJGua_tyPcEA)
---
| | Peter,

Congress needs a voice of reason, especially regarding **fiscal responsibility**. I’m prepared to be that voice.

As Montana’s State Auditor, I was the watchdog for state finances and government operations. My responsibility was to ensure that public funds were used _**efficiently, lawfully, and transparently**_ — something Washington lacks.

Our government has irresponsibly spent our money for decades, leaving us over $36 trillion in debt. This is unacceptable, unsustainable, and unfair to future generations—and I’m ready to end it. As soon as I take my seat in Congress, I will work on eliminating the deficit and cutting the debt.

[**But I can’t do it without your help, Peter. Will you take 5 minutes to help me shape the agenda by taking my Fiscal Responsibility Survey?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-Zww)
---
| | [ TAKE MY SURVEY](https://trk.emails.troydowning._HQzh-ZvFFP-vw)
---
[ SUBMIT YOUR ANSWERS HERE](https://trk.emails.troydowning._rmAw)
---
| | Thank you for your role in helping us reshape Washington for the better!

Best,

**Good morning!** On this day in 1949, [Scott and White Memorial Hospital](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOhCAUheGngU4D94JIQbGN3Wy7pQFBJUGZIBnHt984_VR_db7k_D3Gh40p7suv3YKp7zmPwEA0HBrA0duYrlFQbxzzmtNguEKhJUrZ09Vo0VnLUTjHg0Su_OxEJ9mEsxa2nzyN5sY4AHKOgKp1wHTfd4oxdFpyRwQLPtZc2rqGGt72mNOVX6G0U95oMmutz4PgD4GBwHCeZ1uP1eY9xT20uSwEhs-q8fZq3HWHwBD2Wu5KRYvxzzOmFI9OEcGWzcb0sevXsy8D_wEAAP__vstWEg) in Temple became a nonprofit hospital foundation. In 2013, it merged with Baylor Health Care System to form the largest nonprofit healthcare system in Texas. Christmas and Hanukkah are only a few days away, and _The Texas Flyover_ will be adjusting its coverage a bit so that our team members can spend time with their families. Beginning Christmas Day, we’ll be publishing shorter editions until the weekend and then be back on Monday with our regular publication. Today's sponsor is the [Voice of Martyrs](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd7HgAsYUFE9v11Wy7ZYWNpf4SsREhsTJ36-8_bajmTnS-b6MF0-J1uuXv6Grr5hH4KBOAk4gx-ApvUfVBDfxYEWDThiprJZa983iADsfDFjTddbCFPpg-lmrqLXC6LluyB1nAkAKIUGadgJu-74znMvJajExxTFQzVtbF6z48iWmd37i1s751iS31HovTP5jMDAY9n1v77gVnB-V8np0jnTBNXqqC5WYt4lCwJXBcKVYj5kcxpIf24zjnAMy-fF5Fl1_BvW_2Vy475QSlc4wxa83T-kXXP808XTwEwAA__84Hl_g), who are helping provide aid to Christians in hostile territories.

## Drunk Driver Plows Through Killeen Mall
A Kempner man [drove his vehicle through the Killeen Mall](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp8Gd1gwQGwKitu4y223tPgZJ7PBOMJsnLz9Kum3_vSdI52v83z2lKlc_vsVXXsu2wwCNJfAQc3JU37NuksuiGRlh04OSlujjBm7q4O4yKBxsMakKEdUPproLdjFYpD61JF7wySAklKBGvoAwo7jaRBCBWtkYFpgorbVvl2x4dPvS35tD6x93NYuu2tr952pfwwmBtNxHP3t6ct7ZDAVPHYG0-fGYKLy_VMJd17xvtWGifulYeVUIiUsjfvGb5QzYuGrz5nB1FWX7gflTPtpYFpcVk_5o25_tng4-A0AAP__mvFiPw) Saturday evening, injuring five people before police fatally shot him. John Darrel Schultz, 53, was [identified as the driver](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OszAQAJ_GdEbrtQlQuPgaunztlWixl-DL8iNwQvL2p1x_9Uij0Xxd-yslScvtP83s82tcewR02qBG20dK8u5dEf0AsTUFe1Nb11a2qppi8jXVg2MeI7JtwhjZYGsAKxicawiwSP4jM4jWGIu2LgeEtmkuNYAd2soMygHHlNe9zBNnftExynt98l6GdS7ETzlvh7L_FHYKu_M8y3vgJT8_WGFHe05BWGG38Hko7GQNJAq7bZUUWIeJDta8xEPfkwjzomcS0fNDctqEdVq-H3viQ--8rXvmqLCrAHQI7Aw3pONY1doFJt2ADRpbQBpHYBraYvdxO5NIOi61cnCbKclvd_5z5NPjTwAAAP__-WB06A) of the black truck that crashed through the JCPenney entrance, traveling several hundred yards inside the mall before he was stopped. He was being pursued by a Department of Public Safety (DPS) trooper on suspicion of driving while intoxicated. Five people, ranging in age from 6 to 75, sustained injuries and were treated at local hospitals. The Texas Rangers are investigating the incident. The mall will be closed until further notice. “ _Turning around and seeing the crowd, then trying to grab my son in a sea of people. That was insane, and it keeps replaying in my head_ ,” [said a shopper](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuOnjAQBeCngW5--cK1cJGGbtOmRGMzgLWDjWzvv_D2EVHaLUfz6Ujn_PmYP9CzD9tvPMiUa42zEqoBqUDpeUHP99zUi7FiGWVNRva6GVvdtkO9G5TDsgrpOjUo2VFr21W32NlhdM04NLb25gmTSmkptdL9yyoxDkPXC6Ht2EpbNYIWX2J6lZ0KXZhXvuOb0svFo2azl3LmSv-q1FSp6fO63s-jUlOg71ypiaNDhv-HD3DHrwSB_LbbmPYYl8f4lcBhALdj2Ah8yAVD4Rs-PTNRgAOZIe_xPCllSOTiVygPj8U7OOJBoWTAtVAChBULMpyRvaMHZaqTWc5vz-xz11eN2A70_K9B-XHSt1F_AwAA___iInzQ).
## Rep. Kay Granger Living in Retirement Home
Outgoing U.S. Rep. Kay Granger (R-Fort Worth) is living in a dementia care facility, a [local newspaper reported Friday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMZsj-wwYDx66sKVrR3RwB1g1ENluQt6-onv3n75P-n_dhzuGGPblEzf25ZyPARTUUoMEMxCG-B7qivyoyOmKvbamdo1pmq5aPbVzTV3bApGzTTM7Np21YIDURG6aq-CvMQ1gtDZg7G0E5bqutUqZ0TV6FLViCuVIt7Jy4RPzHN_Hk9NtOrYq-rWURxbmQ0AvoCeMETOfj8Q5X0JAXzAl3IuAns8p_uTwZPlaObEMWU7Hvlz2dWy4y298yyXhvnAS0FfJ0-MVYgy5taJWy4Yh_t2Wfzs8PfwGAAD__yZ7YW4). The congresswoman’s whereabouts have been in question since her last vote in July, sparking debate about the age of elected officials. Granger, 81, announced her retirement in November of last year, and current State Rep. Craig Goldman was [elected to fill her seat](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DuO7CAQheHV4AwLCuNHQHATsr7phBYMhY0GmxZUv3Y_6s5nA985-r8u68WlnM7tvzvQ0DOWFQQMXAIHtQaX8msdumC8CIvs0MhJDYtWWs_dbnDRUnipYY5xGVV0gwweZh3R6-jj2CXzxiSAklKBmnoPYpnncRJC-UVLzwaBIVGpPe1I-HQt5le5Y-2_y9FlsxNdG1P_GFgGNpZKj1Jpr3gtlfpSNwb2PcHASsnACs3AbiWHw518v53EG-IP36o7N6yNvwX-Ibir6Pit8b3cGvKGjhjYrppwfaScUxsnNojtcCl_vtCfce4GfgMAAP__rjVmtQ). Her last vote was cast on July 24 on an amendment to a measure to fund the EPA. After constituents asked questions about Granger’s position on the recently passed federal spending bill, the _Dallas Express_ tried to contact Granger’s office, but it had closed before Thanksgiving. The newspaper followed up on a tip to confirm that Granger [moved into an assisted living facility](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOwyAQAL_G7rBgMcEUFNeky7VXWjw29sr4IUBx_PenXH_9aDSan8f4cJRom77dira-n_sIHHomgIEco6N0jX0brefRiBat0LI3Sio1tLOVgqOKSgVvAjdOaC8DDMHo2HscILRkPzIBIIWQIHXngZthuGnOpTdK-KbnGKnuuaszVny78kzX_sLchX1tk51rPUojvxq4N3A_z7Pb8Cwn4vIBGrgv7mJTdtuEmWU89lzZSqXQNrGIK26VHHu6QInqxcrh8lKYd2FJrswMOO-10W228TgpJSo33fR8Wh2lv4D675GXhd8AAAD__wLrZGY) after she was found wandering a local neighborhood in a confused state. The revelation has elicited frustration from Granger’s constituents and [criticism from pundits and elected officials](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOtCAUhZ8GOwxcVLSg-Bu7-dstzUWuSBZlAmScefuN229zcpKTfCf5vh7LA0MMp_-PB5n63tICAjougYNaHIb4WbrGGSvcJBsyUqtu6lXfj81uNMjRKrfSBpJ6IXU_4AC4rUMnANE1wdwwCaCkVKB0a0FM4zhoIZSdemlZJ8iFmnJbd6r0xrLFT3pRbtd0NNHstT4LU_8YzAzm67pafIdU7pXBfMMZzBLufsc3frjPeHrKPFMNmQ46K9_TQXxNp89UCkdP3JHFSk027nmFGEMZNOuEPzDE3-f6p4qXgZ8AAAD__-1MX40) who contend that politicians are often too reluctant to leave office when they can no longer perform their duties. Granger was first elected to Congress in 1997, becoming the first Republican woman to represent Texas in the U.S. House. She was also the first woman from her party to chair the House Appropriations Committee, a post she held from January 2023 to April of this year.
## 9.1 Million Texans Traveling for Christmas
According to projections from AAA Texas, 9.1 million Texans [plan to travel 50 miles or more](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAYhJ8GOwz84KoFxTV0e-2VBuF3IYeyAbKsb39x-2tnMpOZ7-e-3E2I4Xh8mx1VfW9pAQaScqAgFmdCPBfZObUyN_MOFR-FnAcxDFPnldhuViLOEqyZGCAbJdrNSmclExPHLqirjAMIzgWIsV-BzdN0GxkT6zzwlUiGLtSU--qx4tuULZ7phbm3ae-i8rU-CxFfBDQB3Vrrf9_muEwC-sBWCOhPjID2qdHdHCe9hKNQk5HWbF543aNbyrR6pD7F4MxZaPWhUIcW9xUzAd1l5Z4txBjKbSSSPXYT4mdG_ZfLS8FfAAAA__9dO2aa) between Dec. 21 and Jan. 1. That figure is 2.2% more than last year but still 3.9% lower than the last pre-COVID-19 holiday travel season. Of those 9.1 million Texans traveling for the holidays, [8.5 million are traveling by car](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQBb8GukX2GgMuXFxDl2uvRGu8BEsGR8YJ4e9Puf7q9zQazc9tulGIYb9_08a2vJc0ocAWJAKqyVOI19TW3jrhjazZyl61Riuth3q1wjHKTi3tbIwXhgZnvFZD77HTi-51HewHJhGVlApV3zgUZhi6XgjljJauagX7UFJuysqF33Qs8Uovzs2ctjratZRHpb4qHCscyxuIqAmPfKSlnJT586pw3Pk8KhyJCDLPKXvYn5vjDGmBNcXg6YKS6cWR8wE7lZD2M3iGM8QIc0wHQ3oWKCvDxZTrbP3js4Wj66tW3DcK8c-o_JvoZfE3AAD__6QLavM), 413,000 are flying, and 268,000 are using another form of transit. Air travel is up 8% over last year. AAA Texas Vice President Galen Grillo said that with Christmas falling on a Wednesday, many families are flying to international destinations or going on a cruise in addition to taking road trips. For Texans driving to their Christmas destinations, the [statewide average price](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7Fq7DAQheGnkbo1mhnJtgoVFy7uNlUg6czYkmyBHBtLbHbfPjh92sPhg__jPt455fS1vPEWXH3GfUSF-gZ4Qxo9p_watfRuUt6CDA460taQMb1cHVqAGHvfMgRlLUaLZAx1vbJ61maWyV0YIBIAIXXNhMr2fdspRZM1MAmtgk91P5u6hhqeXGJ-7Y9wNvO-yezWWo8i6J_AQeCwcDnONIfSMPP1uGYaSuUaBP1__5Sn88d3yjmVthNaLRun_EvVP9seDn8CAAD__0rmTqY) for gas is $2.65 per gallon, about four cents lower than last year.

His mission? To meet the courageous men and women who have faced persecution for their unwavering faith in Christ. Todd has traveled far and wide to hear their powerful stories firsthand and to bring their voices to the world, sharing their extraordinary testimonies of faith and resilience. In his new book, _When Faith Is Forbidden: 40 Days on the Frontlines with Persecuted Christians_ , Todd invites you to meet these bold believers. Each stop on this journey will challenge you to reflect on your own walk with Christ along the sometimes-difficult path toward our heavenly home. Through their incredible stories of courageous faith, we pray you will be inspired to a deeper, bolder walk with Christ. This compelling book is free for you with any gift—simply [request your copy today](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd7HgAsYUFE9v11Wy7ZYWNpf4SsREhsTJ36-8_bajmTnS-b6MF0-J1uuXv6Grr5hH4KBOAk4gx-ApvUfVBDfxYEWDThiprJZa983iADsfDFjTddbCFPpg-lmrqLXC6LluyB1nAkAKIUGadgJu-74znMvJajExxTFQzVtbF6z48iWmd37i1s751iS31HovTP5jMDAY9n1v77gVnB-V8np0jnTBNXqqC5WYt4lCwJXBcKVYj5kcxpIf24zjnAMy-fF5Fl1_BvW_2Vy475QSlc4wxa83T-kXXP808XTwEwAA__84Hl_g)!

clean_body: A Kempner man Saturday evening, injuring five people before police fatally shot him. | | | | | | Monday, December 23, 2024 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1949, in Temple became a nonprofit hospital foundation. In 2013, it merged with Baylor Health Care System to form the largest nonprofit healthcare system in Texas. Christmas and Hanukkah are only a few days away, and The Texas Flyover will be adjusting its coverage a bit so that our team members can spend time with their families. Beginning Christmas Day, we’ll be publishing shorter editions until the weekend and then be back on Monday with our regular publication. Today's sponsor is the , who are helping provide aid to Christians in hostile territories. Abilene 🌦️ 70/55° | Amarillo ☁️ 55/35° | Austin ☁️ 74/57° | Brownsville 🌦️ 79/66° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 79/65° | DFW 🌦️ 65/49° | El Paso ⛅ 69/37° | Houston 🌦️ 71/54° | Laredo 🌦️ 80/63° | Lubbock 🌥️ 67/38° | Midland 🌧️ 69/45° | San Antonio ☁️ 75/60° | Tyler ☁️ 64/44° | Waco 🌦️ 68/52° | Drunk Driver Plows Through Killeen Mall A Kempner man Saturday evening, injuring five people before police fatally shot him. John Darrel Schultz, 53, was of the black truck that crashed through the JCPenney entrance, traveling several hundred yards inside the mall before he was stopped. He was being pursued by a Department of Public Safety (DPS) trooper on suspicion of driving while intoxicated. Five people, ranging in age from 6 to 75, sustained injuries and were treated at local hospitals. The Texas Rangers are investigating the incident. The mall will be closed until further notice. “ Turning around and seeing the crowd, then trying to grab my son in a sea of people. That was insane, and it keeps replaying in my head ,” . Rep. Kay Granger Living in Retirement Home Outgoing U.S. Rep. Kay Granger (R-Fort Worth) is living in a dementia care facility, a . The congresswoman’s whereabouts have been in question since her last vote in July, sparking debate about the age of elected officials. Granger, 81, announced her retirement in November of last year, and current State Rep. Craig Goldman was . Her last vote was cast on July 24 on an amendment to a measure to fund the EPA. After constituents asked questions about Granger’s position on the recently passed federal spending bill, the Dallas Express tried to contact Granger’s office, but it had closed before Thanksgiving. The newspaper followed up on a tip to confirm that Granger after she was found wandering a local neighborhood in a confused state. The revelation has elicited frustration from Granger’s constituents and who contend that politicians are often too reluctant to leave office when they can no longer perform their duties. Granger was first elected to Congress in 1997, becoming the first Republican woman to represent Texas in the U.S. House. She was also the first woman from her party to chair the House Appropriations Committee, a post she held from January 2023 to April of this year. 9.1 Million Texans Traveling for Christmas According to projections from AAA Texas, 9.1 million Texans between Dec. 21 and Jan. 1. That figure is 2.2% more than last year but still 3.9% lower than the last pre-COVID-19 holiday travel season. Of those 9.1 million Texans traveling for the holidays, , 413,000 are flying, and 268,000 are using another form of transit. Air travel is up 8% over last year. AAA Texas Vice President Galen Grillo said that with Christmas falling on a Wednesday, many families are flying to international destinations or going on a cruise in addition to taking road trips. For Texans driving to their Christmas destinations, the for gas is $2.65 per gallon, about four cents lower than last year. | For 25 years, Todd Nettleton, the host of VOM Radio, has ventured into some of the world’s most hostile and restricted nations. His mission? To meet the courageous men and women who have faced persecution for their unwavering faith in Christ. Todd has traveled far and wide to hear their powerful stories firsthand and to bring their voices to the world, sharing their extraordinary testimonies of faith and resilience. In his new book, When Faith Is Forbidden: 40 Days on the Frontlines with Persecuted Christians , Todd invites you to meet these bold believers. Each stop on this journey will challenge you to reflect on your own walk with Christ along the sometimes-difficult path toward our heavenly home. Through their incredible stories of courageous faith, we pray you will be inspired to a deeper, bolder walk with Christ. This compelling book is free for you with any gift—simply ! | ➤ Houston billionaire Tilman Fertitta has been nominated by President-elect Donald Trump to be the next U.S. ambassador to Italy. This follows earlier reports that the Houston Rockets owner was being considered for the post. () ➤ Kleberg County: A French bulldog named Chula was reunited with her family after authorities discovered her traveling with suspects carrying more than $250,000 in cash, which was determined to have been obtained through illegal activity. () ➤ San Antonio: The University of Texas at San Antonio received permission from the Texas Historical Commission to demolish the downtown Institute of Texan Cultures building, a State Antiquities Landmark, to redevelop and expand its Hemisfair campus. () ➤ Van Zandt County: Residents have filed a lawsuit seeking to block the construction of a 100 MW lithium battery energy storage facility, citing concerns over fire and environmental contamination risks. () ➤ El Paso: Two men were arrested on charges of aggravated kidnapping after a nine-day ordeal in which they allegedly demanded $600,000 to release their captive. () ➤ Atascosa County: The San Miguel Electric Cooperative will receive a $1.4 billion grant from the U.S. Department of Agriculture to convert a coal-fired power plant into a solar power and battery storage facility. body:
U.S. forces shot down [one of its own planes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQBp_G7ohgwWAKimvS5dorrbVZ4j1hYxmSyG9_yvV_-emTRqP585geyJn352_cKLRUJpBghAIBeorI-ZpMH0MiAtI9BeW08YP20vRroGWco3RjRD8sycJAo0LvlXHJ0UCu5_ClKQCtlHZyvJFNs_PDrJyGEaPpjKTIrZy3v4X3tlLKV3nTeVvK1uewtnbUTv_q4N7BHY-dPvV7fcfZeMnUwX3jSFib-OBZxUUb7eJVxY7vSxycS6tiLa-2svADOg8RkfQsFUg12jktdrGW1GwT9WeIx4dz5mpdZ-RzQ87_TdpPZd4B_gUAAP__uGNlTg) over the Red Sea on Sunday, forcing the two Navy pilots on board to eject, with one sustaining minor injuries.

| | |

| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuhCAYAOCnge0M_KDowHBDGZp4S9NcN4PygzQohiNe7u2bdu8LfMl3H6fRxhT3cLMb6urzBAzkhcMFxORsTK9JUqc9IqCgqLkScmjFwCRdtWvRz7Nr-cK84KpXg-och7lzQ9e30tKofzUOIDgXivUNdn5WQztzJaC3ThLJ0MWaS_Od415X9OmVTyzNkjea9Frr8SDiSsAQMCGecQ_NM5fklrwvWPYml0DAHDYgAWM-b_fx7eP962po0e54xpTio1NEsrDZmP7U-t_y1PATAAD__1IDU2g) | |
# Monday, December 23, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1823, the beloved poem _A Visit from St. Nicholas_ —better known as '_Twas the Night Before Christmas_ —was first published anonymously in the _Troy Sentinel_. ([Read Poem](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6yAQAL8GuiDYxcYuKF5Dl9deaWGzYE44WDaJlb8_XfrrpprRfN2nu88lP9J_v5FtsU4gQd8U3ACn4HN5T5oHG4mAkJNVBvXY4Sg1X63WJg4kaZB9Tz5EXEYNGpEWFalTimf7a1MAqBQaOQjq42zGblYGYfBBMy0p5FYP8V3zo60Uy7u-6BBL3Xixa2v7yfAfA8fAXdcl0rPRY6YjiXokBm7xy0oMHO3PmYFTRmHHwO3pQ7e8-USnWNtW-GHDfuVS8tkbpmXafC6fTvvr-2XhJwAA__8BdVhA)) Christmas and Hanukkah are just a few days away, and _The Flyover_ will adjust its coverage this week so that our team can spend time with their families. Beginning Christmas Day, we’ll publish shorter editions until the weekend and then return on Monday with our regular schedule. Today, we’re sponsored by [World Concern](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuhCAYAOCnge0M_KDowHBDGZp4S9NcN4PygzQohiNe7u2bdu8LfMl3H6fRxhT3cLMb6urzBAzkhcMFxORsTK9JUqc9IqCgqLkScmjFwCRdtWvRz7Nr-cK84KpXg-och7lzQ9e30tKofzUOIDgXivUNdn5WQztzJaC3ThLJ0MWaS_Od415X9OmVTyzNkjea9Frr8SDiSsAQMCGecQ_NM5fklrwvWPYml0DAHDYgAWM-b_fx7eP962po0e54xpTio1NEsrDZmP7U-t_y1PATAAD__1IDU2g), a non-profit dedicated to helping Christian children in Somalia. Be sure to check them out in today’s edition.
|
---
## Friendly Fire Downs U.S. Plane
U.S. forces shot down [one of its own planes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHO4yAQBp_G7ohgwWAKimvS5dorrbVZ4j1hYxmSyG9_yvV_-emTRqP585geyJn352_cKLRUJpBghAIBeorI-ZpMH0MiAtI9BeW08YP20vRroGWco3RjRD8sycJAo0LvlXHJ0UCu5_ClKQCtlHZyvJFNs_PDrJyGEaPpjKTIrZy3v4X3tlLKV3nTeVvK1uewtnbUTv_q4N7BHY-dPvV7fcfZeMnUwX3jSFib-OBZxUUb7eJVxY7vSxycS6tiLa-2svADOg8RkfQsFUg12jktdrGW1GwT9WeIx4dz5mpdZ-RzQ87_TdpPZd4B_gUAAP__uGNlTg) over the Red Sea on Sunday, forcing the two Navy pilots on board to eject, with one sustaining minor injuries. The incident occurred as the U.S. was conducting airstrikes against [Iranian-backed Houthi rebels](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd0TmAiYpKJ705C7bbmlhcwl3RcACNpH_fuXtt5hqpDOj83lf7o4S5ceHe6LtoSwwguICOMjFO0rHogZvAyKgHNAKI9VNy9uohmhx084IAWID41EIJX1QQWqctPLbeh3InjQBIIWQZrxecAqruelVGAlX5xVTI3rqpV6-CuUeMaSjvLBetvIcko29743JfwxmBnOPGCmls2Mw7yXRdjCYPQbMDRnMetQwjYZ_N95iKb1xX96Zn9mTy8hPNK_oeUPHKfNQCbNPBw9UkVPeyGPu55qc-1oxMPk_7kO1fn9TStQmw9T4eDr6fTH0v4y9LPwEAAD__4g5bgA), highlighting the persistent risks in the Red Sea corridor as Houthi attacks on shipping continue. The downed plane had just taken off from the _USS Harry S. Truman_ aircraft carrier and was hit by friendly fire from the guided missile cruiser _USS Gettysburg_. It is not yet clear how the plane was [mistaken for enemy aircraft](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uhDAQBp8GukWwNn-FizTXXdqUyIfXx0bGRrbvHN4-In3a-aTRp_m6L3fNjv3zU--ksg0LtiihQ0CxGM3uXGRtlCVCEjWpbhRy7sXcynpTbT_MPVK_opa6m8Uoejk9xkmsq-1bMdSsLluHKLpOjO3U0GAf49w_ulHgpI2sZEuGc4jNd2CfN7LuDG-KzRr22qkt5yNV4qPCW4W3Ukpjw4-nkq79IiE6U-EtlwCvBF6_TzjYhZwgbSGDCcXD5YNIBhJp0MehI_kMNjJ5406wHAnYr2wu_Eqws-Os41lHZY7CznEaxkq2z12z-zuW_wv1VvgbAAD__yGvbWQ).
## Trump Targets Panama Canal
President-elect Donald Trump has threatened to [reclaim U.S. control of the Panama Canal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuxCAQRL8Gd1hmwce5oEjj7tKmtPZgOYgAWzY5y38fkT7N6EkjPY3m67E8MKZYXp-YyVS_LjCA4gI4yMVhTNeiOmc8EZDsyAgt1TTKaVBdMJMmP95GD96PE9zlaIGcV4oUeWk9ddE0mwCQQkg93Hu6-aeexqfQEu7oFFMDuVjXvf9eY6mBfLrWN-29XXOXTKh1O5j8YDAzmM_z7G152lYymJuawSygcYu6_-SNH3gdPBDP8RUqd5SxOL5hwYw8NG5-brFg4n2oOXW7cdsZU4rHTTM1vDLG9Deg_nfI28BvAAAA__-a02HI), citing “excessive” fees charged by Panama for its use. Speaking at a Turning Point USA event in Arizona, Trump warned Panama to honor what he called [moral and legal conditions of the canal’s 1999 transfer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3OozAQAJ_GdI7MGsehcHENXa69Ei14AZ_8g-wlUd7-lOu_eqQZaf485yeGGPL-GxM53soMCgbZgwQ9ewzxMw-ddxsRkO7I9VYPo9GjGrrDrcuKGvCu1t6QeaBWhhbcDK3ejl7ZLrivrQfQfa-tetzovi12NEtvNTzQD2JQ5AOXevtbQuaDtvgpL6q3taQuuoP5bEL_EjAJmPigI8T4ZQKmoyTK9G4CJvQp5NC4IoeSBUxGGbCjkVyvdMp27Ts1bvLEjAnlihmjXEhW4qtm8pKLvJpcS-ZaooCpq86f7xBjaHcrBrUnDP-7Hf_06OXgXwAAAP__nkBq4g) to Panamanian control. The canal, [a critical global trade route](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuhDAQAL8GOiP84FW4SEN3aVOixV7DRgtG2HeEv48uffrRaDRfj-kBxLQvn7ChzSFOqlZGSCWUnjwQ35MpvQ2ICnWJVnbaDI0ealOutpGtHJx3ThvjNJqmrTvoZgm17qHHviT7tkmltJS6q_sK2zB3QzPLTqsevClMjZ5yPKvvSHteMfAdX3hWLm4l2zXnIxX6o1BjocbruqoQf-Znoh1TejOFGo_IlMmlQo35fG6HCBwhJ0EeQTxFEic6BtpoX8QBO2wgHOzAwqM7CZPIkTmJECNTWvkWC7xQwAV3eVp_XMRMqe0KUy8bEP-V5f9Ovaz6DQAA__8qDm49) handling 14,000 ships annually, accounts for 2.5% of worldwide sea commerce, and Trump’s remarks suggest a possible shift in U.S. foreign policy.
## List: Satisfying vs. Reliable in Car Brands
New rankings of the [most satisfying and most reliable](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvgzAQBeBfYzYj-2wgDB66sKVrR3TG5-RaA5HtgvLvq7Rz16enp0_v4zpfkRNvt3dcydW4z6DASg0SzByQ03O2TXCRCMg05PRg7NiZUdnm7nq9oPK9BY9mRBNt16Eago_-QsYY27B7rWkAo7UZ1KWlPvph7LweDFwwWGEVBa57bj933uqdYnruB-V22dcmuXutjyLMm4BJwHSeZ3tw-ca04IMrJi71VRQwZdy-KMh1L1UWrFzik7ebPMpflCkx-kRywSx9xi0UyZt84QRMTXbhcXJKXPpBWHVbkdOvoP73yOHgJwAA__8gKmRh) car brands reveal that the two often aren't linked in consumers' minds. Rivian, BMW, and Tesla took the top three spots in the satisfaction rankings, while Japanese automakers took all the top six reliability spots, with Subaru, Lexus, and Toyota leading the way. Satisfaction indicates the likelihood of auto owners buying another car of the same make, while reliability is based on complex, proprietary calculations. Only Lexus broke the top five in both lists, which [you can see here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvgzAQBeBfYzYj-2wgDB66sKVrR3TG5-RaA5HtgvLvq7Rz16enp0_v4zpfkRNvt3dcydW4z6DASg0SzByQ03O2TXCRCMg05PRg7NiZUdnm7nq9oPK9BY9mRBNt16Eago_-QsYY27B7rWkAo7UZ1KWlPvph7LweDFwwWGEVBa57bj933uqdYnruB-V22dcmuXutjyLMm4BJwHSeZ3tw-ca04IMrJi71VRQwZdy-KMh1L1UWrFzik7ebPMpflCkx-kRywSx9xi0UyZt84QRMTXbhcXJKXPpBWHVbkdOvoP73yOHgJwAA__8gKmRh).

Kay Granger**(R-Texas), 81, was found in a memory care unit after being missing from Washington for six months. She is set to retire in January. | Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuhCAYAOCnge0M_KDowHBDGZp4S9NcN4PygzQohiNe7u2bdu8LfMl3H6fRxhT3cLMb6urzBAzkhcMFxORsTK9JUqc9IqCgqLkScmjFwCRdtWvRz7Nr-cK84KpXg-och7lzQ9e30tKofzUOIDgXivUNdn5WQztzJaC3ThLJ0MWaS_Od415X9OmVTyzNkjea9Frr8SDiSsAQMCGecQ_NM5fklrwvWPYml0DAHDYgAWM-b_fx7eP962po0e54xpTio1NEsrDZmP7U-t_y1PATAAD__1IDU2g) Somalia is facing a devastating combination of natural disasters, global conflicts, widespread poverty, and disease outbreaks. East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. **[Be Doers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuhCAYAOCnge0M_KDowHBDGZp4S9NcN4PygzQohiNe7u2bdu8LfMl3H6fRxhT3cLMb6urzBAzkhcMFxORsTK9JUqc9IqCgqLkScmjFwCRdtWvRz7Nr-cK84KpXg-och7lzQ9e30tKofzUOIDgXivUNdn5WQztzJaC3ThLJ0MWaS_Od415X9OmVTyzNkjea9Frr8SDiSsAQMCGecQ_NM5fklrwvWPYml0DAHDYgAWM-b_fx7eP962po0e54xpTio1NEsrDZmP7U-t_y1PATAAD__1IDU2g)** We’re asking the Flyover Community to join us in partnering with World Concern to help get emergency nutrition packs (a peanut paste fortified with nutrients), water, and hygiene products to those with the most need. Every $12 feeds a child for a month. [We’re matching the first $3,000; just give through this link.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuhCAYAOCnge0M_KDowHBDGZp4S9NcN4PygzQohiNe7u2bdu8LfMl3H6fRxhT3cLMb6urzBAzkhcMFxORsTK9JUqc9IqCgqLkScmjFwCRdtWvRz7Nr-cK84KpXg-och7lzQ9e30tKofzUOIDgXivUNdn5WQztzJaC3ThLJ0MWaS_Od415X9OmVTyzNkjea9Frr8SDiSsAQMCGecQ_NM5fklrwvWPYml0DAHDYgAWM-b_fx7eP962po0e54xpTio1NEsrDZmP7U-t_y1PATAAD__1IDU2g)

clean_body: U.S. forces shot down over the Red Sea on Sunday, forcing the two Navy pilots on board to eject, with one sustaining minor injuries. | | | | | | Monday, December 23, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1823, the beloved poem A Visit from St. Nicholas —better known as 'Twas the Night Before Christmas —was first published anonymously in the Troy Sentinel. () Christmas and Hanukkah are just a few days away, and The Flyover will adjust its coverage this week so that our team can spend time with their families. Beginning Christmas Day, we’ll publish shorter editions until the weekend and then return on Monday with our regular schedule. Today, we’re sponsored by , a non-profit dedicated to helping Christian children in Somalia. Be sure to check them out in today’s edition. | Friendly Fire Downs U.S. Plane U.S. forces shot down over the Red Sea on Sunday, forcing the two Navy pilots on board to eject, with one sustaining minor injuries. The incident occurred as the U.S. was conducting airstrikes against , highlighting the persistent risks in the Red Sea corridor as Houthi attacks on shipping continue. The downed plane had just taken off from the USS Harry S. Truman aircraft carrier and was hit by friendly fire from the guided missile cruiser USS Gettysburg. It is not yet clear how the plane was . Trump Targets Panama Canal President-elect Donald Trump has threatened to , citing “excessive” fees charged by Panama for its use. Speaking at a Turning Point USA event in Arizona, Trump warned Panama to honor what he called to Panamanian control. The canal, handling 14,000 ships annually, accounts for 2.5% of worldwide sea commerce, and Trump’s remarks suggest a possible shift in U.S. foreign policy. List: Satisfying vs. Reliable in Car Brands New rankings of the car brands reveal that the two often aren't linked in consumers' minds. Rivian, BMW, and Tesla took the top three spots in the satisfaction rankings, while Japanese automakers took all the top six reliability spots, with Subaru, Lexus, and Toyota leading the way. Satisfaction indicates the likelihood of auto owners buying another car of the same make, while reliability is based on complex, proprietary calculations. Only Lexus broke the top five in both lists, which . | ➤ Lara Trump, the President-elect’s daughter-in-law, said she’s removing herself from consideration to replace Sen. Marco Rubio, who is Trump’s pick for secretary of state, as a Florida senator. () ➤ Meanwhile, Trump has selected Mark Burnett, producer of The Apprentice reality TV show, as special envoy to the United Kingdom. () ➤Former Democrat and outgoing Sen. Joe Manchin (I-W. Va.) described the Democratic Party as “toxic” and warned the party that the nation is “not going left” in an interview Sunday. () ➤Rep. Kay Granger(R-Texas), 81, was found in a memory care unit after being missing from Washington for six months. She is set to retire in January. () | Flying together with our sponsor Somalia is facing a devastating combination of natural disasters, global conflicts, widespread poverty, and disease outbreaks. East Africa has just endured its worst drought in 40 years, leaving tens of millions without access to clean water, wiping out millions of livestock, and destroying crops. With domestic food production crippled, Somalia has relied heavily on imports—90% of its wheat coming from Russia and Ukraine—until those shipments stopped. Now, two in five children in Somalia suffer from acute malnutrition, and cholera is spreading in some regions. The food crisis, compounded by global humanitarian aid being redirected to Europe and the Middle East, has created a perfect storm, leading to a sharp rise in child malnutrition. We’re asking the Flyover Community to join us in partnering with World Concern to help get emergency nutrition packs (a peanut paste fortified with nutrients), water, and hygiene products to those with the most need. Every $12 feeds a child for a month. | ➤The Washington Commanders edged out the Philadelphia Eagles 36-33 with six seconds remaining, and the Detroit Lions beat the Chicago Bears 34-17 in Sunday NFL action. () ➤Penn State beat Louisville 3-1 to win this year’s women’s NCAA national volleyball championship in front of a record-breaking crowd. It’s the 8th time Penn has taken national honors. () ➤Victor Wembanyama became just the sixth player in NBA history to record 10 blocks in a game on Saturday. () ➤ Charlie Woods, son of legendary golfer Tiger Woods, sank his first-ever hole-in-one on Sunday. December 23, 2024
| | I hope you all have a fantastic Christmas and Holiday season as a whole! Being together and sharing the Season is so important.
Make sure you take the time to slow down a realize the importance of Christmas and keep it in your heart!
From my family to yours, MERRY CHRISTMAS!

name: Patriot
subject: PLEASE! Will you take our NEW leadership survey?
body:
| |
---
| | | Friend -

**[Sorry to bother but before you log off for the day, would you mind quickly finishing our brand-new 119th Congress Leadership Survey?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS- "Before you log off for Thanksgiving, would you please finish our brand-new 119th Congress Leadership Survey?")**

We're in the final stages of preparation before Republicans take full control of the government and we need your input on what YOU think House Republican Leaders should prioritize heading into the new Congress.

_A preview of our survey is below for your convenience:_
---
| | | | 119TH CONGRESS LEADERSHIP SURVEY

Due: 11:59 PM
_______________________________________

---
| | 1) Should we ban non-citizens from voting in US elections?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)**
---
2) Should we mandate voter identification laws nationwide?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)**
---
3) Should we require proof of citizenship to vote?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)**
---
4) Should we enact mass deportations of illegals?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)**
---
5) Should we finish building The Wall?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)**
---
6) Should we increase the number of Border Patrol agents?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)**
---
7) Should we end taxes on tips?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)**
---
8) Should we crack down on soft-on-crime laws in blue cities?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)**
---
9) Should we ban men from competing in women's sports?
---
**[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)[**YES**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-) [**NO**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/7jCYJk5BkhXYLKfOP97xFw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-)**

subject: PLEASE! Will you take our NEW leadership survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We’d be remiss if we didn’t share this information with you before 2024 is over and done with.

| |
---
| | | Friend - we'd be remiss if we didn't share this information with you before we close the books for 2024.

Here's the gist:

Our Conservative House Majority could be on the precipice of disaster. Three NEW Special Elections are around the corner and we're running out of time to set Republicans up for success in the new year.

_We just released our FINAL memo of 2024 and need you to read it immediately. We attached it below:_

---
FROM: House Republicans
TO: Concerned American Patriots
RE: Our Final Memo of 2024
* * *

Fellow Patriot -

NEW Special Elections were just announced in _FL-01_ for Matt Gaetz's seat, in _FL-06_ for Mike Waltz's seat, and in _NY-21_ for Elise Stefanik's seat.

But after the most expensive election in HISTORY, our campaign accounts are dangerously low. **It was expensive to defeat the Democrat Machine and deliver a Conservative House Majority for President Trump AND the American People.**

Right now we're short on funds to flood these districts with positive ads, volunteers, and doorknockers to help win these Special Elections decisively.
| | [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1S4GyV5mJjpWdBiCzdYy8g~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-~~ "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ")
---

Now that the dust has settled, it's official that House Republicans hold a razor-thin Majority. The margins couldn't be closer.

That means if the Democrats manage to win these Special Elections in Florida and New York, we might as well kiss our Conservative Majority - and our Republican Trifecta along with it - goodbye.

That's not all...

These Special Elections will be our first major test of 2025. And if we fail, the consequences could be unthinkable. Losing our House Majority could put President Trump's entire legislative agenda at risk!

So we're reaching out to every grassroots Conservative for help to replenish our campaign accounts before our End-of-Year deadline on 12/31/2024.
| [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1S4GyV5mJjpWdBiCzdYy8g~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-~~ "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ")
---

Every contribution will help Republicans refuel before the new year and help us make key budgetary decisions ahead of these three Special Elections. _That 's how we'll save our fragile House Majority._

**Everything we 've fought so hard for could be in jeopardy without your help.**

So we're pleading with you to help House Republicans with one FINAL wave of support before our End-of-Year deadline.
| [PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/1S4GyV5mJjpWdBiCzdYy8g~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-~~ "PLEASE: CAN YOU HELP US? ")
---

Thanks for all you do,
House Republicans

| |

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9kmws-3OGtIKNGcmpUMBnA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpS-dyP0TYaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90ZWFtLXNjYWxpc2UvbWwtc3VydmV5LWZvb3Rlci8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQxMjIyX1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNTg4OTg2LTE3NTYmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjQxMjIyX1BBLVJPTjEuMTEzNzE0X3QxNTg4OTg2LTE3NTYmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQxMjIzJnh1bnY9dHYtcm9uLTIwMjQxMjIzVwNzcGNCCmdlR09pZ7ZdBWtSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_

Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

| | | Friend, It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP** .

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js2u2jAUhJ_G2RHZ59gOWXhRGqULpKqii6rdIMc_ja9iHBwDgqe_ChexnJlPmk_HeQr-rkizIwBjsAsBIPiNAJz_3mK-fMT9j83u32HYnOXPKNYVvr_QK7zhk9EPtivJtr-7RYpf5XHi-yt74-U-uzf8Oq1d1GFa26arrEJvKa-cYg3yVvBWympUTKCVwhvuW0sbwajhVDZyoMi24E1bBQUUOANAxoQQtJbWDdyh9Q4FYoOE0-dPraPLwWi2lJvOOaVYmxSrSY2lzMtTrCfQZ5vrok0JRk_LmObZ5frkCoFee380BPvkvcvHYAl2jDFJQK7LV6a4feXlMhDs_uh8SCmuelVWdr6FaQqLbAin_59Sq8JVwWcAAAD___zXdLI). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter: Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)... Zero lines, classroom time or books to read... Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit). **[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js2u2jAUhJ_G2RHZ59gOWXhRGqULpKqii6rdIMc_ja9iHBwDgqe_ChexnJlPmk_HeQr-rkizIwBjsAsBIPiNAJz_3mK-fMT9j83u32HYnOXPKNYVvr_QK7zhk9EPtivJtr-7RYpf5XHi-yt74-U-uzf8Oq1d1GFa26arrEJvKa-cYg3yVvBWympUTKCVwhvuW0sbwajhVDZyoMi24E1bBQUUOANAxoQQtJbWDdyh9Q4FYoOE0-dPraPLwWi2lJvOOaVYmxSrSY2lzMtTrCfQZ5vrok0JRk_LmObZ5frkCoFee380BPvkvcvHYAl2jDFJQK7LV6a4feXlMhDs_uh8SCmuelVWdr6FaQqLbAin_59Sq8JVwWcAAAD___zXdLI).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js2u2jAUhJ_G2RHZ59gOWXhRGqULpKqii6rdIMc_ja9iHBwDgqe_ChexnJlPmk_HeQr-rkizIwBjsAsBIPiNAJz_3mK-fMT9j83u32HYnOXPKNYVvr_QK7zhk9EPtivJtr-7RYpf5XHi-yt74-U-uzf8Oq1d1GFa26arrEJvKa-cYg3yVvBWympUTKCVwhvuW0sbwajhVDZyoMi24E1bBQUUOANAxoQQtJbWDdyh9Q4FYoOE0-dPraPLwWi2lJvOOaVYmxSrSY2lzMtTrCfQZ5vrok0JRk_LmObZ5frkCoFee380BPvkvcvHYAl2jDFJQK7LV6a4feXlMhDs_uh8SCmuelVWdr6FaQqLbAin_59Sq8JVwWcAAAD___zXdLI)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: History Facts
subject: When did we start wrapping gifts?
body:
Decorative wrapping has long been an integral part of gift-giving. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68co5dlrwnyn3t0216dtk3q9h0zf54h4d7jqln5w4ytllb4nvdlz59wrlitkddsx4kfom2kuo2am7lap6igd0dtlrzpd3znoatxggtgqvjm582p4ugyerfw6zcsc35lwcinw2oaiv8rh2j65s&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soy47i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Humans have been wrapping gifts since the second century.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soy47i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soy47i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soy47i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| D ecorative wrapping has long been an integral part of gift-giving. Over the years, studies have shown that gift wrap can even positively influence the perception of a gift — a fact that was clearly understood in some ancient cultures. When paper first [emerged](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soy47i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in ancient China around the second century BCE, it was primarily used for wrapping medicine and delicate goods. But during the Southern Song dynasty from 1127 to 1279 CE, wrapping paper took on an intentional and meaningful role not unlike how it’s used today: Monetary gifts from the imperial court were presented wrapped in paper envelopes known as _chih poh_.
---
In Korea, wrapping gifts may have started even earlier. Records such as the _Samguk sagi_ , a 12th-century historical Korean text, note the use of a decorative cloth [known as _bojagi_](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soy47i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) for wrapping gifts throughout the Three Kingdoms period from 57 BCE to 668 CE; most early _bojagi_ artifacts, however, date to the later Joseon period, from 1392 to 1910.
The Western world was much slower to embrace the practice. The proliferation of elaborately decorated Christmas cards in Victorian England led to early gift wrapping, and the tradition spread from there to the U.S., where the wrapping paper industry boomed. In 1917, while running their namesake Hallmark stationery store in Kansas City, Missouri, the Hall brothers ran out of traditional tissue paper during the Christmas season. Scrambling for a solution, they began selling decorative paper envelope liners as a replacement. The colorful sheets were a hit, and by 1919, the brothers began producing and selling their own printed wrapping paper for several occasions, transforming how we give gifts.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soy47i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soy47i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Christmas was once banned in Massachusetts.
When early English settlers arrived in Virginia in 1607, they brought with them a reverence for their European Christmas traditions. Though their celebrations didn’t match those back home — the hardships of colonial life didn’t allow much fanfare — the Virginia colonists still considered Christmas a sacred and restful day. In Massachusetts, however, following England’s lead during the English Civil Wars, the Puritans outright banned Christmas in 1659. The extreme Protestants believed the holiday had no biblical basis and denounced its pagan traditions; the General Court of the Massachusetts Bay Colony [fined](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soy47i&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) anyone caught celebrating the holiday five shillings. Though England lifted its ban with the restoration of the monarchy in 1660, Massachusetts enforced its law until 1681. Even after that, the holiday remained controversial in New England for decades. It wasn’t until 1856 that Christmas officially became a public holiday in the Bay State.

clean_body: Decorative wrapping has long been an integral part of gift-giving. | D ecorative wrapping has long been an integral part of gift-giving. Over the years, studies have shown that gift wrap can even positively influence the perception of a gift — a fact that was clearly understood in some ancient cultures. When paper first in ancient China around the second century BCE, it was primarily used for wrapping medicine and delicate goods. But during the Southern Song dynasty from 1127 to 1279 CE, wrapping paper took on an intentional and meaningful role not unlike how it’s used today: Monetary gifts from the imperial court were presented wrapped in paper envelopes known as chih poh. In Korea, wrapping gifts may have started even earlier. Records such as the Samguk sagi , a 12th-century historical Korean text, note the use of a decorative cloth for wrapping gifts throughout the Three Kingdoms period from 57 BCE to 668 CE; most early bojagi artifacts, however, date to the later Joseon period, from 1392 to 1910. The Western world was much slower to embrace the practice. The proliferation of elaborately decorated Christmas cards in Victorian England led to early gift wrapping, and the tradition spread from there to the U.S., where the wrapping paper industry boomed. In 1917, while running their namesake Hallmark stationery store in Kansas City, Missouri, the Hall brothers ran out of traditional tissue paper during the Christmas season. Scrambling for a solution, they began selling decorative paper envelope liners as a replacement. The colorful sheets were a hit, and by 1919, the brothers began producing and selling their own printed wrapping paper for several occasions, transforming how we give gifts. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Year the Christmas card was invented 1843 | | People in the largest Secret Santa gift exchange on record 1,463 | People in the largest Secret Santa gift exchange on record 1,463 | | Year Chinese inventor Cai Lun created paper ~105 CE | | Average amount Americans spend on gift wrapping each year $5 billion | Average amount Americans spend on gift wrapping each year $5 billion | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Christmas was once banned in Massachusetts. When early English settlers arrived in Virginia in 1607, they brought with them a reverence for their European Christmas traditions. Though their celebrations didn’t match those back home — the hardships of colonial life didn’t allow much fanfare — the Virginia colonists still considered Christmas a sacred and restful day. In Massachusetts, however, following England’s lead during the English Civil Wars, the Puritans outright banned Christmas in 1659. The extreme Protestants believed the holiday had no biblical basis and denounced its pagan traditions; the General Court of the Massachusetts Bay Colony anyone caught celebrating the holiday five shillings. Though England lifted its ban with the restoration of the monarchy in 1660, Massachusetts enforced its law until 1681. Even after that, the holiday remained controversial in New England for decades. It wasn’t until 1856 that Christmas officially became a public holiday in the Bay State.
