name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: A gift to New Jersey
body:
Peter, If you’re like me, you’re running around doing last minute shopping, hitting the store for the 10th time because you n
|
---
| Peter, If you’re like me, you’re running around doing last minute shopping, hitting the store for the 10th time because you need more tape and bows, and worrying about what you’re going to bring as a side dish to that party you forgot about. Gosh, I’m getting a little stressed just reading that last sentence. Have I forgotten anything? So I’ll keep this email mercifully short :) We want to end the year strong as Common Sense Club. We’re building a war chest for 2025 so we can execute projects like One Less Lemon across the state. We firmly believe 2025 is going to be the year of the Common Sense Majority. If you thought November 5, 2024 was incredible, wait til you wake up on November 5, 2025. But if we want the wins, we have to put in the work, and we’re going to. But we need your financial support to be successful. Please give, and do it today if you can. Once you click away from this email, even with your best intentions, you may forget.

name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Merry Christmas From Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Merry Christmas From Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12719415?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Wishing you a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year! Christmas is a time for hope. It is also a season for renewed inspiration from Jesus Christ’s universal message of peace on earth and goodwill to men. Let’s also remember to say a prayer for our troops, our law enforcement, and their families as they sacrifice their own comfort during our celebrations to keep us safe and free.

This has been an incredible year for our state and nation. I can’t wait to Make America Great Again with President Trump back in the White House and keep our state the Free State of Florida as your State Representative in the legislature.

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---

Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative

Scott Jennings could not believe his CNN colleague **[claimed that"the media" was pro-Trump.](https://substack.com/redirect/7eede566-e287-4d37-8f0a-37fdbab70262?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"The number one cable news network is Fox News, the number one paper by circulation is the Wall Street Journal,... the number one radio host, Sean Hannity, the number one person on podcasts, Joe Rogan. All of these people are Trump supporters!" a woke CNN panelist told Jennings. "What media are you talking about that is anti-Trump?!!"
"You're not familiar with the anti-Trump media?!!" Jennings asked, shocked by what his guest star had just said.
**[Watch the unbelievable exchange below:](https://substack.com/redirect/7eede566-e287-4d37-8f0a-37fdbab70262?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

* * *
# **Tom Homan gets emotional when Tucker catches him off guard with unexpected question**
**[In a rare character-breaking moment](https://substack.com/redirect/7efce1fc-41e8-4f49-84ff-a18be6897f5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , Trump Border Czar Tom Homan got emotional when Tucker Carlson asked him an unexpected question during an interview.
"This problem is just so enormous,... Why would you take this job?" Tucker asked Homan.
The former I.C.E director thought for a second before answering. "Because I love this country," he said affirmatively.
**[What happened next will give you CHILLS... ](https://substack.com/redirect/7efce1fc-41e8-4f49-84ff-a18be6897f5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

* * *
# **Rude woman has a MELTDOWN at fast food drive thru, no-nonsense cops teach her a lesson!**
Police body cam footage shows **[the arrest of a young couple who refused to cooperate with lawful orders](https://substack.com/redirect/ccaa35b5-f2c0-4fa0-99e8-d3ac87853382?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from police while stopped in a McDonald's parking lot.
The police approached the couple initially for their vehicle's tinted windows.
"Police brutality!!" the young woman shouted, escalating the altercation from 0-60.
"I'm gonna break the window if you don't open the window!" the officer shouted back to the woman.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. | | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---
| |
---
| | Patriot, Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Take it from me, Patriot, as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, **_you are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children_**. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d2178bc810874c2290ddc610d22d13d4&_e=18ZbpjIqQ5Dweq4iDUnol_5jKcZ3UWM-VlU2ZrOqWFxWMP3Pr-QlWHl7eDaLHGqpoBKNq5FdFsHfZgDrtwMbW9g89RNXjaTVE6HqNg6RlQIu0bwtQqr1qOduOZOJpcTXQ4QrELb8GyfJlIV7PS7MiXGiTiVSgeAjtPYDvpfKJaI8eDMI4I_xEO4iffZgnp0TpUp3ertonWvduBsml1uqrmgzizp7F4dlkcQAp5JfuNvsz-cgMqnoRE4wcpDL5KOYj6meLidQ-ncWFzCI4t-rKprbILsU3XwwUiUv-FdttuVkYi62wvUky6qkgJt64nfvpaX6DQYt-ZsKqM41dq2oPBcXyxuU0ed_30khQEWFyf8XLHSOTj2jTF-oBFWORue4)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth.**That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d2178bc810874c2290ddc610d22d13d4&_e=18ZbpjIqQ5Dweq4iDUnol_5jKcZ3UWM-VlU2ZrOqWFxWMP3Pr-QlWHl7eDaLHGqpoBKNq5FdFsHfZgDrtwMbW9g89RNXjaTVE6HqNg6RlQIu0bwtQqr1qOduOZOJpcTXQ4QrELb8GyfJlIV7PS7MiXGiTiVSgeAjtPYDvpfKJaI8eDMI4I_xEO4iffZgnp0TpUp3ertonWvduBsml1uqrmgzizp7F4dlkcQAp5JfuNs7-WgdodwsPVRvXFMH3MAeNx7B7AajOIRKiw_57AHcftvzX4F9n6dhwt_YpRGU6nKwJrSmYWl90BjMGB42uTX_s1q1Mt4S9anNIsXcKgswrKjYoFtj8n5X_6Ie26Z-qWKC-ejG7GKShZiLTZbSSBaV)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d2178bc810874c2290ddc610d22d13d4&_e=18ZbpjIqQ5Dweq4iDUnol_5jKcZ3UWM-VlU2ZrOqWFxWMP3Pr-QlWHl7eDaLHGqpoBKNq5FdFsHfZgDrtwMbW9g89RNXjaTVE6HqNg6RlQIu0bwtQqr1qOduOZOJpcTXQ4QrELb8GyfJlIV7PS7MiXGiTiVSgeAjtPYDvpfKJaI8eDMI4I_xEO4iffZgnp0TpUp3ertonWvduBsml1uqrmgzizp7F4dlkcQAp5JfuNsmCr6Bz63OJDuxMbxhB9b-vzr4RxasNyAYcUAo-D5nVETnolFbJGItIwGWjpGqYmpSq0GuABio4ACL0PnS_GBkN6Mmwzv8IuYnqxMaKNdAtb9nuWd6UDy8xM7c0uaVh9OxKjgiUuKJyqpy_lHoJYQ3)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d2178bc810874c2290ddc610d22d13d4&_e=18ZbpjIqQ5Dweq4iDUnol_5jKcZ3UWM-VlU2ZrOqWFxWMP3Pr-QlWHl7eDaLHGqpoBKNq5FdFsHfZgDrtwMbW9g89RNXjaTVE6HqNg6RlQIu0bwtQqr1qOduOZOJpcTXQ4QrELb8GyfJlIV7PS7MiXGiTiVSgeAjtPYDvpfKJaI8eDMI4I_xEO4iffZgnp0TpUp3ertonWvduBsml1uqrmgzizp7F4dlkcQAp5JfuNvQs6Efl6XjalHX63UWlFlILs8harETYNR4VWVUqhN6Xg5E9I0n0N5b6zlG3gG_J5xfTAYfc-oF7mgHbKJxMirNwL3-ehPcXqan2VUvvx2k9qkNvGkdnscFhEsQiE3treJr4jmH9bbsiqKQRei3_Owk) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father

name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: Did you read this in the news?
body:
Did you read in the news how several leading colleges and universities reacted to last month’s election?

|
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=29943fc0d3e8452ba128f5287ac21164&_t=qJaUBQwz8muc8YgVg_p1nz0O-b2m5Y3gIJggq-4ggxtppq4NJeXxrECRL8Uyt70iwkhohscx3Ge22jJN2iNilSWrZJM_4kZatFQC7KLm0fxiOma6qW4-RSTatZXY2lVf)_
---
| | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=29943fc0d3e8452ba128f5287ac21164&_e=cw7D8YXMOcOcymJL575KXKxhucC_KgU4ilnVKifqtzs5kL4J8ZFfD-TnFURx8atiFJxG-Cx3KEALaZjPtbNcBM54wYJgQY3Klm6n4vnan9cbnYtFS61YXRz_VaQlVPTJedsx367MvIkgNx8a6vSH-T6H041HFCPfArMtqsh2UIuoMpQfez4qCy1gwE00cvnHQqhgB3AfFBsYKdYOIKTjaopmBxgDOyP5Nfyyg6tryIzS4bWMviIVPJUg6wzmKr028-MNOijhYjieQrgMXPS9d5CbqELb9InA6_DQHWvZKE6bBR6DKadbz0V8IUIarja7kTnPnQxUxajfz05K9kP0I73cmqhgGNuKt02hefdfJEzJt94HQW5zc7fVZVhf4XeY)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Did you read in the news how several leading colleges and universities reacted to last month's election?

Some of these so-called elite institutions canceled classes and gave students coloring books, hot cocoa, and counseling so they could cope with the election results.

Could there be better proof that too many of America's schools fail to prepare their students to be responsible citizens of the world's greatest and longest-lasting constitutional republic?

Yet, we should not really be surprised by this. After all, the forces of the anti-American Left have been focused on seizing control of our educational institutions since the late 1960s.

Too many young Americans are taught that our nation's founding principles were developed to promote white supremacy, that natural rights and private property are codewords for fascism, and that justice requires the destruction of capitalism.

To normal, hard-working Americans, this sounds insane. That's because it _is_ insane.

Our American way of life is under relentless attack on campuses across the country. This problem won't be fixed quickly or easily--although I believe we have the opportunity to score significant victories in the coming year.

I am hopeful for our future, and one of the main reasons I am hopeful is the sense of civic responsibility and generosity of people like **YOU**.

With your support, Hillsdale College plans to redouble its efforts in 2025 to revive and preserve liberty through education.

**[Given the urgency of engaging the Left on the battleground of education, will you consider a tax-deductible gift today to help Hillsdale College expand its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=29943fc0d3e8452ba128f5287ac21164&_e=cw7D8YXMOcOcymJL575KXKxhucC_KgU4ilnVKifqtzs5kL4J8ZFfD-TnFURx8atiFJxG-Cx3KEALaZjPtbNcBM54wYJgQY3Klm6n4vnan9cbnYtFS61YXRz_VaQlVPTJedsx367MvIkgNx8a6vSH-T6H041HFCPfArMtqsh2UIuoMpQfez4qCy1gwE00cvnHQqhgB3AfFBsYKdYOIKTjaopmBxgDOyP5Nfyyg6tryIwPe5LavKRkUqXiJhXNbdJZmcBVRW2rBDqoXfBy4mneG0tvQZr5iwhu29aP4Riigu1rL1kkFZWPZgCcqgnqjXuU_k7LsRseSTqHN7R5mG8UzicetjMmLDPnZhuB8ORys2RHgXiU_DUlF3RsG5C8Mztn)**

You will help us to expand the production of our free online courses, increase the readership of _Imprimis_ , and launch increasing numbers of Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Stepping up the battle to retake American education from the anti-American Left is an essential part of restoring and preserving the American way of life. It will take a mighty effort--but in the words of Hillsdale's motto, "Strength Rejoices in the Challenge."

Your generous support of our educational outreach programs will help us to reach and teach additional millions of our fellow citizens.

**As you know, Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. **

This allows Hillsdale to remain **genuinely independent** and focused on its mission, free of burdensome and corrupting federal regulations.

But it also means that all our work--including our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--**is entirely dependent on the support of citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

2025 will be a critical year, and the Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on our government and on our schools.

It will take significant resources to promote our online courses--such as our recent course on "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--while also expanding Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

Many of our most faithful supporters give gifts of **$25** or **$50** , while others give gifts of **$100** , **$500** , or even more. What's most important is that you give what you can.

Please help today by making your best tax-deductible, year-end gift using the secure, convenient link below:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=29943fc0d3e8452ba128f5287ac21164&_e=cw7D8YXMOcOcymJL575KXKxhucC_KgU4ilnVKifqtzs5kL4J8ZFfD-TnFURx8atiFJxG-Cx3KEALaZjPtbNcBM54wYJgQY3Klm6n4vnan9cbnYtFS61YXRz_VaQlVPTJedsx367MvIkgNx8a6vSH-T6H041HFCPfArMtqsh2UIuoMpQfez4qCy1gwE00cvnHQqhgB3AfFBsYKdYOIKTjaopmBxgDOyP5Nfyyg6tryIwQNOvVYwG635oMTcswNWRt8Wp6zOFAcm5iFy3_slPm2RR2VfhdPtdXIBHIUlYRnikOYN7o7cXCsLwre8-LSNbUd6QHAWkUJrNhbn_nz_esMObzbXOz5X-ojKwiHIaFkzA3AqXyDxqzMCqSjFQ4cZkz)

Thank you for your partnership in our educational efforts to preserve liberty and the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Christmas Troop Support via USO
subject: It’s not too late to give military heroes a priceless gift for the holidays
body:
Sign the card to show our heroes you care.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---

[](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[**Show our service members they 're
not forgotten this holiday ** ](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/_K68Qeb7v2tk/cmU4WjhzdUlBWTZ2QXVFdkJTaVY1RGNaTWxYb2NDeDRTWjliR0JkWG5DeE9DVndpOEVVV3pUSjdnSkF5VWliTnc4RWJWaUJRQUhOOEN6Z0xHSGpQS0tOL0Y1c3BucmF1NTY0bTNLTzNWalE9S0/QnJXSktDMWNGSjZpOHJiUlJ2S3plQ0dLdDJubUF5QlFINkFTKyt6UjBIRTBTejVnQXpzTjBQMmJpWTBkVlcrZ1JnNmxPckFZR2FRMDFQUDBQRE1aZXlLQVFLeHFrZXEyS0) | [SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
USO Supporter,
It's the season of giving, and while it's too late to deliver any more USO Holiday Care Packages before Christmas, there's still one priceless gift you can give our brave service members: your words of encouragement.
**Thousands of service members are spending the holidays deployed in some of the most remote places on Earth instead of by the Christmas tree with their families.**
**[A simple message from you can remind them they're not alone, no matter how far from home they are. Will you sign our card now for the brave military heroes who are selflessly serving all over the world this Christmas?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/A-VKBbe4DyCy/cmU4WjhzdUlBWTZ2QXVFdkJTaVY1RGNaTWxYb2NDeDRTWjliR0JkWG5DeE9DVndpOEVVV3pUSjdnSkF5VWliTnc4RWJWaUJRQUhOOEN6Z0xHSGpQS0tOL0Y1c3BucmF1NTY0bTNLTzNWalE9S0/QnJXSktDMWNGSjZpOHJiUlJ2S3plQ0dLdDJubUF5QlFINkFTKyt6UjBIRTBTejVnQXpzTjBQMmJpWTBkVlcrZ1JnNmxPckFZR2FRMDFQUDBQRE1aZXlLQVFLeHFrZXEyS0)**
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Spending Christmas away from family and loved ones makes this one of the most difficult times of the year to serve. Whether it's their first time away or they've lost track of how many holidays they've missed, we can tell you this: It _never_ gets any easier for our heroes or their loved ones back home.
**That 's why we've set a goal to reach 100,000 signatures on our holiday card to show our service members that we know and appreciate the sacrifices they make for us -- and we simply can't get there without your help !**
**[Please, add your name to our card now before our Christmas Eve deadline tomorrow to show our service members that they're not forgotten as they continue to serve and sacrifice throughout the holidays.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/A-VKBbe4DyCy/cmU4WjhzdUlBWTZ2QXVFdkJTaVY1RGNaTWxYb2NDeDRTWjliR0JkWG5DeE9DVndpOEVVV3pUSjdnSkF5VWliTnc4RWJWaUJRQUhOOEN6Z0xHSGpQS0tOL0Y1c3BucmF1NTY0bTNLTzNWalE9S0/QnJXSktDMWNGSjZpOHJiUlJ2S3plQ0dLdDJubUF5QlFINkFTKyt6UjBIRTBTejVnQXpzTjBQMmJpWTBkVlcrZ1JnNmxPckFZR2FRMDFQUDBQRE1aZXlLQVFLeHFrZXEyS0)**
Thank you,
Team USO

clean_body: Sign the card to show our heroes you care. | USO Supporter, It's the season of giving, and while it's too late to deliver any more USO Holiday Care Packages before Christmas, there's still one priceless gift you can give our brave service members: your words of encouragement. Thousands of service members are spending the holidays deployed in some of the most remote places on Earth instead of by the Christmas tree with their families. Spending Christmas away from family and loved ones makes this one of the most difficult times of the year to serve. Whether it's their first time away or they've lost track of how many holidays they've missed, we can tell you this: It never_ gets any easier for our heroes or their loved ones back home. That 's why we've set a goal to reach 100,000 signatures on our holiday card to show our service members that we know and appreciate the sacrifices they make for us -- and we simply can't get there without your help ! name: Stansberry Research
subject: Subject: 50-year Wall Street legend: “Everything just changed for U.S. stocks
body:
But one of my most senior analysts has been sending this around – and it's startling.

# Is Your Portfolio Caught in A "Post-Election Trap"?
* * *
Most investors don't see [the problem](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkc2u2yAQhZ9mvHNkZiYQFizautlU6eJuukQYY18UYiMgrfr2lW_UB7jLc878fZpfN3tzMcVt_ekewdx9saXa8rB1epbyt_d5Lb2LfSsxWxyQe4E9ksVuNrP20skuGKGItdRS6-7dLILFRc4LY6CFlB6EPDMHpkl4mr3qojnmCEQSzIr0acILKRfmcFFnPg9n4MGlUNrpHkL2-7aWUGsJ-Tml6N128vujS-a9tVyBvgBeAa-tOH-P23ryKfp7Pc4N4qgEvLplsR7oui9LKDbOQCMK0oDySD60GDQDyro_iw9A4_eHi-kwnpMAGkF9bcVt1fkW9-1oUeMrRaAx71ngIJDdyyOgUfLlJRhofLv1P7699f-xu2Lm_CemFKtUwMN6LPugap95wG-D_wIAAP__V86Juw) yet... and many think this current rally could keep going for months or even years.
But one of my most senior analysts has been sending this around - and it's startling.
The last time the country looked like it does today, the "rally" at the time didn't keep going at all.
In fact, the market abruptly crashed...
But that was just the beginning of the problem.
Next...
Stocks proceeded to go nowhere for 16 years. And that _still_ wasn't the worst part...
The worst part was, by the end, many investors lost 80% of their biggest positions in real terms.
That number is hard to imagine... but this really happened - at a time in American history that looks eerily similar to today.
I can't possibly explain this all in a single e-mail.
[So it's best you go hear it directly from senior analyst Dan Ferris](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkc2u2yAQhZ9mvHNkZiYQFizautlU6eJuukQYY18UYiMgrfr2lW_UB7jLc878fZpfN3tzMcVt_ekewdx9saXa8rB1epbyt_d5Lb2LfSsxWxyQe4E9ksVuNrP20skuGKGItdRS6-7dLILFRc4LY6CFlB6EPDMHpkl4mr3qojnmCEQSzIr0acILKRfmcFFnPg9n4MGlUNrpHkL2-7aWUGsJ-Tml6N128vujS-a9tVyBvgBeAa-tOH-P23ryKfp7Pc4N4qgEvLplsR7oui9LKDbOQCMK0oDySD60GDQDyro_iw9A4_eHi-kwnpMAGkF9bcVt1fkW9-1oUeMrRaAx71ngIJDdyyOgUfLlJRhofLv1P7699f-xu2Lm_CemFKtUwMN6LPugap95wG-D_wIAAP__V86Juw).
Dan once wrote to an entire list of people and told them one of the world's biggest banks was about to collapse. He wrote these exact words:
_"These guys are hiding something. I expect a wipeout."_
It was March 2008, and he was writing about Lehman Brothers.
Few wanted to hear it.
But Dan was right about Lehman and the mortgage crisis. Lehman collapsed 5 months later.
And Dan has been right about nearly every bubble of the last 25 years including the COVID crash, the collapse of crypto in 2017, and the end of the Nasdaq bubble in 2021.
That's why Dan's work is followed by employees at banks like Wells Fargo, Barclays, and UBS. And it's why he has been featured in publications like _Barron's_ and Bloomberg.
Now that the election is over... as he puts it:
"_Millions are about to be blindsided_ _unless they take the time now to prepare. The last time anything close to this happened in America, our economy suffered a large surprise crash. The market netted 0% over the following sixteen years. And by the end, adjusted for inflation, American investors lost 80% of their wealth. This time, I expect much worse."_
To defend yourself - and potentially profit...
He recommends you consider [moving money to a new type of investment, right away](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkc2u2yAQhZ9mvHNkZiYQFizautlU6eJuukQYY18UYiMgrfr2lW_UB7jLc878fZpfN3tzMcVt_ekewdx9saXa8rB1epbyt_d5Lb2LfSsxWxyQe4E9ksVuNrP20skuGKGItdRS6-7dLILFRc4LY6CFlB6EPDMHpkl4mr3qojnmCEQSzIr0acILKRfmcFFnPg9n4MGlUNrpHkL2-7aWUGsJ-Tml6N128vujS-a9tVyBvgBeAa-tOH-P23ryKfp7Pc4N4qgEvLplsR7oui9LKDbOQCMK0oDySD60GDQDyro_iw9A4_eHi-kwnpMAGkF9bcVt1fkW9-1oUeMrRaAx71ngIJDdyyOgUfLlJRhofLv1P7699f-xu2Lm_CemFKtUwMN6LPugap95wG-D_wIAAP__V86Juw). (It's not gold, real estate, or cryptocurrency.)
Because time is running low, Ferris has agreed to [publish his latest findings online, for free](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkc2u2yAQhZ9mvHNkZiYQFizautlU6eJuukQYY18UYiMgrfr2lW_UB7jLc878fZpfN3tzMcVt_ekewdx9saXa8rB1epbyt_d5Lb2LfSsxWxyQe4E9ksVuNrP20skuGKGItdRS6-7dLILFRc4LY6CFlB6EPDMHpkl4mr3qojnmCEQSzIr0acILKRfmcFFnPg9n4MGlUNrpHkL2-7aWUGsJ-Tml6N128vujS-a9tVyBvgBeAa-tOH-P23ryKfp7Pc4N4qgEvLplsR7oui9LKDbOQCMK0oDySD60GDQDyro_iw9A4_eHi-kwnpMAGkF9bcVt1fkW9-1oUeMrRaAx71ngIJDdyyOgUfLlJRhofLv1P7699f-xu2Lm_CemFKtUwMN6LPugap95wG-D_wIAAP__V86Juw).
[Click here to see his new message now](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkc2u2yAQhZ9mvHNkZiYQFizautlU6eJuukQYY18UYiMgrfr2lW_UB7jLc878fZpfN3tzMcVt_ekewdx9saXa8rB1epbyt_d5Lb2LfSsxWxyQe4E9ksVuNrP20skuGKGItdRS6-7dLILFRc4LY6CFlB6EPDMHpkl4mr3qojnmCEQSzIr0acILKRfmcFFnPg9n4MGlUNrpHkL2-7aWUGsJ-Tml6N128vujS-a9tVyBvgBeAa-tOH-P23ryKfp7Pc4N4qgEvLplsR7oui9LKDbOQCMK0oDySD60GDQDyro_iw9A4_eHi-kwnpMAGkF9bcVt1fkW9-1oUeMrRaAx71ngIJDdyyOgUfLlJRhofLv1P7699f-xu2Lm_CemFKtUwMN6LPugap95wG-D_wIAAP__V86Juw).
Regards,
Brett Aitken
Publisher, Stansberry Research
This ad is sent on behalf of Stansberry Research, 1125 N Charles St, Baltimore, MD 21201. If you would like to optout from receiving offers from Stansberry Research please [click here.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkLFuwyAQQL_G3rDg7gAzMHTJlq4dLcDEQcGOdSa1-vdV-gfdn96T3td1uoZSy7Z8hjX7R-KJj4nX6Ygv5h-R9oVFKKJx2SeQQEKBAJygn_3skgmmz15ZJGecca6_e6KUkgaMNyVvLkJSwRoLGWPUFjH3xb89CgAVkUU3RBjRhjzn0WrSUnckQ83chkfOe3puC-fj4Ly_Yi0pbEN6rn3199b2o8OPDi4dXM7zHELhGPhRy3Jvb6iDy1Nsra2CtRFAzkUTSSscSZLLOEsZR6vDCDctsWc_72eptRzGdiSXNZT612r_2fLt4TcAAP__gUVqLA)

Keep Congress Republican
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | UPDATE: Special elections are possible for Florida and Ohio Senate seats Republican's victory in a Senate Majority could soon be at RISK with special elections in Ohio and Florida to replace JD Vance and Marco Rubio. We need to be ready to elect Democrats and win back our majority, and we'll need a strong grassroots movement to make this happen! | | | Peter: This is a HUGE opportunity for Democrats to put a stop to this MAGA madness. With Trump bringing his right-wing bozos to his administration, he is leaving TWO important Senate seats up for grabs. | | | | | | | | | | With you, Blue Amp Action Team | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Team Kasich
subject: How to handle grief during the holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
While the holidays can be a joyous time for many, for others it can be challenging.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=840d5874847c4b029b4fd31b2ad2a36e&_e=fJovrZV64uDa0m2vB5_o1WLMRj_Qtsre0SAi4MChC7l4NIVlnpvTqBIO2IcXBUgdWdefgAwxuB2YA1GqpoLU1Sl8j-UI1w7GMUfB0eP1SUPnU2-lMsm8FZ97GBlAHTYPxjDEtncc-teI-B5pwpWud6RUetfvmDWGSf5ZMnEZpNRvpk1EaKSKLOZS_SgJkBd843v6n3qQztSnB2iI-mklbg%3D%3D)
---
Peter, While the holidays can be a joyous time for many, for others it can be challenging. We are reaching out to share a recent discussion Gov. Kasich had with Andy Keller, President/CEO of the Meadows Mental Health Policy Institute, and Julie Kaplow, the executive vice president for Trauma and Grief Programs and Policy at the Meadows Institute. [Their discussion is about how to support adults and children who are grieving during this time of year](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=840d5874847c4b029b4fd31b2ad2a36e&_e=fJovrZV64uDa0m2vB5_o1RxLX8raFX7D4Wukd-foYJ0l9j3WlFYuYKlj1G9stttEkayf4mbyznkmj_77flWLadWlshY5JBSe4jHu29em0NITdeiLI_A5mzEdccaNuh-s-WYsoNwXWIeMko9anNaWkurBqBzoqU5QMbQjxzdX8EGawrYG8MNFDiOsAG5CF8BSXyMbiX5HOFYxXbqpUbGzB9OzBQOshLAx0PxvOnx1F9xN6GA_bNr2qo5GwfI0F3bdeF7TTQ9Dn3KWzIYvkqgOHjlNQ9CqDklCFvWDAHB02zY%3D).

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?refcode=122324 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?refcode=122324]
Friend,
My race was decided by less than 1,000 votes. That’s a small margin, but it wasn’t even close to the tightest race. We all worked so hard, but our House DFL team isn’t resting yet.
Our end-of-year deadline is approaching and we still need to raise $5,674 to meet our goal. Will you help us finish 2024 strong by donating $10, $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?refcode=122324]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=122324] Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=122324] Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=122324] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=122324] Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-dec24?express_lane_other=true&refcode=122324]
Thank you, friend. I really appreciate all your support of the House DFL.
Zack Stephenson
Representative, District 35A
Minnesota House of Representatives

name: Citizens Alliance New Hampshire
subject: 🎄 A Liberty-Filled Christmas Wish List for New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS ALLIANCE OF NEW HAMPSHIRE]()
body:
From all of us at Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire, we wish you and your family a Merry Christmas and a New Year filled with freedom, prosperity... | | | | |
---
| | | | [](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=4315157dad&e=8c8e704ee6)
---
| Peter,

As we gather with loved ones, friends and family this Christmas season to celebrate the birth of our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ, Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire is reflecting on all we’ve accomplished together — and preparing to take on the challenges ahead.

**Here’s our Christmas Liberty Wish List for 2025 and beyond:**

🎁 **Continued cuts to wasteful spending**

Let’s bring DOGE to New Hampshire! Reducing government waste ensures that taxpayer dollars are used responsibly. By eliminating inefficiencies, we can focus resources on what truly matters without unnecessary burdens on families and businesses.

🎁 **Reducing and eliminating burdensome taxes**

Lower taxes mean more money in your pocket to spend, save, and invest. Eliminating and reducing outdated and burdensome taxes promotes economic growth, attracts new businesses to New Hampshire, and keeps our state competitive while preserving its low-tax reputation.

🎁 **Expanding parental rights in education and Education Freedom Accounts**

Parents should have the ultimate say in their children’s education. Expanding parental rights and EFAs empowers families to choose the schools or programs that best fit their child’s unique needs, ensuring every child has the opportunity to thrive.

**Thanks to your incredible support this year, we’ve already laid a strong foundation to help us achieve these goals!**

🎄 **71 liberty-loving lawmakers were elected** , ready to fight and defend your inalienable rights in Concord

🎄 **Over 12,000 doors knocked, 200,000+ text messages sent, and countless digital campaigns** helped rally voters for champions of liberty and mobilize our fight to make New Hampshire the FIRST Liberty State!

🎄 **All our endorsed elected lawmakers signed the Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire Pledge** , committing to uphold the principles of the New Hampshire and U.S. Constitutions.

Next year, our champions will bring bold ideas to Concord, advancing these critical initiatives, making our Christmas wishes come true, and ensuring New Hampshire remains the Live Free or Die state for generations to come.

**From all of us at Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire, we wish you and your family a Merry Christmas and a New Year filled with freedom, prosperity, and joy.**

Let’s continue building a freer, stronger New Hampshire in 2025!
---
[](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=3c46f9c5ee&e=8c8e704ee6)
| Daniel Gray
Executive Director
Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire

---
[DON’T WAIT! DONATE TODAY TO MAKE 2025 GREAT!](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=681012110e&e=8c8e704ee6)
| | | | | [](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=79a040e230&e=8c8e704ee6)

name: New PA Project Education Fund
subject: Happy holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund
body:
Fellow activist,

Before you log off, we wanted to reach out and say thank you for your continued support.

In 2022, our first full year in operation on the ground, the New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) and the affiliated organization, New Pennsylvania Project (NPP), helped more than 20,000 Pennsylvanians in registering to vote and mobilized many of those newly registered voters to the polls. Since 2021, both NPPEF & NPP have assisted more than 48,000 Pennsylvanians in registering to vote and making their voices heard at the ballot box.

That is the impact we are having, and we are so grateful to have you on our team.

>From the NPPEF team to you, we wish you and yours happy holidays!

-Team NPPEF

The New PA Project Education Fund (NPPEF) is a non-partisan organization led by community leaders across the Commonwealth dedicated to centering underrepresented and underserved communities to embrace their power. NPPEF ensures full participation in the democratic process through civic education and year-round engagement by centering Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth - with intention - as they are the least represented and most impacted by decisions our government is making.

Will you support us with a contribution today?

DONATE NOW >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nppef_eoy_match_as/?refcode=EM_F_241223thanks_N_NPPEF_4_NG_N_PT

Paid for by the New PA Project Education Fund

PO Box 443
West Chester, PA 19381
United States

body:
2024 Year in Review | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99159474/519037073/-1586972746?sourceid=1150215&utm_campaign=25emjge-1213aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=eoy&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2EwZDQ4NC00MGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JF8vy-F7hiFdgO8JmsTV7nNX9MiaWw3Hm1na6FP1IZs=&emci=460a7c26-46be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=a3a0d484-40c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=954237)
---
**2024 YEAR IN REVIEW:
_RESTORING & ADVANCING REPRODUCTIVE RIGHTS AROUND THE WORLD_** Landmark lawsuits, international wins, and a galvanized global movement— _this_ is what you made possible in 2024. With your generosity and partnership, the Center for Reproductive Rights is leading the fight for reproductive freedom—and we're not done yet.

[**Take a look at some of what your support made possible in 2024:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99159476/519037075/-1586972746?sourceid=1150215&utm_campaign=25emjge-1213aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=eoy&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2EwZDQ4NC00MGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JF8vy-F7hiFdgO8JmsTV7nNX9MiaWw3Hm1na6FP1IZs=&emci=460a7c26-46be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=a3a0d484-40c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=954237)
* **Seven U.S. states vote for constitutional protection for abortion or reproductive freedom.**
Millions voted to enshrine abortion rights in their state constitutions, including in Colorado, where the Center helped support the effort to enshrine these protections. In Missouri, voters overturned a total abortion ban for the first time.
* **A landmark case challenging Texas's dangerous abortion bans.**
The Center represented 20 brave plaintiffs whose lives and health were threatened by Texas's extreme abortion bans. Although the Texas Supreme Court denied their claims, these women continue to advocate for justice—and their stories are featured in the powerful documentary _Zurawski v Texas,_ which reveals the gut-wrenching realities of abortion bans.
* **Affirming the right to maternal health care in Kenya.**
The Court of Appeal of Kenya affirmed the right to respectful maternal health care in the case of Josephine Majani—a pregnant woman who was physically and verbally abused by hospital staff. This landmark victory is a triumph for maternal health care rights in Kenya and across the continent.
* **Court wins in Kansas, Michigan, Hawai'i and more.**
Thanks to your support, we acted swiftly to combat abortion restrictions and secured monumental victories in 2024: Michigan state courts blocked three abortion restrictions, Kansas courts reaffirmed the constitutional right to abortion, and in Hawai'i, courts ruled native Hawaiian midwives can resume pregnancy and birth care.
* **Protecting and defending medication abortion.**
While the U.S. Supreme Court upheld access to abortion medication, Louisiana's harmful restrictions now classify these FDA-approved drugs as controlled substances, which will result in critical delays in emergency care. The Center is prepared to challenge harmful attacks on this essential and safe medicine.

These are just a few examples of the important work you make possible—and there is so much work to be done in the year to come as we prepare to fight the devastating Project 2025 agenda.

[**Strengthen the fight for our fundamental rights with your year-end gift. Every dollar will be matched 5X, giving us the critical resources we need to fight back in 2025!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99159478/519037077/-1586972746?sourceid=1150215&utm_campaign=25emjge-1213aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=eoy&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2EwZDQ4NC00MGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JF8vy-F7hiFdgO8JmsTV7nNX9MiaWw3Hm1na6FP1IZs=&emci=460a7c26-46be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=a3a0d484-40c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=954237)

name: Tim Kaine and Anne Holton
subject: Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful holiday week!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Friends, I hope you’re enjoying a restful and joyful holiday week with loved ones.
Anne and I are so grateful to be connecting with our kids and extended family this week. In times of uncertainty, spending time with family reminds me why I am committed to this work: I care about our communities, our Commonwealth, and working with others to make the world a brighter, fairer, and more just place for all.
On Christmas, we reflect on the enduring message of a young couple turned away because there was no room for them, only to give birth to their child in a humble stable.
The world is full of families seeking refuge just like that young couple — from war, starvation, addiction, illness, loneliness, violence, depression, climate disaster. Some halfway around the world, and some in our own neighborhoods. The Christmas message challenges us to be innkeepers ourselves amid our brothers and sisters in need: Will we say there’s no room at the inn, or will we work to support them however we can?
As we look to the future, that message is more important than ever before. So this holiday season, while we’re celebrating and relaxing with family, we will also be looking ahead to next year and thinking about the work we can do to live out the true Christmas spirit in 2025 and beyond.
We hope you will join us in these reflections, and have a wonderful holiday with loved ones.
Blessings and thanks from our family to yours!
Tim & Anne
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
P.O. Box 239
Alexandria, VA 22313
United States

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: Wishing you a peaceful holiday season
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
As the year draws to a close and we look ahead to 2025, I am sending warmest wishes to you for a peaceful and joyful holiday season.
I am so grateful to you for your engagement in and commitment to our work together. We know the year ahead will bring some challenges as well as opportunities. And my hope is that the joy, love, and peace of this season of thanksgiving and celebration will last all through the new year.
From our home to yours, Scott and I and our entire family wish you and your loved ones the happiest of holidays.
LizzieSignature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]
3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098

LizzieSignature [] 3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098 PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: www.lizziefletcher.com []

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Thank you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

There’s no denying that 2024 has been a long and difficult year. Before
our team logs off for the holidays, I wanted to personally say thank
you, Peter.

Everyone at Justice Democrats is extremely grateful for the grassroots
support that makes our work possible and for your shared commitment to
building a better future together, even during these uncertain and
challenging times.

Things will not be easy under a second Trump presidency and right-wing
control of Congress in 2025, but know this: we will stand side by side
with each other, fight for freedom and justice for all, and continue our
work to transform the Democratic Party for the better.

Our biggest takeaway from the past year? The Democratic Party has lost
touch with working-class people while cozying up to corporations,
billionaires, and super PACs.

After the November election results, this Party should take a long look in
the mirror, clean house, and finally pass the torch to the next generation
of leaders who represent the working class. Thus far, they’ve continued to
point the finger elsewhere while keeping the same old, out-of-touch
members in positions of leadership, signaling they have learned nothing —
so come January, it’s time for us to turn up the pressure.

Justice Democrats was founded to build people power in our country by
finding and electing a bloc of working-class leaders to Congress who
reject corporate PAC money and truly put people first. We defied the odds
when we recruited working-class champions like Summer Lee and AOC to
replace corporate, Democratic incumbents — and won.

Now, we must rise to the occasion and do it again. There is a vacuum of
leadership at the federal level that can be filled by billionaire-backed
candidates or by working people. Our goal is to make sure it’s with

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats There’s no denying that 2024 has been a long and difficult year. Before our team logs off for the holidays, I wanted to personally say thank you, Peter. Everyone at Justice Democrats is extremely grateful for the grassroots support that makes our work possible and for your shared commitment to building a better future together, even during these uncertain and challenging times. Things will not be easy under a second Trump presidency and right-wing control of Congress in 2025, but know this: we will stand side by side with each other, fight for freedom and justice for all, and continue our work to transform the Democratic Party for the better. Our biggest takeaway from the past year? The Democratic Party has lost touch with working-class people while cozying up to corporations, billionaires, and super PACs. After the November election results, this Party should take a long look in the mirror, clean house, and finally pass the torch to the next generation of leaders who represent the working class. Thus far, they’ve continued to point the finger elsewhere while keeping the same old, out-of-touch members in positions of leadership, signaling they have learned nothing — so come January, it’s time for us to turn up the pressure. Justice Democrats was founded to build people power in our country by finding and electing a bloc of working-class leaders to Congress who reject corporate PAC money and truly put people first. We defied the odds when we recruited working-class champions like Summer Lee and AOC to replace corporate, Democratic incumbents — and won. Now, we must rise to the occasion and do it again. There is a vacuum of leadership at the federal level that can be filled by billionaire-backed candidates or by working people. Our goal is to make sure it’s with working people by finding the next generation of candidates to run for Congress and challenge corporate Democrats in 2026. If you can, please make an end-of-year donation to directly fuel our work and ensure we’re ready for every fight ahead in 2025 and beyond. MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=42ec068b8f5542879c74408e95ad28ad&_e=uP2FY2OcX5xu-l9Rh-Vh-6t3L6AsuxGMaN-7gADZOlSVxBfbPJeu2HzJIw0kQ1vyU3SXIvH9Q67w6KjjJoRcLXW8ogLIsvw1XdxsAKatukZsfdkUAcvtvO0iMzKZxQssmyL8X5911LLHWuupWEwmNCEBhRm2k-dZkROKc8VH5FJ7z-6Ob2cc_9T9D0wXV8dXB3IkYNztmOL3RNoXGzmaLLEUr_CqWfMmNeZX5-BeZwFnGVbudylvxsbceT5zhsyOYcjmWg-pfqYBLcXg-btf4zN7REdVwipEr0SzEdloQPWA-WPox0Am3cwykAOU8MB3k7lWJVUWXeM2ncFbJ-ZOB6gev-Ud2F6Upq1mAlGgeMdUsvBkVfpzm_lnDDnPZKpr9MqjFCkWdUAYjngb1CRGjFu7O30AGbWSQNluLRT0wjs%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=42ec068b8f5542879c74408e95ad28ad&_e=uP2FY2OcX5xu-l9Rh-Vh-6t3L6AsuxGMaN-7gADZOlSVxBfbPJeu2HzJIw0kQ1vyU3SXIvH9Q67w6KjjJoRcLXW8ogLIsvw1XdxsAKatukZsfdkUAcvtvO0iMzKZxQssmyL8X5911LLHWuupWEwmNCEBhRm2k-dZkROKc8VH5FJ7z-6Ob2cc_9T9D0wXV8dXB3IkYNztmOL3RNoXGzmaLLEUr_CqWfMmNeZX5-BeZwFnGVbudylvxsbceT5zhsyOYcjmWg-pfqYBLcXg-btf497LSuWDqknKCYc2R-8sFiihmzugaFZM4FVakaySJM-JOQuemPlRZr4dheoijR0GFjx6p6td86eF1-AjpFFeltDFSAc_wOmU4ESfbjTWWqtM1URlbooG_N1ToB8krYrdhamDStrOd0IOpo7qF82Fars%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=42ec068b8f5542879c74408e95ad28ad&_e=uP2FY2OcX5xu-l9Rh-Vh-6t3L6AsuxGMaN-7gADZOlSVxBfbPJeu2HzJIw0kQ1vyU3SXIvH9Q67w6KjjJoRcLXW8ogLIsvw1XdxsAKatukZsfdkUAcvtvO0iMzKZxQssmyL8X5911LLHWuupWEwmNCEBhRm2k-dZkROKc8VH5FJ7z-6Ob2cc_9T9D0wXV8dXB3IkYNztmOL3RNoXGzmaLLEUr_CqWfMmNeZX5-BeZwFnGVbudylvxsbceT5zhsyOYcjmWg-pfqYBLcXg-btf41qKSoNLNTf0CRQCN6StBP_E-y4lS7eeVUKE5QHroLYHbHL-Z-Xw1401xYw3Yiloh4XUZ5F9uCVpDYDS1lJgg4-NFwKYlake2xIt6OfRofG9YaXD4ZWtc00IAf6kGTErEoJWYCGyZd8XkC_w7RcbnPY%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Fellow Patriot, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=42ec068b8f5542879c74408e95ad28ad&_e=uP2FY2OcX5xu-l9Rh-Vh-6t3L6AsuxGMaN-7gADZOlSVxBfbPJeu2HzJIw0kQ1vyU3SXIvH9Q67w6KjjJoRcLXW8ogLIsvw1XdxsAKatukZsfdkUAcvtvO0iMzKZxQssmyL8X5911LLHWuupWEwmNCEBhRm2k-dZkROKc8VH5FJ7z-6Ob2cc_9T9D0wXV8dXB3IkYNztmOL3RNoXGzmaLLEUr_CqWfMmNeZX5-BeZwFnGVbudylvxsbceT5zhsyOYcjmWg-pfqYBLcXg-btf409M5DfpGk7RZgZUoPCJ9tbJJqEjDeiBQl_REh_7kG_3vyFXWQ8CvKbm8orREViEZMlYGWAuugvN44BOMI87MYYXzsQe5NO1bQERQ8vs67YChqlYR-QhVlOsjaol_uVJftjG4JG9wZGWelWnZEbEZUg%3D)

Kari Lake

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Reflecting on the year with gratitude and hope
body:
alt [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP33/1/100067/images/LOGO.jpg]
Friends,
This time of year is often one for reflection, and as we count down the final days to Christmas and celebrate the start of Hanukkah, I wanted to take a moment to thank you – from the bottom of my heart – for all of your incredible support this year.
Whether you knocked on doors, made calls, shared our message, or donated to keep us going, you’ve been part of something truly special.
This season is about gratitude, and I am so grateful for the community we’ve built together.
I hope you’re as proud as I am to have been a part of the strongest, most aggressive, and highest fundraising campaign to go up against Jordan in the history of his career. No, we didn’t get the win this time, but we put him on notice and made him spend A LOT of money! HA! He was forced to create a fake commercial about himself portraying himself as innocent, productive, and diversified! You know he hated doing that. HAHAHA!
All I want for the holidays and the future is a Congress that fights for everyday Americans, and that’s why I remain determined to send Jim Jordan and his ULTRA-MAGA cronies packing. And there is no better badass boss than me to do just that.
As we look ahead to 2025, we know the road will be challenging.
Jordan and his allies will continue their relentless efforts to put corporate interests and political games over the needs of everyday people.
But we also know that we have each other – a strong, determined coalition ready to fight for our seniors, protect our veterans, secure our rights, and ensure every family has a fair shot.
This holiday season, I’m wishing you and your loved ones joy, warmth, and time to recharge for the work ahead.
Together, we’ve already shown the strength of our movement, and I know that 2025 will be a year of new opportunities to make meaningful change.
If you’re able to, please consider making a contribution today to help us start the new year strong. Every dollar will go toward building the foundation for what’s next. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-c2g-post-elec?refcode=20241223_holiday_message_link]
Thank you for everything, and happy holidays to you and yours.
Working for US,
Tamie Wilson

Tamie Wilson For US
273 Saratoga St
Delaware, OH 43015
United States

| | | **We’re putting Republican Senators on notice: if you vote for Trump’s terrible cabinet picks, we’ll vote them OUT in 2026.
**

Donald Trump has been indicted in four criminal cases, convicted in one, and charged in several civil cases, and he’s filling his cabinet with ex-cons, sexual predators, and billionaire Bond villains, endangering our democracy. Picks including Peter Navarro, Charles Kushner, Pete Hegseth, RFK Jr, Mehmet Oz and Linda McMahon have all been credibly accused, and in some cases convicted of wrongdoings, yet they are being rewarded with power. **Donald Trump is constructing a criminal state because there is no better way to undermine democracy and the rule of law than making criminals our political leaders.** We’re raising money now to bring back our anti-MAGA billboard campaigns in key states we need to take back Congress in 2026 - especially targeting Republican Senators who confirm Trump’s terrible nominees. clean_body: | | | We’re putting Republican Senators on notice: if you vote for Trump’s terrible cabinet picks, we’ll vote them OUT in 2026. Donald Trump has been indicted in four criminal cases, convicted in one, and charged in several civil cases, and he’s filling his cabinet with ex-cons, sexual predators, and billionaire Bond villains, endangering our democracy. Picks including Peter Navarro, Charles Kushner, Pete Hegseth, RFK Jr, Mehmet Oz and Linda McMahon have all been credibly accused, and in some cases convicted of wrongdoings, yet they are being rewarded with power. Donald Trump is constructing a criminal state because there is no better way to undermine democracy and the rule of law than making criminals our political leaders. We’re raising money now to bring back our anti-MAGA billboard campaigns in key states we need to take back Congress in 2026 - especially targeting Republican Senators who confirm Trump’s terrible nominees. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Trump's disregard for the rule of law is alarming. His actions highlight a blatant effort to establish a government that prioritizes personal gain over public service. This is not the America we believe in. The United States stands for justice, equality, and the rule of law. We cannot allow Trump and his MAGA Republicans to undermine these core values. Their vision is not one of hope and progress, but of division and corruption. Trump’s cabinet picks are an effort to prepare Americans to accept anything from the government for fear of the consequences of stepping out of line.** Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: Dick Durbin
subject: From my family to yours: Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

#
Peter,
I wanted to take a moment to wish you Happy Holidays!
On behalf of the Durbin family, I’m wishing everyone a holiday season full of love and comfort with the ones you care about most. In the midst of a changing world, we should take a moment to appreciate this time to be together with family and friends.
More importantly, the holiday season reminds us about why we continue to fight for something bigger than ourselves. So even though we have a long road ahead to make progress, take this moment to decompress, reset, and get right back to work in making this world just a little bit better.
Again, I wish you all a safe and wonderful holiday season.
Sincerely,
Dick Durbin

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood groomers
body:
As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Conservative, As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want to say: **_You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children._** Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e15ecd4e25504c5688c7c4b007e03548&_e=kvs6d2Ti35nIVlbsRVawlFu3LLPUC7WE_iHCw-gtidQF3YQ-1GlunqOp46jlopWYwb6DKHsDIYVGT6BepX9-EFpfGyPkO5BYTfTG0VAnABF933abfFCCTDETFnHDU6TTBuTxclKoLlynMyfhlZRyzm3In5baSfbjagm78BU79ocNeja6P1WEqNKc_NV1CtqzPrEUVOZQBzF4Z2zLkeDe4zjbhSo20gVgbCdNENdlihNW5o2wGNKuyFCUSPeoe6u_K09bBOyp4jiYtWE4MVJz5k_cwZRtGPQYwWAGStJ65UvL_VuVwYtDcI0XUkenIcjiOeKW1pKnJnkklJ7VGsorAHih_5I9P5bNbzJamtM0ieP3Y7HpoGzHizPCqMOvXyQKj-RGDB_ZtsGJqbn1C74XWA%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e15ecd4e25504c5688c7c4b007e03548&_e=kvs6d2Ti35nIVlbsRVawlFu3LLPUC7WE_iHCw-gtidQF3YQ-1GlunqOp46jlopWYwb6DKHsDIYVGT6BepX9-EFpfGyPkO5BYTfTG0VAnABF933abfFCCTDETFnHDU6TTBuTxclKoLlynMyfhlZRyzm3In5baSfbjagm78BU79ocNeja6P1WEqNKc_NV1CtqzPrEUVOZQBzF4Z2zLkeDe4zjbhSo20gVgbCdNENdlihNW5o2wGNKuyFCUSPeoe6u_m0EZOHfmEVCkfTKR1X79x3gB8dW7jII2fVYqfU_RL9H9r3JBZ-ovx31PJijCeZNOo_-Qkh07LVD6FQDLNSjhg6neLb9_pIiDe4N6QfpeBITZHZxuJcIVwQsQviucG7qV9HP2a_ZeLRcRXv1DuB1vlA%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e15ecd4e25504c5688c7c4b007e03548&_e=kvs6d2Ti35nIVlbsRVawlFu3LLPUC7WE_iHCw-gtidQF3YQ-1GlunqOp46jlopWYwb6DKHsDIYVGT6BepX9-EFpfGyPkO5BYTfTG0VAnABF933abfFCCTDETFnHDU6TTBuTxclKoLlynMyfhlZRyzm3In5baSfbjagm78BU79ocNeja6P1WEqNKc_NV1CtqzPrEUVOZQBzF4Z2zLkeDe4zjbhSo20gVgbCdNENdlihNW5o2wGNKuyFCUSPeoe6u_TigpywuQPaK_HcX50gX5XDrqJKP3b9R_F2xXeo61d5e0bdMCNtftsc5L7vrpjzw_DFAHpZPDw7KBeZoFGEdpN7z-H7tsJFSXUCske_9YNTQRwVCB6JZ_ZWowVlPRGuBrLiVMoFiTFD-ecTs0jnyArw%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e15ecd4e25504c5688c7c4b007e03548&_e=kvs6d2Ti35nIVlbsRVawlFu3LLPUC7WE_iHCw-gtidQF3YQ-1GlunqOp46jlopWYwb6DKHsDIYVGT6BepX9-EFpfGyPkO5BYTfTG0VAnABF933abfFCCTDETFnHDU6TTBuTxclKoLlynMyfhlZRyzm3In5baSfbjagm78BU79ocNeja6P1WEqNKc_NV1CtqzPrEUVOZQBzF4Z2zLkeDe4zjbhSo20gVgbCdNENdlihNW5o2wGNKuyFCUSPeoe6u_QVwvpWxNW0ln1jb8DlX0oWzObG1RY0R2lpn5IZY6rxfCN2QIkzu3x8NSdyjN614tlfworXh3DEbF1bYk_KMyVnq37laRkFxz3Hn0i4Wf8YLkk2Zz8IG6fzZ0LthyFMW3kcPMh6QLC7cPIR8FOF230A%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=e15ecd4e25504c5688c7c4b007e03548&_e=kvs6d2Ti35nIVlbsRVawlFu3LLPUC7WE_iHCw-gtidQF3YQ-1GlunqOp46jlopWYwb6DKHsDIYVGT6BepX9-EFpfGyPkO5BYTfTG0VAnABF933abfFCCTDETFnHDU6TTBuTxclKoLlynMyfhlZRyzm3In5baSfbjagm78BU79ocNeja6P1WEqNKc_NV1CtqzPrEUVOZQBzF4Z2zLkeDe4zjbhSo20gVgbCdNENdlihNW5o2wGNKuyFCUSPeoe6u_wlE_mrWNgleT6kvgYzn9zj7XcNNcZPzvx4bdQQzTYxjX0su1xp_mpZYHn_kolkkArg4bQoIQeBvxJF-S7mRBHRhnsBEvJcCjEfkxTd-IX3n-7Sg0yDCnVrFkQeW2PMxpGS7_CitApvP0VI830h6i-Q%3D%3D)
---

name: River Gassen
subject: Warm Holiday Wishes from River Gassen
body:
🎄 A Season of Gratitude and New Beginnings | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us9.campaign-archive.com/?e=3818d77efc&u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=4c57c431f1)
---
| | | | |
# 🎄 A Season of Gratitude and New Beginnings
---
| To my dear supporters,

As the holiday season surrounds us with its spirit of hope, generosity, and community, I want to take a moment to share my heartfelt gratitude for all your support this year. In November, we made history with the highest margin of support for any Democrat in this district—a testament to our shared vision for our community. Whether you’ve contributed your time, resources, or words of encouragement, your belief in our campaign has meant everything to me.

Your belief in our vision inspired me to keep fighting. Together, we’ve built incredible momentum. From standing up for affordable housing and equitable education to fighting to keep Space Command in Colorado, our shared vision for a brighter future is resonating across this district. I know we can go even further in 2026.

As we look to the new year, we’re looking at ways to kickstart our campaign. This starts with small monthly contributions that we know will add up into success. Your support now will ensure we have the resources to amplify our message, connect with voters, and challenge the status quo.

Would you consider making a contribution today as part of your holiday giving?

---
[Donate Here](https://rivergassenforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=9adf85df7f&e=3818d77efc)
| Every dollar helps us stay competitive in this race and bring meaningful change to our community. The sooner we can assemble our war chest - the greater we will be able to multiply it. $20 a month will go a long way right now - especially when we get 100s of supporters chipping in this way.

Contributions made before December 31st will be the showcase of support we demonstrate in the first FEC filing of the 2026 campaign. We need the attention of the DCCC and other organizations to flip this seat - and it starts with you.

Thank you for being part of this journey. Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful holiday season filled with peace, love, and hope.
Warmly,
River Gassen
Democratic Candidate for Colorado’s 5th Congressional District, 2026

---
| | | | | [](https://rivergassenforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=8dd13fd40e&e=3818d77efc)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: A flood of unqualified, unelected sycophants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Team -- the nonstop flood of unqualified nominees who are only being appointed because of their loyalty shows that, once directed to follow the playbook of Project 2025 -- these nominees will follow their orders and scramble over each other to show that they are the most loyal. Our democracy will be cast aside for approval from on high.
How do we know? Job seekers for the Trump administration are being told to submit their resumes on the Project 2025 website. Then they are being told they'll only be hired for a job if they've been loyal enough.
Stand with us and add your signature to tell Congress, the Judiciary, and state leaders that they must reject Trump and Heritage's frightening Project 2025 blueprint >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122324_1&amount=25]
Friends, There’s a lot of uncertainty ahead – for our country, our democracy, and our rights. We know that's bringing a lot of us down, and you're not wrong to feel down.
But here’s something we know for sure – we must immediately prepare to push back against Trump's anti-democracy Project 2025 agenda:
* Criminalizing voters: cracking down on simple voting mistakes using a so-called “Election Crimes Branch” – which has never been done by any president from any political party.

* Installing partisan loyalists: Immediately firing thousands of qualified civil servants at every level of the federal government and replacing them with ideologues willing to push an extreme political agenda.

* Stripping away our rights: Deploying the National Guard to crack down on protests, robbing us of fair representation by rigging the U.S. Census, and dramatically increasing the President’s power to act without Congressional oversight.
Send letters to Congress and your state legislators now: We must resist this anti-democracy agenda >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
Project 2025 is a 1,000-page agenda handcrafted by the Heritage Foundation for a Trump presidency – and we have every reason to believe Trump will try to follow through on it.
Just look at his first term as president – where he enacted nearly two-thirds of the extreme policies the Heritage Foundation laid out for him.
And now in his second term, our system of checks and balances is going to be more important than ever – to limit Trump’s authoritarian ambitions and defend the bedrock values of our democracy: the rule of law, the right to vote, and the freedom to protest.
We can’t stand by in silence as our democracy is dismantled. Add your name if you agree: Congress, the Judiciary, and state leaders must reject Trump and Heritage's dangerous Project 2025 agenda >> [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://act.commoncause.org/petitions/stop-trumps-anti-democracy-project-2025-agenda?source=110624swap-ifvap&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122324_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122324_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122324_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=122324_1&amount=25]

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Happy Holidays
body:
This is a special time. I remember as a kid being thrilled when holiday lights went up in the neighborhood. | |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=16839f7bda&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
|
---
|
---
| Happy Holidays! We hope that you are enjoying the holiday season with friends and family.

This is a special time. I remember as a kid being thrilled when holiday lights went up in the neighborhood. Evelyn and I now do our best to create those kinds of memories for our children. A big part of that is spending time with their grandparents. My father is now entering his mid-eighties and doesn’t travel very well, so we go visit him.

Occasionally my boys will quarrel or call each other annoying. I try to tell them that family is the most important thing, and they are very lucky to have each other. When you’re a kid, you see a ton of your sibling because you’re trapped in a car together for hours on end. When you’re older, life gets busy and it’s easy to go a while without seeing family members unless you try.

I’ve always seen the Holiday Season as a time to commune with those closest to you. Whether it’s friends or family or colleagues or neighbors, let the people in your life know how much they mean to you. Sometimes hearing from you will make an enormous difference.

Happy Holidays! Give your family a hug for us and see you in 2025!

With warmth and gratitude,

Andrew, Evelyn, Christopher and Damian
---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=fdcb606301&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=cfba54fd03&e=0f227c2ae3)

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Your Christmas list
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Leaders We Deserve could really use your support right now.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241223-1&t=1&akid=1552%2E587540%2EeKbcOA)
Peter, Christmas is only two days away. 🎅🎄🎁
Hopefully, you’ve finished your Christmas shopping by now. It’s okay if you still need to buy some last-minute gifts, though. _(We don’t know what to get our weird uncles, either. When in doubt, you can’t go wrong with a gift card.)_
If you’ve got one more spot on your Christmas list, **Leaders We Deserve could really use your support right now.**
We’ve got some **big end-of-year fundraising goals – _and we are 100% people-powered_** — so we rely on grassroots donations from folks like you to elect the next generation of progressives.
**[Peter, can you make a contribution – $5 or anything you can give today – to ensure Leaders We Deserve is ready to keep fighting in 2025?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241223-1?refcode=em20241223-1552&amount=5&refcode2=1552_587540_eKbcOA&akid=1552%2E587540%2EeKbcOA)**

Your support is what powers this work every day. Thank you for being a part of it.
**Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays, Peter!**
Leaders We Deserve
