body:
Big plans. Bold goals. Are you in?

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99172692/519078959/1328794144?refcode=ea.21ca9f24-54c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ms=ea.21ca9f24-54c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxY2E5ZjI0LTU0YzEtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=csJTQs_nUHY6r88cfL6su72fQ1qdX5fh8l1piJHHc7c=&emci=ec140532-49be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=21ca9f24-54c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=4823105)
---
I’ve been reflecting on all we’ve accomplished together this year — and I couldn’t be prouder. Big Oil tried to push dangerous ballot measures in Washington State and California, but together, we fought back and won. We supported bold climate leaders in overlooked regions where every vote counted — like Marcus Bush in California, whose victory by 254 votes secured a critical seat for climate action. And, thanks to you, we helped elect _dozens_ of champions around the country ready to fight for bold climate solutions and protect our communities in 2025. This is what grassroots power looks like. But here’s the truth: our work isn’t over. 2025 will be a make-or-break year for climate progress. Trump and the Big Oil giants are laying the groundwork to dismantle clean energy programs, slash environmental protections, and flood our skies with pollution. We can’t afford to lose a single moment — or a single opportunity to fight back. That’s why JanePAC is setting an urgent goal: **Raise $25,000 by midnight on December 31. This funding will set the stage for us to hit the ground running in 2025, stronger than ever.** Here’s how you can help: **_[With everything on the line, now is the perfect time to make your first donation. Your contribution — no matter the size — will directly fuel the fight to elect climate champions, counter Big Oil’s dirty money, and derail Trump’s anti-climate agenda. This is the moment to act. Will you chip in toward our $25,000 goal to kick off the new year on a strong foot?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99172699/519078965/2105508926?refcode=ea.21ca9f24-54c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ms=ea.21ca9f24-54c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxY2E5ZjI0LTU0YzEtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=csJTQs_nUHY6r88cfL6su72fQ1qdX5fh8l1piJHHc7c=)_** | [**I’M READY TO HELP**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99172700/519078966/2105508926?refcode=ea.21ca9f24-54c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ms=ea.21ca9f24-54c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxY2E5ZjI0LTU0YzEtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=csJTQs_nUHY6r88cfL6su72fQ1qdX5fh8l1piJHHc7c=)
---
Let’s kick off 2025 with the resources, momentum, and determination we need to defeat Big Oil.
xx Jane

clean_body: Big plans. Bold goals. Are you in? | I’ve been reflecting on all we’ve accomplished together this year — and I couldn’t be prouder. Big Oil tried to push dangerous ballot measures in Washington State and California, but together, we fought back and won. We supported bold climate leaders in overlooked regions where every vote counted — like Marcus Bush in California, whose victory by 254 votes secured a critical seat for climate action. And, thanks to you, we helped elect dozens of champions around the country ready to fight for bold climate solutions and protect our communities in 2025. This is what grassroots power looks like. But here’s the truth: our work isn’t over. 2025 will be a make-or-break year for climate progress. Trump and the Big Oil giants are laying the groundwork to dismantle clean energy programs, slash environmental protections, and flood our skies with pollution. We can’t afford to lose a single moment — or a single opportunity to fight back. That’s why JanePAC is setting an urgent goal: Raise $25,000 by midnight on December 31. This funding will set the stage for us to hit the ground running in 2025, stronger than ever. Here’s how you can help: = | = Let’s kick off 2025 with the resources, momentum, and determination we need to defeat Big Oil. xx Jane = Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address and sometimes takes a few days to update. If you have donated — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting JanePAC. | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Health insurance lobbyists are attacking me because I support Medicare For All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

FIRST: Americans flooded social media with heartbreaking stories of denied health insurance claims, many resulting in needless suffering and insurmountable medical debt.

THEN: I argued on ABC’s This Week that Medicare for All is the solution to the for-profit healthcare crisis and that Congress can make that happen.

NOW: I’m being attacked by major health insurance companies profiting from the financial suffering of millions of patients.

Before I explain, will you rush a $3 contribution to my campaign to let me know you have my back and help me keep fighting for quality, affordable healthcare for all Americans [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/medicare-for-all-fundraiser?refcode=20241223-lift]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/medicare-for-all-fundraiser?refcode=20241223-lift]

Healthcare is a right, not a privilege. In the world’s wealthiest country, there is no reason people should be denied care or face financial ruin just for getting sick or injured.

Now critics are lambasting me with the rhetorical question: “What choice do we have?”

It’s simple: We can follow the example set by the rest of the world and establish a universal healthcare system. Although the United States spends more on healthcare per person [https://www.commonwealthfund.org/publications/issue-briefs/2023/jan/us-health-care-global-perspective-2022] than any other high-income country, 85 million Americans are left uninsured, underinsured, or struggling to meet rising treatment costs. Meanwhile, private healthcare companies rake in billions in profit [https://www.valuepenguin.com/largest-health-insurance-companies] every year.

To put it another way, the U.S. spends 17.8 percent of our GDP on healthcare, yet 1 in 12 Americans [https://www.pgpf.org/article/the-share-of-americans-without-health-insurance-in-2023-remained-low/] lack health insurance.

I won’t let private health insurance companies profit from people’s suffering, and I refuse to accept their PAC and lobbying money to maintain an inhumane status quo. But I need to know that you have my back. Will you rush a contribution to my campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/medicare-for-all-fundraiser?refcode=20241223-lift]

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/medicare-for-all-fundraiser?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20241223-lift_express_lane_10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/medicare-for-all-fundraiser?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20241223-lift_express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/medicare-for-all-fundraiser?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20241223-lift_express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/medicare-for-all-fundraiser?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20241223-lift_express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/medicare-for-all-fundraiser?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20241223-lift_express_lane_250]
DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/medicare-for-all-fundraiser?express_lane_other=true&refcode=20241223-lift_express_lane_other]

Thank you for your support, your activism, and everything you do.

Onward,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/medicare-for-all-fundraiser?refcode=20241223-lift]

name: American Freedom Report
subject: 50-year Wall Street legend: “Everything just changed for U.S. stocks”
body:
But one of my most senior analysts has been sending this around – and it's startling.

# Is Your Portfolio Caught in A "Post-Election Trap"?
* * *
Most investors don't see [the problem](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Qv_eiPRV-bSG3nZzMfyeWg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTDZaP0SSaHR0cHM6Ly90cmFja2luZy5jbGlja3N0cmlwZTEuY29tL2FmZl9jP29mZmVyX2lkPTIxMzkmYWZmX2lkPTEwOTQmc291cmNlPUVtYWlsJnN1YjE9e3RyYW5zYWN0aW9uX2lkfSZzdWIyPXBvcDEyMDEyNGEmc3ViMz02NDgmc3ViND1STS1BRlItMjAyNDEyMjNXA3NwY0IKZ2VxomlntgsPB1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) yet... and many think this current rally could keep going for months or even years.
But one of my most senior analysts has been sending this around - and it's startling.
The last time the country looked like it does today, the "rally" at the time didn't keep going at all.
In fact, the market abruptly crashed...
But that was just the beginning of the problem.
Next...
Stocks proceeded to go nowhere for 16 years. And that _still_ wasn't the worst part...
The worst part was, by the end, many investors lost 80% of their biggest positions in real terms.
That number is hard to imagine... but this really happened - at a time in American history that looks eerily similar to today.
I can't possibly explain this all in a single e-mail.
[So it's best you go hear it directly from senior analyst Dan Ferris](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Qv_eiPRV-bSG3nZzMfyeWg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTDZaP0SSaHR0cHM6Ly90cmFja2luZy5jbGlja3N0cmlwZTEuY29tL2FmZl9jP29mZmVyX2lkPTIxMzkmYWZmX2lkPTEwOTQmc291cmNlPUVtYWlsJnN1YjE9e3RyYW5zYWN0aW9uX2lkfSZzdWIyPXBvcDEyMDEyNGEmc3ViMz02NDgmc3ViND1STS1BRlItMjAyNDEyMjNXA3NwY0IKZ2VxomlntgsPB1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~).
Dan once wrote to an entire list of people and told them one of the world's biggest banks was about to collapse. He wrote these exact words:
_"These guys are hiding something. I expect a wipeout."_
It was March 2008, and he was writing about Lehman Brothers.
Few wanted to hear it.
But Dan was right about Lehman and the mortgage crisis. Lehman collapsed 5 months later.
And Dan has been right about nearly every bubble of the last 25 years including the COVID crash, the collapse of crypto in 2017, and the end of the Nasdaq bubble in 2021.
That's why Dan's work is followed by employees at banks like Wells Fargo, Barclays, and UBS. And it's why he has been featured in publications like _Barron's_ and Bloomberg.
Now that the election is over... as he puts it:
"_Millions are about to be blindsided_ _unless they take the time now to prepare. The last time anything close to this happened in America, our economy suffered a large surprise crash. The market netted 0% over the following sixteen years. And by the end, adjusted for inflation, American investors lost 80% of their wealth. This time, I expect much worse."_
To defend yourself - and potentially profit...
He recommends you consider [moving money to a new type of investment, right away](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Qv_eiPRV-bSG3nZzMfyeWg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTDZaP0SSaHR0cHM6Ly90cmFja2luZy5jbGlja3N0cmlwZTEuY29tL2FmZl9jP29mZmVyX2lkPTIxMzkmYWZmX2lkPTEwOTQmc291cmNlPUVtYWlsJnN1YjE9e3RyYW5zYWN0aW9uX2lkfSZzdWIyPXBvcDEyMDEyNGEmc3ViMz02NDgmc3ViND1STS1BRlItMjAyNDEyMjNXA3NwY0IKZ2VxomlntgsPB1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~). (It's not gold, real estate, or cryptocurrency.)
Because time is running low, Ferris has agreed to [publish his latest findings online, for free](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Qv_eiPRV-bSG3nZzMfyeWg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTDZaP0SSaHR0cHM6Ly90cmFja2luZy5jbGlja3N0cmlwZTEuY29tL2FmZl9jP29mZmVyX2lkPTIxMzkmYWZmX2lkPTEwOTQmc291cmNlPUVtYWlsJnN1YjE9e3RyYW5zYWN0aW9uX2lkfSZzdWIyPXBvcDEyMDEyNGEmc3ViMz02NDgmc3ViND1STS1BRlItMjAyNDEyMjNXA3NwY0IKZ2VxomlntgsPB1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~).
[Click here to see his new message now](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Qv_eiPRV-bSG3nZzMfyeWg~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTDZaP0SSaHR0cHM6Ly90cmFja2luZy5jbGlja3N0cmlwZTEuY29tL2FmZl9jP29mZmVyX2lkPTIxMzkmYWZmX2lkPTEwOTQmc291cmNlPUVtYWlsJnN1YjE9e3RyYW5zYWN0aW9uX2lkfSZzdWIyPXBvcDEyMDEyNGEmc3ViMz02NDgmc3ViND1STS1BRlItMjAyNDEyMjNXA3NwY0IKZ2VxomlntgsPB1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~).
Regards,
Brett Aitken
Publisher, Stansberry Research
This ad is sent on behalf of Stansberry Research, 1125 N Charles St, Baltimore, MD 21201. If you would like to optout from receiving offers from Stansberry Research please [click here.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/GKQqdXuGxXyC85qS0ePULQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpTDZaP0RIaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWlyYmFya2xpZ2h0LmNvbS9vLW50dG0tcjU2LTI0OTliNmI0NTEzODQwNDllM2QwMGI4NzVhODJmNTAzVwNzcGNCCmdlcaJpZ7YLDwdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

subject: We need Kash Patel in charge of the FBI

body:

subject: Will the border finally be closed?
body:
Do you agree that illegal immigration is possibly the greatest challenge facing America today?

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=a099815b8b4e4741aa66a754ccfbdcf2&_t=Rjf_E_WWKcYUgg72VRGZ9ACcRCpWCHqXefMMfw4FhM4MSQzWOpozy6zn9zUmtLux_rADuVn0uondeCgaCuEuCWDYOemcYlvSBz7M_v_h_YKcUMupzMzkqETDr97hdxGC)_

| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a099815b8b4e4741aa66a754ccfbdcf2&_e=UVlJpPbwl3IxsjYArSvEIfZ2Z8LqxJB7QA3ABBKrp1XBflq3xm6fZPu_mzw8jRzASHmYkSvZpFtRaDhch9ThZTUCVytEU2lda-e46PVvEGl2Q2niYSax6xT8MEiHMlNlA-AwVUzyafZ9z6io6DGUfuqOGn_K7V9sx9B18tLnCXQFuo_ETpIJ6JcgC4gW8LO82esBCR0UVA962VLVzI2Q5_lVY4esUSz6m_7sBTOEkJWzedZV_Hy1lu3SJzyAZkhGxoxa8MCgOhzVRAncre1ADgGH8ansukqsYeGKx4OXbtgvGUtwqEkeTkZcwh-KOudFkLYI8kgf3Flkzpta-8Sfa8dlUZURxQqoxIKoYBt6tTs%3D)
---

| | Dear Fellow American,

Do you agree that illegal immigration is possibly the greatest challenge facing America today?

It affects so many aspects of Americans' lives. It causes crime, competition for American jobs and public health resources, and violates the rule of law.

[**But with the incoming Trump administration, you and I have a unique opportunity to end America 's border crisis once and for all.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a099815b8b4e4741aa66a754ccfbdcf2&_e=UVlJpPbwl3IxsjYArSvEIfZ2Z8LqxJB7QA3ABBKrp1XBflq3xm6fZPu_mzw8jRzASHmYkSvZpFtRaDhch9ThZTUCVytEU2lda-e46PVvEGl2Q2niYSax6xT8MEiHMlNlA-AwVUzyafZ9z6io6DGUfuqOGn_K7V9sx9B18tLnCXQFuo_ETpIJ6JcgC4gW8LO82esBCR0UVA962VLVzI2Q58qPLUCS4YHcYj-HyEuRkYLTGygKoG1BUA0n8NGEaufAxqECgFBVMS7NuCsmbUOr-wWaXeQw0tw39jLiWTAkrOxiI6fABkZLsFHS2Jl_jgbMTx1HbnJMEjYLQ6J3OH41LPGSzfPw4Ph_JdnJ7QwY3k8%3D)

Heritage Visiting Fellow Tom Homan's appointment as the next 'Border Czar' gives us the momentum we need - **but we can only promote our policy that will close the border and deport illegal aliens with YOUR support!**

Your year-end gift to The Heritage Foundation will help:
* Create and advance public policy solutions to America's border crisis.
* Place Heritage-trained patriots in the right positions to enact these crucially needed policies.
* Dismantle the administrative state the sabotages all attempts to close America's borders.
* And so much more!

After years of leftist leadership from the Biden-Harris administration, now is the time to act.

**Please make your year-end gift and activate your Heritage Foundation membership today using the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/end-of-year-campaign/**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a099815b8b4e4741aa66a754ccfbdcf2&_e=UVlJpPbwl3IxsjYArSvEIfZ2Z8LqxJB7QA3ABBKrp1XBflq3xm6fZPu_mzw8jRzASHmYkSvZpFtRaDhch9ThZTUCVytEU2lda-e46PVvEGl2Q2niYSax6xT8MEiHMlNlA-AwVUzyafZ9z6io6DGUfuqOGn_K7V9sx9B18tLnCXQFuo_ETpIJ6JcgC4gW8LO82esBCR0UVA962VLVzI2Q50sc9PRf3Y_IbzwlVaTb62wLP1Ll5aB641vl7PDfcDO_CcICP5tGv95l_EW51Yq_rAiiodya8EtzHgecnRC1Mlw1uJRei2Gfa0CyChL9p-jN9DBGaJbZQVGEnxph7XyfiXtscQ7MrKPafcxiUYcOy0w%3D)

Ending illegal immigration is critical to our nation's prosperity, safety, and to the rule of law. Your actions today are critical to this mission's success.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. With this unique opportunity to end illegal immigration, now 's the time to join The Heritage Foundation. Please activate your membership with your year-end gift today using this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/end-of-year-campaign/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a099815b8b4e4741aa66a754ccfbdcf2&_e=UVlJpPbwl3IxsjYArSvEIfZ2Z8LqxJB7QA3ABBKrp1XBflq3xm6fZPu_mzw8jRzASHmYkSvZpFtRaDhch9ThZTUCVytEU2lda-e46PVvEGl2Q2niYSax6xT8MEiHMlNlA-AwVUzyafZ9z6io6DGUfuqOGn_K7V9sx9B18tLnCXQFuo_ETpIJ6JcgC4gW8LO82esBCR0UVA962VLVzI2Q546zLZhdpXinPfFMXBM-c9F9QlG3zybLm9W__7Sxjt-OGCOKvo0zs9HHuWqwyk6OSd7LeGAZTiKEWBDk3W1Q8FpInOhGnAH7UM22GbEDEVYovQOj9qzKPhJrkw-UvW_SvuARi_AySnR93WjNRiHEvZA%3D)**

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: A defining moment for me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Only one truth kept me from giving in to fear.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/5?t=1&akid=11%2E181023%2EPEMZfm)
Team,
The holidays are a joyful time of year — but around this time four years ago, something harrowing happened to my family.
I want to tell you the story. As scary as it was, this was a defining moment for me — one that connected me with my true purpose in the fight to defend democracy.
In December 2020, **an armed mob approached my home to protest the election results.**
We began to hear their shouts as my four-year-old son peacefully watched _How the Grinch Stole Christmas_ in the living room. Obscene, violent threats came through our windows as my husband called every law enforcement agency and I tried to stay calm.
Until the mob was dispersed, my family was faced with a real, immediate threat of violence — all because of my role in finalizing the accurate election results of 2020.
It would have been easy at that moment to allow fear to overpower me. Only one truth kept me from giving in to fear: the knowledge that I always have the power to define my next step.
It wasn’t easy, but I drew on the bold spirit of past warriors in the fight for democracy — like John Lewis, who once faced a sea of Alabama state troopers in Selma and did not back down. I channeled my deepest purpose: protecting voices. Protecting votes. Preserving the right to vote and defending the democracy that has belonged to all Americans throughout history. No matter what.
I found strength in my purpose.
I didn’t let those people stop me from doing my job of securing our elections.
And I went forward with the knowledge that even in the darkest moments, there is a path forward that can be charted by standing your ground and facing down those who wield fear against you as a weapon.
That pathway of courage lives in all of us. Traveling it — together — is how we will take on the greatest fights ahead of us, including the ongoing threats to our nation’s democracy.
Thank you for hearing my story. I hope you enjoy your time with family and loved ones. I’m looking forward to going into the new year together — with a shared purpose, ready to fight.
Jocelyn Benson
Michigan Secretary of State
* * *

clean_body: Only one truth kept me from giving in to fear. Team, The holidays are a joyful time of year — but around this time four years ago, something harrowing happened to my family. I want to tell you the story. As scary as it was, this was a defining moment for me — one that connected me with my true purpose in the fight to defend democracy. In December 2020, an armed mob approached my home to protest the election results. We began to hear their shouts as my four-year-old son peacefully watched How the Grinch Stole Christmas in the living room. Obscene, violent threats came through our windows as my husband called every law enforcement agency and I tried to stay calm. Until the mob was dispersed, my family was faced with a real, immediate threat of violence — all because of my role in finalizing the accurate election results of 2020. It would have been easy at that moment to allow fear to overpower me. Only one truth kept me from giving in to fear: the knowledge that I always have the power to define my next step. It wasn’t easy, but I drew on the bold spirit of past warriors in the fight for democracy — like John Lewis, who once faced a sea of Alabama state troopers in Selma and did not back down. I channeled my deepest purpose: protecting voices. Protecting votes. Preserving the right to vote and defending the democracy that has belonged to all Americans throughout history. No matter what. I found strength in my purpose. I didn’t let those people stop me from doing my job of securing our elections. And I went forward with the knowledge that even in the darkest moments, there is a path forward that can be charted by standing your ground and facing down those who wield fear against you as a weapon. That pathway of courage lives in all of us. Traveling it — together — is how we will take on the greatest fights ahead of us, including the ongoing threats to our nation’s democracy. Thank you for hearing my story. I hope you enjoy your time with family and loved ones. I’m looking forward to going into the new year together — with a shared purpose, ready to fight. Jocelyn Benson Michigan Secretary of State Before you go... we need your help. Since her 2018 election, Secretary Benson has fought for free and fair elections. She’s on the front lines of defending and strengthening our democracy.

name: OKGOP
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
Celebrate the birthday of the Savior Jesus Christ

| [ ](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_2024_christmas_message&n=1)
---
Peter -- Merry Christmas from your friends here at the Oklahoma GOP. Christmas is a time to celebrate with loved ones and savor the moments that last a lifetime. While the days can be long, the years are often far too short. It is important to take time around the holidays to reflect and acknowledge all of the blessings bestowed unto each and every one of us. Christmas is the time when people celebrate the birthday of the Savior Jesus Christ. As scripture says the angels proclaimed at his birth: _**"Glory to God in the highest, and on earth peace, good will toward men."**_ Luke 2:14.While we are thankful for the saving grace God has shown to our nation by turning us from the path of destruction we were on, let us realize true salvation does not come through government, but only through the one true Savior, Jesus Christ. May God keep you and bless you all. For the People,

Nathan Dahm
OKGOP Chairman
[OKGOP.com](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sYhZp166jq9Rxv3Y1HmVsWvtG8NOKZjMn_AgBPli6W4&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_2024_christmas_message&n=2)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_2024_christmas_message&n=3).
You can also keep up with OKGOP on [Twitter](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=JcrYNQ7dhdufXPgOgJxNGHSsRONv6mnq7ly6aBOUvGVprSj7jfHNOpP70kR_1QLA&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_2024_christmas_message&n=4) or [Facebook](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=UQNagEd-DqbIXa37T8ODid9mG9NGbq3z9te4_riKc6EaGmrOrRzKc2wAaVTFbzRY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_2024_christmas_message&n=5).

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: My warmest wishes for the holiday season ❤️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends,
Just a few days remain in 2024 – and what a year it’s been. There were some amazing moments that I’ll never forget... and there were some deeply painful ones, for me personally and for our country.
As we say goodbye to this year and get ready to start anew, I am so thankful for you. This community inspires me every day. Your kindness, engagement, and support mean more to me than I can say.
I hope this week brings you time with loved ones, joy in your celebrations, and a chance to recharge for the year ahead.
From my heart to yours – happy holidays!
❤️ Sara

name: Bill Gray
subject: God bless us...
body:
Scripture hidden at the heart of A Christmas Carol

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e2a975c352b04928a7beb0028fdc671e&_e=FS3s9tprwDn_WBPxAIX2FWpQqeJzYwb9C6atvNH5GeaV8GehCzewj_bPLkW5jqqPstVJRAU9RdIdI0QaS5B99LLwF6SXkf6enlPJ25E__IkkGzIjJRjavddVtNmUeDjK603AyDGhSo1lkBYlImfDIK8jr3Z0qC10nSXv_65lRAtLbSI9u2rM_3Xy7clgNwEqIRSPf-OMxXPy2xIQpOd-yHU6pSuPNUT3G6j87EsSxuCx0HOQpvOUwRghWSo3MnEPobajSt-KwdT6x0KWr1e5hK1j08Oz92M0OeBha-JYW0TcCzaYil5dlx4Nb5TVdg-bpCYqJKVJD3nxA2W1qjP48BYH5cOyHhUqPgVcXSeC6yZThq-3P-sOXZCFE-tpPfWW9MQOEIl-EU_6JJKKn7shFx8OxlHhjqE-lfabKxsB2XE%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

_" Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." _

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e2a975c352b04928a7beb0028fdc671e&_e=FS3s9tprwDn_WBPxAIX2FWpQqeJzYwb9C6atvNH5GeaV8GehCzewj_bPLkW5jqqPstVJRAU9RdIdI0QaS5B99LLwF6SXkf6enlPJ25E__IkkGzIjJRjavddVtNmUeDjK603AyDGhSo1lkBYlImfDIK8jr3Z0qC10nSXv_65lRAtLbSI9u2rM_3Xy7clgNwEqIRSPf-OMxXPy2xIQpOd-yHU6pSuPNUT3G6j87EsSxuCx0HOQpvOUwRghWSo3MnEPobajSt-KwdT6x0KWr1e5hDxQRRwwqxtTgvAbPm3_e10ZHcL4E67V0yIJUsdGPcNzM151ViqZzVx9D4yLVR9_1c4OVXRwdumMqS1F6li6VKUBHn5iy3zuRvf3dV2G2gvQ5oDR0vto4xYEcoSmfR4cukR0TvztbS9S2QtP9Yd2IfY%3D)

If you've ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we've been fighting AGAINST "Obamacare", AGAINST "Medicare for All," and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to "transform" America and our elections. That's why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only razor-thin margins , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second. It's simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen. And we've got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Pete Hegseth will take time, money, and resources. Let's send a clear message: The American people will not be denied. Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement. And Pete Hegseth will be confirmed as Secretary of Defense. No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action - and with you by our side, we're an unstoppable force. But we have got to move quickly. We have just weeks - maybe days - to get out ahead of the radical Left and the RINOs - So please don 't delay! Let's make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let's show them that Election Day was just the beginning. | | Thank you, Peter! For Freedom, Rebecca Weber AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 1904 Thomas Avenue, Suite 103, Leesburg, FL 34748 | |

MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=46395877da3d478193447eac7d04dca7&_e=OvTs3ler3Bhl86v84nT_8HxIAdQ5Np7iSxc3oR-BchPsAHPhCZO6N921qOQu1nz8WiCP_fsmtKOhahq586epVV-23k4gC9AEIXRErKWMShqWnF9IUzmAd7eWra7quktMEjybm-B8kYAyfUsuJ98wdrpV3Mbu2Qwgb7BuHeg19poenmAfduqzu8J4K8kO4PDb_bfuSlcP-DDQSEpS9MIA0EY-tQjfQ07xlO6Ad7EQjJidKqY0GL0TtGDQwKAqeeCIxGZLVZTcA8MC88lEwP98J239SRSfnkKM9jkRQJOCLYDQ_1LRV34z_xHPrHKhXpHvCtzUFd1DJAmBnudBIl3tJA_ut6BPbrhuLI7XCgl7wpFfHGdfNxRWpRbYG8-AsyLM0G60aGSSHDf83NaiT7NL0cAdtWf7XxkR8-MQOVp3AFc%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=46395877da3d478193447eac7d04dca7&_e=OvTs3ler3Bhl86v84nT_8HxIAdQ5Np7iSxc3oR-BchPsAHPhCZO6N921qOQu1nz8WiCP_fsmtKOhahq586epVV-23k4gC9AEIXRErKWMShqWnF9IUzmAd7eWra7quktMEjybm-B8kYAyfUsuJ98wdrpV3Mbu2Qwgb7BuHeg19poenmAfduqzu8J4K8kO4PDb_bfuSlcP-DDQSEpS9MIA0EY-tQjfQ07xlO6Ad7EQjJidKqY0GL0TtGDQwKAqeeCI8_Nk9pkADacbeKL-v9t1NHcj29n5WOXNaC6ASY2Xku4Ei-aRNOpIIqYqoGSLymfByGlKjJ8KDmjERVWgLQVzbsc8W8O_AJmtWJhWb862EMf_meTskkSUBOX4mm7kTSv5V03wyIsQzADCi9SICRim0UAidTIdeONHJODyVW3-94U%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=46395877da3d478193447eac7d04dca7&_e=OvTs3ler3Bhl86v84nT_8HxIAdQ5Np7iSxc3oR-BchPsAHPhCZO6N921qOQu1nz8WiCP_fsmtKOhahq586epVV-23k4gC9AEIXRErKWMShqWnF9IUzmAd7eWra7quktMEjybm-B8kYAyfUsuJ98wdrpV3Mbu2Qwgb7BuHeg19poenmAfduqzu8J4K8kO4PDb_bfuSlcP-DDQSEpS9MIA0EY-tQjfQ07xlO6Ad7EQjJidKqY0GL0TtGDQwKAqeeCIftHjUKHrzy4l2GAUSDL80cRIx8RibEAdFF4kVJTf4cRJpT81fnbH9j1nH8twO-3n8lAp-Lyk3_Om4TTARRIJBUw_yXrAJ9WI3YXlNjlL8GlYsl8o0Xnqa2bshh1I134cC7pLvi5XAsSMPt3LQfH6R6NZXuErtZAB9xzfE4AnZ-I%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Fellow Patriot, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=46395877da3d478193447eac7d04dca7&_e=OvTs3ler3Bhl86v84nT_8HxIAdQ5Np7iSxc3oR-BchPsAHPhCZO6N921qOQu1nz8WiCP_fsmtKOhahq586epVV-23k4gC9AEIXRErKWMShqWnF9IUzmAd7eWra7quktMEjybm-B8kYAyfUsuJ98wdrpV3Mbu2Qwgb7BuHeg19poenmAfduqzu8J4K8kO4PDb_bfuSlcP-DDQSEpS9MIA0EY-tQjfQ07xlO6Ad7EQjJidKqY0GL0TtGDQwKAqeeCIGtURwhhJzBXHG3LL7_-gKlAgd8rQimyr542dLqARNdKmPBxn-UO_f5ZfzN01LSyUbybIu_DXF-hnw6oR0x3qT7utq2xFMMlbt2U9T8fJKW0DkG4s3XOCQC0J530XcB4H5eK19jNoKo2ABvd70YndaA3tYDSCa4aFHWlvyluLfQ0%3D)

Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas,
---

Kari Lake

clean_body: Help NDRC finish the year strong. | | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, Suite #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: GAMECHANGER ALERT! (via VPP)
subject: re: DC Statehood + 2 more Democratic Senators >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We can explain...
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85775?t=6&akid=18326%2E878179%2EoV3AfK) | [**$15,000 DC STATEHOOD FUND GOAL: RUSH $7 TO GIVE DC FAIR REPRESENTATION AND GAIN 2 MORE DEMOCRATIC SENATORS »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85775?t=7&akid=18326%2E878179%2EoV3AfK)
---
**YOU KNOW** that granting DC Statehood would almost guarantee 2 more Democratic Senators, _destroying_ the path to the Senate majority for the GOP!

**YOU KNOW** that Republicans are fighting tooth and nail to ensure DC is NEVER granted statehood — how else would they push their MAGA agenda!?

**AND YOU KNOW** that if Democrats take action now — before the GOP trifecta gets to work — we can prop up _pro-DC Statehood_ Democrats and get this done!

[So what are you waiting for!? Will you rush $7 towards our $15,000 DC Statehood Fund goal to help us make DC our 51st state and gain 2 more Democratic Senators!? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85775?t=8&akid=18326%2E878179%2EoV3AfK)
[**$15,000 DC STATEHOOD FUND GOAL: RUSH $7 TO GIVE DC FAIR REPRESENTATION AND GAIN 2 MORE DEMOCRATIC SENATORS »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85775?t=9&akid=18326%2E878179%2EoV3AfK)
---
Counting on you,

_– The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18326%2E878179%2EoV3AfK). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18326%2E878179%2EoV3AfK).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18326%2E878179%2EoV3AfK) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=18326%2E878179%2EoV3AfK). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18326%2E878179%2EoV3AfK)

body:
When you contribute $10 to activate your 2025 Membership, we will send you a personalized membership card right to your doorstep, and a generous coalition of donors will match each dollar SEVEN TIMES. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**❄️ Team DLCC’s Holiday Wish List:** **Elect** state Dems nationwide
**Protect** reproductive freedoms across the country
**Ensure** equal access to the ballot
**Defend** our democracy
**Reach 2,500 Official 2025 Members before the New Year** Our wishlist might be long, and it might be an ongoing fight to make it all a reality – but if you’re willing to help our party cross _one_ thing off today, **you can become an Official 2025 DLCC Member with a gift of $10 or more →** **[Become a 2025 DLCC Member →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsOpbiH4z4INAYfLFgFMiGKJxbSIpjzRJ5RcvAU8c-NWBnpJr5TbsFu-QUdXaPIaOaSM4os0o6AFjFytU3penli4Mb5jZ9p0O_cRVlQTqOENjS22Rm9QeazjWQVO4j6e7WrmuHy2hxWrrwpfWN4lUzEM3cT1ZZg_j31zL42-m1zF-ZQ9J2wcVc8Vz-blXJyCs6QPyVLQDoUZ85JRAd3dRU5LidqeiEFoFwpHc4pJD2CenjkCfwaFKU5hO8JeeAs_0lvf0zBABXD2VcJ4RF619j8M4NLsWy0L_rj7IIlWxK3NuDgV21m6GXhLt3g2OsQ1xQCr1KvnhPk5Tg2SiDZl5-xfN-URs4OE8kz4EwgLLl_BqU28hEB8-7fAoJfVFKUf4D2g8zIrzdmINOXCE1kNHQfoTblqwgt0o4UAS87URTWzduB_qxlrKqTYUHwHQ2_j2kgcI_zzjXoE5hW6v13oheXuo6SkWKFtNEJk1XBJEy1EY6dv7kGI2UVFBtrpGtfC8Ztud7aZUTGgk_goHokxl5oHMgHTwHKd_0Zi7VjftfseCHuqmG6KQAHZGZZ4nd_iAATlaP9YDaSstd5uYt0DT5C/4cj/ggaeE0CeQHyCeS9ZvGyTnQ/h0/h001._syBeOouyIP7Ujpk1VO0CLpl3n_z-UMs7Ww5S-F4MH4)** **When you contribute $10 to activate your 2025 Membership, we will send you a personalized membership card right to your doorstep, and a generous coalition of donors will match each dollar _SEVEN TIMES._** **** That means your $10 donation will have a $70 impact, helping state Democrats prepare for upcoming elections – including three that will determine control of the Virginia House and Senate in January. name: Emily Randall
subject: Hit the ground running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
The 6th Congressional District is vast and beautiful. The drives are long, the people are hardworking, and there’s nowhere else I’d rather live and represent.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99176749/519093014/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.23_RoadTrip_X2_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWEzMjdmMC01ZWMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lMrjmkEknCWz-RyyZ7yHoKGqNVvax42CTJrtLnYYupI=&emci=383003e4-5ac1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=d5a327f0-5ec1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=23483442) | Peter, I’m hitting the ground running. Or should I say, _driving!_ My new Chief of Staff, Zahraa, and I took a road trip around Washington’s 6th District. We drove through five counties, visited the Makah Tribal Council, met with eleven Neah Bay community leaders, shopped at four small businesses, and made it home 14 hours after we left. **The 6th Congressional District is vast and beautiful. The drives are long, the people are hardworking, and there’s nowhere else I’d rather live and represent.** This trip was a reminder of what we’re fighting for. Clean air and water. Preserving our national parks. Standing with our neighbors who are immigrants or LGBTQ+ folks. Ensuring all of us can retire with dignity. Building a stronger future for all of us. **In 11 days, I’ll take the oath of office, and I’m more ready than ever to go to bat for the 6th District and working people across the country.** [_**One more thing: Our end-of-year fundraising deadline is coming up fast. I need to know you’re with me, Peter: Can you chip in today to support our fight for progress into 2025 and beyond?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99176750/519093015/1938114812?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.23_RoadTrip_X2_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWEzMjdmMC01ZWMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lMrjmkEknCWz-RyyZ7yHoKGqNVvax42CTJrtLnYYupI=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99176751/519093016/1938114812?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2024.12.23_RoadTrip_X2_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWEzMjdmMC01ZWMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lMrjmkEknCWz-RyyZ7yHoKGqNVvax42CTJrtLnYYupI=) Thank you so much 💙 — Emily

clean_body: The 6th Congressional District is vast and beautiful. The drives are long, the people are hardworking, and there’s nowhere else I’d rather live and represent. | Peter, I’m hitting the ground running. Or should I say, driving! My new Chief of Staff, Zahraa, and I took a road trip around Washington’s 6th District. We drove through five counties, visited the Makah Tribal Council, met with eleven Neah Bay community leaders, shopped at four small businesses, and made it home 14 hours after we left. The 6th Congressional District is vast and beautiful. The drives are long, the people are hardworking, and there’s nowhere else I’d rather live and represent. This trip was a reminder of what we’re fighting for. Clean air and water. Preserving our national parks. Standing with our neighbors who are immigrants or LGBTQ+ folks. Ensuring all of us can retire with dignity. Building a stronger future for all of us. In 11 days, I’ll take the oath of office, and I’m more ready than ever to go to bat for the 6th District and working people across the country. = = Thank you so much 💙 — Emily = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. name: Marcus
subject: It's time for my Annual Airing of Grievances
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | 10\. Tried doing “brat.” Broke a gavel...
---
|
---
| 9\. It would appear I picked the wrong year to surprise the kids with a drone for Christmas.
8\. As the old saying goes, DC needs more lawyers. 7\. It’s difficult to make “attended hearings” and “voted on things” sound like marketable skills on LinkedIn.
6\. Looks like this is where I start my career as a podcaster.
5\. I had a grievance about the Mets blowing the playoffs, but... Juan Soto.
4\. You just know the Giants will even find a way to screw up having the #1 draft pick. 3\. Speaking of the Giants, at least when Daniel Jones lost his job he was still getting $36 million a year.
2\. Throughout my career, I’ve always made it a point to tell you the truth over some of our most divisive and partisan issues, and I’m here today to tell you... Hallmark Christmas movies are excellent! (And now I have more time to watch them).
1\. Do I really need to say it! (But I can’t wait to write my grievances from the 120th Congress.)
---

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: Happy holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Caraveo for Congress
body:
https://www.caraveoforcongress.com/ [https://www.caraveoforcongress.com/] Hi Peter,

As the year comes to a close, I want to take a moment to thank you for everything you’ve done. Your support, encouragement, and belief in our shared vision have meant the world to me, and I am truly grateful to have you in our corner.

This holiday season, I hope you find joy, peace, and time to connect with loved ones. While we faced challenges this year, I remain inspired by your commitment to building a brighter future for every family in Colorado.

Thank you for standing with me. Wishing you a wonderful holiday and a New Year filled with hope and possibility!

Warmly,
Yadira

name: George Whitesides
subject: Happy holidays, Peter.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024?refcode=em-header]
Peter,

From my family to yours, happy holidays!

I hope that you have a wonderful holiday with your family and friends. This year, I am incredibly thankful for your support of our campaign – with your help we successfully flipped CA-27 from red to blue.

From volunteering, to making a donation, to telling a neighbor about our movement, to calling voters, putting up yard signs, it all made the difference in our victory.

I’m looking forward to being sworn into Congress in the new year and delivering results for our community. Your continued support means a lot as we enter this new chapter together.

Thank you,

George

name: Katie Porter
subject: Will you help support LGBTQ+ youth this holiday season?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39362%2E3422442%2EsIx2eT)
Derek,
While the holiday season should be a time for joy, it can be a difficult time for young LGBTQ+ folks whose family members may not accept or support them.
According to a recent report released by the CDC, more than 40% of young LGBTQ+ people had considered suicide in the last year.
**That heartbreaking stat shows just how critical the work of the Trevor Project is.** The Trevor Project offers 24/7 support to LGBTQ+ youth through specially trained counselors who can offer lifesaving support in a time of crisis.
And their work extends beyond the hotline—from helping create inclusive schools, to facilitating peer groups that help young people find community, the Trevor Project’s work is going to be especially important as Trump takes office again.
**[I am reaching out to you today to ask if you’ll join me in making a donation to the Trevor Project.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241223-tp?refcode=em20241223-39362&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39362_3422442_sIx2eT&akid=39362%2E3422442%2EsIx2eT)** Your donation today will 100% support the Trevor Project’s important work.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241223-tp?refcode=em20241223-39362&refcode2=39362_3422442_sIx2eT&akid=39362%2E3422442%2EsIx2eT)
Thank you so much,
Katie Porter

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241223-39362&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39362_3422442_sIx2eT&akid=39362%2E3422442%2EsIx2eT)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39362%2E3422442%2EsIx2eT).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

| Peter,

On behalf of my team and my family, we want to wish you a Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays!

I’ve been reading your messages, and I can’t express how thankful I am to have such a dedicated group of supporters by my side. After weeks of orientation and meeting other newly elected representatives, I will be going into the new year with a renewed sense of optimism for what we can accomplish together.

I’m excited to continue this journey with you as we work to tackle the biggest challenges facing our communities.

Have a wonderful holiday season!

April

| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=13f27e0a5cb64e6892b1838036530329&_e=1EfftoGCjiR2v37oUmPaCGLzrFCVNbF3nkgtrmf7na1hQIBallMmIebS8Ej45VG9f1DMwf42wjvfwKostCDCFvtsVHdVOc_ixOPNiYhJ1QXvAk6Fq3YVkRMMBKKykWN25o9EfjsWVGMiki5YBhVqTjg2-2I2lCrsFnSC2TF3Jb7WGf8TcvRC68gcPDXdpGdq4H-C64ODp132T6IHFH-ttHe84FdCPF6L_jMCh03s1Be_ySDgj-0iMbO-eCHULUuWvStl97x0RkscWi03B4Lf3muEwebQuhzTImDE12MqJf-LlJg186VoIaX2snzgD-6jHWPxv6XKFRgYgWXjKqsYSq8VN9-L2uW70GW9V9RiMN4xqJKvIPWnTVjzVaCw7j4lmtgO_SNfFXGtPG5iafUoLA%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=13f27e0a5cb64e6892b1838036530329&_e=1EfftoGCjiR2v37oUmPaCGLzrFCVNbF3nkgtrmf7na1hQIBallMmIebS8Ej45VG9f1DMwf42wjvfwKostCDCFvtsVHdVOc_ixOPNiYhJ1QXvAk6Fq3YVkRMMBKKykWN25o9EfjsWVGMiki5YBhVqTjg2-2I2lCrsFnSC2TF3Jb7WGf8TcvRC68gcPDXdpGdq4H-C64ODp132T6IHFH-ttHe84FdCPF6L_jMCh03s1BeOU5f1V4gVwd69NYbb1S6OuZ77LB5ZLOXUgd8K_G-cE-ohKvUmVnKBpf7_KWHdF9491IAIBbp5pKjOKI1AgtcV6AOQq9U_VZocdC36lrptCg71b0n998DoNCS_j-tY-RHKrqTCoU8h0G8mcU9X6K88QJ9NLKdtXMrScifTa55Kmw%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."

The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=13f27e0a5cb64e6892b1838036530329&_e=1EfftoGCjiR2v37oUmPaCGLzrFCVNbF3nkgtrmf7na1hQIBallMmIebS8Ej45VG9f1DMwf42wjvfwKostCDCFvtsVHdVOc_ixOPNiYhJ1QXvAk6Fq3YVkRMMBKKykWN25o9EfjsWVGMiki5YBhVqTjg2-2I2lCrsFnSC2TF3Jb7WGf8TcvRC68gcPDXdpGdq4H-C64ODp132T6IHFH-ttHe84FdCPF6L_jMCh03s1BdbXj4bQG4qZMIayBtUkTde7FCKIrMURoxLZQiwrOUqsgo5mE3Bgv80hT32arrw2kdySkEfu0XJkYMoB6arlAxpvttcEVykEvM0Sf_Ny--hXfekDi6qZ72lCWSLF254K5z2BpDSHXkOgTRmB29vFfLqHlGuCOG4FlYpUclUJOJHUg%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.

I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=13f27e0a5cb64e6892b1838036530329&_e=1EfftoGCjiR2v37oUmPaCGLzrFCVNbF3nkgtrmf7na1hQIBallMmIebS8Ej45VG9f1DMwf42wjvfwKostCDCFvtsVHdVOc_ixOPNiYhJ1QXvAk6Fq3YVkRMMBKKykWN25o9EfjsWVGMiki5YBhVqTjg2-2I2lCrsFnSC2TF3Jb7WGf8TcvRC68gcPDXdpGdq4H-C64ODp132T6IHFH-ttHe84FdCPF6L_jMCh03s1BfXvchs5FI3KLGwy1dJ_tWgI7WZg7LShcgGP8sSMC0NR_eUXn1OdiBd4PjK0ZqtUhbvLOQ6Y4ALa2FHzVOCpGEYBEp6_4xq1FrGrNyZiv-mu83glRv4Ts0WWH8NZ7oLZrQhkxXIeM3yb8scEvoiC1c6VWG17P_EjpXgcwW7az9ngQ%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!

**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**

There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. **#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**

Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=13f27e0a5cb64e6892b1838036530329&_e=1EfftoGCjiR2v37oUmPaCGLzrFCVNbF3nkgtrmf7na1hQIBallMmIebS8Ej45VG9f1DMwf42wjvfwKostCDCFvtsVHdVOc_ixOPNiYhJ1QXvAk6Fq3YVkRMMBKKykWN25o9EfjsWVGMiki5YBhVqTjg2-2I2lCrsFnSC2TF3Jb7WGf8TcvRC68gcPDXdpGdq4H-C64ODp132T6IHFH-ttHe84FdCPF6L_jMCh03s1Bd7nCKKpgsdwGuNTjPduyP0bjuXI_0CiQLz9eugJqHGX7kebfl_7A5YOiwom0Cww71B2nBEZfXCqsZ-E5WprLzkjezb7er8DfnnuH4dnCslkmZcmFixfUUi2TtcjsN8Z6WHfTRkFGuKvJqstLkTfHfhoMzPaNrw_6GwN8tuXSdj2Q%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=13f27e0a5cb64e6892b1838036530329&_e=1EfftoGCjiR2v37oUmPaCGLzrFCVNbF3nkgtrmf7na1hQIBallMmIebS8Ej45VG9f1DMwf42wjvfwKostCDCFvtsVHdVOc_ixOPNiYhJ1QXvAk6Fq3YVkRMMBKKykWN25o9EfjsWVGMiki5YBhVqTjg2-2I2lCrsFnSC2TF3Jb7WGf8TcvRC68gcPDXdpGdq4H-C64ODp132T6IHFH-ttHe84FdCPF6L_jMCh03s1BdIF-v-f0GS471Rpn99edlzoHG4mvqHCva1GXWZJCa4Vc4dMJdrnSXqeVhx_wPiZpsaxoBe25abVXw89ISV-XwlBYu9WHizwrfdC4bt4I0OnMegemIfptO2lXJd-AovSBf07MGa6vshZcVLTDwLMl2pUdlR6DMz80gmx7xpcUtliA%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=13f27e0a5cb64e6892b1838036530329&_e=1EfftoGCjiR2v37oUmPaCGLzrFCVNbF3nkgtrmf7na1hQIBallMmIebS8Ej45VG9f1DMwf42wjvfwKostCDCFvtsVHdVOc_ixOPNiYhJ1QXvAk6Fq3YVkRMMBKKykWN25o9EfjsWVGMiki5YBhVqTjg2-2I2lCrsFnSC2TF3Jb7WGf8TcvRC68gcPDXdpGdq4H-C64ODp132T6IHFH-ttHe84FdCPF6L_jMCh03s1BeuLX3G8Zm9o4NUwQYqM-C-A1hnU51eSqWx3si1x8B0uiAv-qmR5G89GCELQFiR52txSTpv8OIrSspnQTMWHyk9kGvt3DqTB3vC8EMfUwyZ78iG1PDBuPuTRKf4teiMK00RajRfA2rrX7ZgWIWSeD4rh0aqIGImN1hOM6nFyxy9gw%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.

clean_body: God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.| | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

But all they could muster was that they won 46 races nationwide. **They operated in 48 states in 2024, which means they won less than one race per state they did work in.** Meanwhile, Educated We Stand mainly spent our energies in Florida and Michigan **and we won 21 races in those two states alone!** We know this is all a fundraising ploy by Moms for Liberty to try and motivate their donors, but here’s the truth: Moms for Liberty is facing true pushback for the first time and it’s resulting in fewer victories for them and more victories for us. We were able to win 21 races with less than a year in existence and we can do so much more in 2025 and beyond so long as we have your continued support. [**Will you pitch in to Educated We Stand to help us continue applying pressure to extremists across the country?**](http://links.educatedwestand.com/u/click?_t=ad2d8c03ddbd43fa810800b6e953121e&_m=3b74d07a36ec4ebab39114ed9a7aa4ef&_e=FJ5O69Vn5DewpTl04WYV1Ci4lTJSJ1E8OqBRHOB-up1jpup7H5DKtOh-otBoHhFvjpEzn_O5ixz_IMcS-Dk5SQ7UNoU3yXkWUnnGKR-i9tZAYmV-A5eTJH3oUI6iCHrC8GxJTonY3s36VBycb_AB35afqDzvR0coPdntQnCVNNNmNE3t8KeEIuXoPQLk5xrnCajrw3TuZA2_Sipb8e22EWGXRJL0eQoi6lzaGX18Dzstt07EFHTFd62cz-bqouhEoeLgz2lK4eu9mfZxCtxwuis7cOlOpjW8-CU_rmMqcbM87_vYRGS7kRtwRjeBBQn86BhqNbOh8lN33QdHZeVOqNNr0yMY5TJiPR_xe9U6-P6l0Y4lr4IMppGYWTcjOyIYZMDSnTzGxkkIEVxyGr83tHi_qiV8Wxx-0d0C4TQWHj18est7yMUYuyyqEXFHr0Oz) We’re effectively fighting back against these radical candidates, but there’s still a lot of work to do. Moms for Liberty is building up chapter membership nationwide and recruiting chapter presidents and chairs to run for office with a ton of financial backing. **[We need to be prepared to take on this challenge year after year. So please, if you make a donation to any movement today, make sure it’s to Educated We Stand to help us continue the fight against Moms for Liberty and extremists in our clean_body: | | | Peter, Last week, Moms for Liberty emailed their supporters touting their 2024 victories. But all they could muster was that they won 46 races nationwide. They operated in 48 states in 2024, which means they won less than one race per state they did work in. Meanwhile, Educated We Stand mainly spent our energies in Florida and Michigan and we won 21 races in those two states alone! We know this is all a fundraising ploy by Moms for Liberty to try and motivate their donors, but here’s the truth: Moms for Liberty is facing true pushback for the first time and it’s resulting in fewer victories for them and more victories for us. We were able to win 21 races with less than a year in existence and we can do so much more in 2025 and beyond so long as we have your continued support. We’re effectively fighting back against these radical candidates, but there’s still a lot of work to do. Moms for Liberty is building up chapter membership nationwide and recruiting chapter presidents and chairs to run for office with a ton of financial backing. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | All the best, Jennifer Jenkins ** Paid for by Educated. We Stand. **

body:

#
Hey Derek, John here.
I’m out taking care of some last minute items on my to-do list, and there’s one thing I could really use your help with: 🙏🙏
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241223?refcode=em20241223-9720&refcode2=9720_434096_W65ZN2&akid=9720%2E434096%2EW65ZN2)

Trump and the GOP spent _million$_ to flip PA’s other Senate seat 🔴 last month, and if we’re going to keep this seat 🔵, grassroots support will be _critical_.
This year we’re aiming to bring in another **10,000 donations** before 2024 is over to make sure we’re in a good spot for 2025 and beyond.
[**Will you pitch in $5 toward our end of year goal now and help me cross this item off my list?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241223?refcode=em20241223-9720&refcode2=9720_434096_W65ZN2&akid=9720%2E434096%2EW65ZN2)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: We never forget the essential role that you play in this organization — and we hope you don’t, either.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Your support helped us minimize our losses in the U.S. Senate, and actually gain a seat in the House. You helped us win 243 downballot races this cycle. The candidates you helped elect, from federal office down to school board, are going to stand in the breach as we work to hold the line against Trump and the MAGA Right.
#
Peter,
Before we get too far, thank you. VoteVets will be going offline for a few days to enjoy the holidays, and we’re sending our best wishes to you and your loved ones.
We never forget the essential role that you play in this organization — and we hope you don’t, either.
Your support helped us minimize our losses in the U.S. Senate, and actually gain a seat in the House. You helped us win 243 downballot races this cycle. The candidates you helped elect, from federal office down to school board, are going to stand in the breach as we work to hold the line against Trump and the MAGA Right.
Thank you.
But now we’re preparing for what comes next: A MAGA House of Representatives, Senate, and White House. We’ve got our work cut out for us.
Now, we poured millions of dollars into this last election. We’ve cut our budgets to the bone. And with the tank running low, we’ve launched our final fundraising drive of the year to refill our coffers and steel ourselves for the fights ahead.
You’ve got a critical role in that effort. So, please:
[**Can you make a donation of $5 to VoteVets before we take a few days off for the holidays? We’re working to raise $250,000 before New Years Eve, and we wouldn’t be doing it if it wasn’t critical to our work in 2025 and beyond.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24.0YbT0m&refcode=em241223-1-120&t=1&akid=34038%2E3013755%2EWOb90k)**

name: Labin Duke
subject: Celebrate Christmas with Hillsdale College
body:
Receive a Beautiful Ornament for Your Defense of Liberty

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2b6801fd6dd0497a92717c516085bd3b&_e=Y-CLoSCR2-sLkp68lEK_CUeWPoB29C4z40-XgdTNTMiVsMqNsruIGtlgSEefm3d7O_9NpNf3Nn_ajxbCQN-6RmsP_C7c0oZdSufrTuBpa_tnTDlleFqsMZmlwFkXsysFS9ly8W8DRwJGLKrO3ALOFshmcIfBZWXq1AX_HHhbhLKrRuMsgRJPHnakBw6qKya9bQuC5bCgX86qwlKuSMg58S_IPKARyjBFsdMFcwXTsLluBik6NOlU8LABBxXpD-1mv90cZhxkY7y2tLFBSpQoXOiJeI6QswTxQOa_h3Dlt-7DDcwRTgPp9uGZL9KmXp0ouSNJ6INzw2-X9pePGLWLoFEnRu6t7pKPtp4ceGpE50F9YVag0PG8NVeOj-O3RfYc5ii-nXgNHhBjD7V36vNexA7rQwo5Nhf6RUHlTRq90jA%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Christmas is a time to reflect on the blessings we've been given, the principles we hold dear, and the opportunities we have to give back.

It's also a season to remember the meaning of Christmas--faith, hope, and generosity.

Since our founding in 1844, we have been dedicated to learning, character, faith, and freedom. And we accomplish this work entirely through the support of generous individuals like you--not one penny of government funding.

**This Christmas, we invite you to join us in this mission by making a special year-end gift. As a symbol of our gratitude, we 'll send you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament for your gift of $50 or more.**

Each ornament is a beautiful reminder of the Christmas season. Supplies are limited. It's a meaningful keepsake to hang on your tree or share with a loved one.

Your generosity will have a lasting impact by helping Hillsdale College:

* **Provide** free online courses to millions of Americans, such as "The Genesis Story," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity."
* **Reach** over 6.6 million households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our free "digest of liberty."
* **Restore** excellence to K-12 education through our network of classical charter schools, which teach American history and civics.

We accomplish all this while remaining independent of all government funding, thanks to your generous support. Your gift today will help us continue to provide these free resources and promote the principles of liberty and faith far and wide.

**You can reserve your ornament by making a tax-deductible gift here:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-ornament](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2b6801fd6dd0497a92717c516085bd3b&_e=Y-CLoSCR2-sLkp68lEK_CUeWPoB29C4z40-XgdTNTMiVsMqNsruIGtlgSEefm3d7O_9NpNf3Nn_ajxbCQN-6RmsP_C7c0oZdSufrTuBpa_tnTDlleFqsMZmlwFkXsysFS9ly8W8DRwJGLKrO3ALOFshmcIfBZWXq1AX_HHhbhLKrRuMsgRJPHnakBw6qKya9bQuC5bCgX86qwlKuSMg58S_IPKARyjBFsdMFcwXTsLluBik6NOlU8LABBxXpD-1mFVyL70XVlIFFKddP021IVyIbYNChoo0ZHo4q7knjpjG6LFa6mymq3hHKiPBfpBkWHs8iIAsVMyCWFBDzOOxaR-z8yFqvdIEEWNbrdI18wffXGppDhu-gxVkUHBlBRdM5ZdUJIQHEu4p2YtqdvveXXnUkog_VyQKbOls_lGJrH7c%3D)

Thank you for your kindness and support.

On behalf of everyone at Hillsdale College--our students, faculty, and staff--I wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year.

Warm regards,

Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College [

Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=2b6801fd6dd0497a92717c516085bd3b&_t=9978GR5Gw1QowIjQXxXGFXb2LkIWl6C3Ges0f6D5tDyctASHEt6h8nNfUomT5QcDKW-Mh4sbkrvJiRy41XvJwfWeelPrCSk4TvQkBP6epwgfz8TQga8qxKuyAIbjnAI5)

body:
Peter, I am honored to join the growing number of women who served our country in uniform and now are serving our country in Congress:

| **Peter, I am honored to join the growing number of women who served our country in uniform and now are serving our country in Congress:**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99178040/519097840/478451526?refcode=BLU_EM_GOOD_2024-12-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTMwMjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGJiMDQ3YmMtNjNjMS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=H2QfA1sTEHTexBSu_vMCLCUxrL-iitWuaw8Ixbuwasw=)
I was proud to serve in the Navy Reserve as an intelligence officer for 11 years. One of the greatest lessons I learned serving in the Navy was that sometimes, you have to work with people who you may not see eye to eye with, but you learn how to work together to complete the mission at hand and get the job done.

While we face a tough challenge ahead with a Republican-led trifecta, I’m ready to bring the same determination and bipartisan spirit that have defined my career to work across the aisle and achieve meaningful progress for Granite Staters and Americans across the country.

**This is just the beginning.
