One of the greatest lessons I learned serving in the Navy was that sometimes, you have to work with people who you may not see eye to eye with, but you learn how to work together to complete the mission at hand and get the job done. While we face a tough challenge ahead with a Republican-led trifecta, I’m ready to bring the same determination and bipartisan spirit that have defined my career to work across the aisle and achieve meaningful progress for Granite Staters and Americans across the country. This is just the beginning. We have a lot of work ahead of us over these next two years.= | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Maggie Goodlander = * | | = Paid for by Maggie for Congress Maggie for Congress 131 Daniel Webster Hwy #949 Nashua, NH 03060 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

| | Friend, I'll be spending this holiday with my family, so I wanted to wish you a Merry Christmas in advance. I hope this holiday season brings you comfort, happiness, and light. Oftentimes, it's spending quality time with loved ones that reminds us what's important in life. For me, that's my two kids (three if you count Roxy, who's posing for a photo with me!), my daughter-in-love, my adorable granddaughter, family and friends, and you. Your support has made my year more special than I could have ever imagined. From making history as Delaware's first Black and woman Senator to bringing Bright Hope to the Senate, I can't thank you enough for being on my team. From my family to yours, have a very Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays. Warmly, Lisa

body:
| | | **** Donald Trump has nominated Harmeet Dhillon, a self-proclaimed "anti-woke warrior," for the role of Assistant Attorney General for Civil Rights, where she will oversee the enforcement of federal laws including the Civil Rights Act and the Americans with Disabilities Act to name a few. Dhillon's far-right ideology and track record show a blatant disregard for the principles of equality and justice that should be at the core of this critical position. **Under the Biden administration, disability rights have been core to the department, enforcing disability rights in state hospitals. This nominee could stall or end investigations critical to justice.** **[Add your voice to urge your Senators to oppose Harmeet Dhillon’s nomination. ****
Dhillon has consistently opposed progressive policies such as affirmative action and LGBTQ+ rights, demonstrating a clear bias that runs counter to the values of inclusivity and fairness.

Dhillon's far-right ideology and track record show a blatant disregard for the principles of equality and justice that should be at the core of this critical position. Under the Biden administration, disability rights have been core to the department, enforcing disability rights in state hospitals. This nominee could stall or end investigations critical to justice. | Dhillon has consistently opposed progressive policies such as affirmative action and LGBTQ+ rights, demonstrating a clear bias that runs counter to the values of inclusivity and fairness. Her appointment would infuse the Department of Justice with divisive, partisan politics, threatening to roll back decades of progress in civil rights advocacy. We cannot allow this nomination to proceed unchecked. It is imperative that we act now to protect the civil rights of every American. ** Stand up, speak out, and make your voice heard before it's too late. –Able Dems elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=1c848e5eca9b4fd7b37c264bd4969fc0&_e=nGF9ljDo8m2SjaubbAqlPkyKn-qoeDj6II8-11kBE_ntlZr2Nf80xQqrNPo7iIAZVOwAvgjvMPGIUub4fvSXzjuLwyHLAO7Br5JxftGEoghXrnjd0a8sEUlocg7EU4BcMgVBU1vrrNDk8f9i2a65SdSt4rVy21xKpYILwSk5ROW_W87x0BLVXrsQmZg0yjhykJKLIwjtfAHVJHcWqmDNlMuaBZrPPwCIEri70YZnycGKTIZ0cQ5gvdG-DvC9rt0PNdoYoEpFAJWoAqtyej34NVs-l-8LZdydOsIcFb25lDkLpXYvce0PJlUUwShqu6aQLyVIWthk3ASE33lFw8ZeIw%3D%3D)

name: Steve Daines
subject: Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
May your Christmas and New Year's be filled with peace, laughter, and cherished moments with those you love. |
---

Fellow American -

As the holiday season fills our homes with warmth and joy, I want to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for your unwavering support and dedication.

May your Christmas and New Year's be filled with peace, laughter, and cherished moments with those you love.

Together, we have accomplished so much this year, and I look forward to continuing our work toward a brighter future in the new year.

Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year!

With warmest wishes,

Steve Daines

Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. [_**Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!**_]()

**Senator Steve Daines

Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team —

As we celebrate the holiday season, I want to take a moment to thank you for being such an important part of this team.

I am humbled by your dedication, support, and belief in our shared mission. Throughout this year, our grassroots team has inspired and motivated me every day. As 2024 comes to a close, we’re given an opportunity to reflect on and appreciate what matters most — family, community, and the values we hold dear.

Heading into the new year, unknown challenges lie ahead — but unknown joys and victories undoubtedly lie ahead too. Together, we’ll continue to fight for a brighter future.

Wishing you and your loved ones a safe, joyful, and peaceful holiday season. Thank you for standing with me in this work — I’m honored to have you by my side.

— Jason

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?

http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeuaj220q179660pcmhrgnbb4rb28lmmb9ghmga8_rp22sh2s8i6epj5c1g60oj4cdh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38ctk6oon9dtjmeqjetjjkorrbdt36kq32tbiekojf8j0c9gmf932cuh6cpt1euo7b8hiegr7ctd4mpqqfctlk5obadd2elprb91gmkq32dd7mcqq2sjlemo7ctd2ekonasjjmuh2bs

With less than a month to go before President-elect Donald Trump takes
office, the top brass are already running for cover. This week the

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Happy holidays, Derek!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8239%2E5257348%2EgVMRUm)
Hi Derek, I am wishing you and your loved ones a joyful, restful holiday season.
With the holidays just a few days away, I know this is a special time for so many families. Including ours.
I’m looking forward to spending time with my wife, Eve, and our kids, Lexi and Eli. We gather together, enjoy good food, and make a lot of references to one of my favorite movies, _The Big Lebowski_.
This is a bittersweet holiday season for me: it’s my first Hanukkah since my dad, Ed, passed away earlier this year. His memory is a blessing to us all, and I am going to think of him often as we join together as a family.
My faith was a big part of my upbringing — it’s where my parents, my brother, and I found a community when we moved to the Bay Area when I was a kid at Temple Isaiah in Lafayette, California. Eve and I have passed that tradition down to our own kids.
And like my parents before me, I’ve tried to cultivate a love and respect for public service in our family — and the values that command us to do what’s right for the next generation.
As families around the country celebrate the first night of Hanukkah in a few days, I’m reminded of the lessons I learned about this holiday growing up. Lessons about the significance of the eight lights as a symbol of unity, strength, perseverance, and freedom.
Whether you are celebrating Christmas, Hanukkah, or any other holiday, may you enjoy the love of family and friends.
Happy holidays, Derek.
— Adam
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2024_abs_em.CUeQhv&refcode=AU_ABS_CL_GEN_NOA_AC90_20241223_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8239%2E5257348%2EgVMRUm)

name: Democrats.org
subject: A 60-second read →
body:
Here’s where things stand:
---
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?refcode=em_20241223_2438_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2438_22930333_rJcYf8&akid=2438%2E22930333%2ErJcYf8) We know you’re likely winding down for the holidays, so we’ll keep this brief, Derek (we promise, just 60 seconds). Here’s where things stand: The election results weren’t what any of us had hoped for, and we understand you’re probably feeling drained and frustrated. Ultimately, the final vote count shows Trump won less than 50 percent of the popular vote with the narrowest victory margin in _decades._ Millions of people voted against him and his allies. There are millions of us — across the country — who won’t stand idly by and let Trump and a Republican-controlled Congress do whatever they want. We can — _and will_ — fight back against Trump and his allies’ Project 2025 agenda. But to do that, we’ll need a strong, organized Democratic Party leading the way. The Democratic National Committee is the organization best positioned to move resources to the places they’re needed most in 2025, 2026, and beyond as we work to elect the Democrats who will be a check on Trump’s power. [**If holding Trump accountable and electing Democrats at every level matters to you, we’re asking you to chip in $3 to help:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241223_2438_fr&refcode2=2438_22930333_rJcYf8&akid=2438%2E22930333%2ErJcYf8) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241223_2438_fr&refcode2=2438_22930333_rJcYf8&akid=2438%2E22930333%2ErJcYf8)**

Ultimately, the final vote count shows Trump won less than 50 percent of the popular vote with the narrowest victory margin in decades. Millions of people voted against him and his allies. | [](https://substack.com/redirect/29ab0a38-cb0a-410c-afad-b68e9a9dd93c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let's face it: you definitely will want some distractions as a survival tactic in the Trump 2.0 presidency. In my last year of flying weekly to and from Congress, I vowed to read more--and scroll through social media less. And now as we wrap up 2024, I am proud that I beat my goal of reading 52 books, an average of one a week.
Reading should be a judgment-free activity; we all read for different reasons. Because I read two newspapers each day and wade through staff briefs, witness testimony, and legislation, my personal reading is all fiction. I won't apologize; fiction, even so-called chick lit, can help us empathize with others, see new perspectives, and become better storytellers. These are three critical skills for candidates and elected leaders. You cannot win tough elections (or survive bad ones!) without these tools.
Below are a few books that I enjoyed, with my own personal categories, to help you pick a next read. And you can check out the graphic above to see some other titles I enjoyed. I hope you enjoy this list, and please send me your own book recommendations.
_**My family is not as dysfunctional as yours:**_ The Latecomer by Jean Hanff Korelitz
I read The Plot by Jean Hanff Korelitz and liked it well enough to try another book by her. The Latecomer describes a complex family, with characters that are imperfect yet empathetic. We don't all get to our destination at the same time, a message that a striver like me needs to hear.
_**Being a 50-year old woman *is* that Hard:**_**** How Hard Can It Be by Allison Pearson
Funny and real, this book is pitch perfect on its descriptions of the ways in which family and work both overwhelm and reward mothers. I picked this one up at my library used book sale. I handed it off to another 50-year old working mom who probably will struggle to find time to read it.
_**We 'll find our way through hard shit together:**_**** The Guncle by Steven Rowley
This book won the Thurber prize for American humor, and indeed, it made me laugh. The poignancy and resilience of the characters resonated, however, long after I forgot the funny moments.
_**Wildly creative and I 'm still puzzling:**_**** The Ministry of Time by Kaliane Bradley
This debut novel is bursting with imagination-- somehow the book is a romance-science fiction-history-thriller. I'm still noodling on the ethics of its premise, having been prompted to read more on the history of Arctic exploration after finishing the book. This book is flawed and brilliant, a paradox that is perfectly apt for its plot.
_**How did I miss this great book:**_**** Honor by Thrity Umrigar
Ethnic and religious nationalism may be growing problems in many parts of the world, but they are not new. This book looks at present and past divisions in India, showing how the dehumanization of others spreads, infecting some and hurting others.
_**Read RomComs for Joy:**_**** The True Love Experiment by Christina Lauren
My fellow Congressperson, Lizzie Fletcher, is the sister of one of my favorite authors, Katherine Center. Katherine's motto is Read for Joy. This book features an audacious, hilarious protagonist-- a romance novelist who realizes she has fizzled out in her own romantic life.
_**Weird but I laughed:**_**** Death Valley by Melissa Broder
This book won't be for everyone, but its depiction of struggles--both real and self-imposed--has stayed with me. Set in California, the writer spends a harrowing weekend in the desert confronting her personal and professional insecurities. (And listening to rocks explain the wisdom of the world!)
_**My top recommendation:**_ The Real Americans by Rachel Khong
Limiting myself to books released in 2024, my top recommendation is The Real Americans. The three generational perspectives that reveal the story are equally skillful, a testament to the author's ability to voice the experiences and perspectives of others.
_**Bonus: Book I most want to read in 2025:**_**** All Fours by Miranda July
As I build my life after Congress, I have made time to reconnect with friends. They've all recommended this novel, and I'll spend New Years Day curled up with my Burmese kitten and Basset Hound puppy reading this gem.
Happy reading!
Katie Porter
Paid for by Truth to Power

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: WHOA - Democrats can FLIP two Senate seats?!?!!
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.

Hi friend, it’s Derek! As we gather with family and friends to close out the year, I’m feeling so grateful for your support and what we’ve accomplished this year, and I wanted to take a moment to say thank you. Thank you for your support. Thank you for standing by my side and sticking around until every vote was counted. Thank you for being a part of the movement that flipped CA-45 blue. I am honored to be the Representative for this district. We no doubt have a tough road ahead of us and battles to come in 2025. I’m more committed than ever to this fight – and am eternally grateful I’ve got this team in the trenches with me. During this time, I hope you and your family are able to get some rest and enjoy the holiday season. Happy holidays! Derek Tran

Thank you for your support. Thank you for standing by my side and sticking around until every vote was counted. Thank you for being a part of the movement that flipped CA-45 blue. I am honored to be the Representative for this district. We no doubt have a tough road ahead of us and battles to come in 2025. I’m more committed than ever to this fight – and am eternally grateful I’ve got this team in the trenches with me. During this time, I hope you and your family are able to get some rest and enjoy the holiday season. Happy holidays! Derek Tran | | Paid for by Derek Tran for Congress P.O. Box 395, 10441 Stanford Ave, Garden Grove, CA 92842 www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. Derek Tran is a veteran, consumer rights attorney, city commissioner, and a small business owner. Derek is running for Congress to fight for Californians, not corporations in Congress. subject: Do you agree with our mission…?

# [#]
Peter, as we come up on the new year, we want to make sure our top supporters are on our side:

CLICK HERE TO BEGIN QUICK POLL » [https://secure.everyaction.com/anGJZUY91kWYER59C2mvJw2]

Here at TOP PAC, we work year-round to defeat MAGA extremism and build a Texas that works for ALL of us — regardless of race, income, immigration status, preferred language, or ZIP Code.

We’re laser-focused on expanding the electorate of color, with an emphasis on turning out Black and Latino voters, and transforming Texas into a state that looks like us and shares our values.

But we couldn’t do it without the support of a grassroots movement behind us. Our supporters have been with us since day one, and we need to know you’re still there.

That’s why we’re circulating this quick poll to gauge your support! It will take less than a minute to complete. Peter, can you take our poll? [https://secure.everyaction.com/anGJZUY91kWYER59C2mvJw2]

DO YOU AGREE WITH OUR MISSION TO BUILD A TEXAS THAT WORKS FOR ALL OF US? [https://secure.everyaction.com/anGJZUY91kWYER59C2mvJw2]

YES! » [https://secure.everyaction.com/anGJZUY91kWYER59C2mvJw2]

UNSURE » [https://secure.everyaction.com/anGJZUY91kWYER59C2mvJw2]

Thank you for your participation!

name: Wes Moore
subject: Power of Community
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99179213/519102042/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjNkNWNjZC02OGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MQ3NhIy6_Eg7m05xs2mIqyxbfxercHb7I_wKvXeY9_0=&emci=805c09bf-68c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=8b3d5ccd-68c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=24635485)
Friend, Let me make one thing clear: **Power cannot be taken by someone who didn’t even give it to you in the first place. The power comes from us. It comes from community, our neighborhoods, and our families. ** In Maryland, we celebrate our communities as we stand together with love and stand together in the work. Recently, I celebrated the Maryland entrepreneurs who are growing their businesses right here in the state. Joined by some of the best community organizations, we came together to celebrate our friends, our communities, and the collective power we have when we come together. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99179214/519102043/1942360064?refcode=em20241223-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjNkNWNjZC02OGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MQ3NhIy6_Eg7m05xs2mIqyxbfxercHb7I_wKvXeY9_0=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99179215/519102044/1942360064?refcode=em20241223-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjNkNWNjZC02OGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MQ3NhIy6_Eg7m05xs2mIqyxbfxercHb7I_wKvXeY9_0=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99179216/519102045/1942360064?refcode=em20241223-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjNkNWNjZC02OGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MQ3NhIy6_Eg7m05xs2mIqyxbfxercHb7I_wKvXeY9_0=) I mean it when I say Maryland is the best state in the country because we’re building up our communities, supporting our homegrown talent, and creating the best opportunities for our families and friends to thrive. If there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s that **I’m never going to stop fighting for a better Maryland.** It’s the reason I created the first State Plan in almost a decade. It’s the reason I’m working with our local leaders to pass meaningful legislation. So far, we’re 26 for 26 on the bills my administration has passed. I see the vision for the state, and I’m not stopping until we make it a reality. Join me in that work. [**My campaign is facing a fundraising freeze next month, and we need to build the resources now to sustain our work through the legislative session. Make a contribution today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99179217/519102046/1942360064?refcode=em20241223-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjNkNWNjZC02OGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MQ3NhIy6_Eg7m05xs2mIqyxbfxercHb7I_wKvXeY9_0=) | **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99179218/519102047/1942360064?refcode=em20241223-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjNkNWNjZC02OGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MQ3NhIy6_Eg7m05xs2mIqyxbfxercHb7I_wKvXeY9_0=)**

clean_body: Friend, Let me make one thing clear: Power cannot be taken by someone who didn’t even give it to you in the first place. The power comes from us. It comes from community, our neighborhoods, and our families. In Maryland, we celebrate our communities as we stand together with love and stand together in the work. Recently, I celebrated the Maryland entrepreneurs who are growing their businesses right here in the state. Joined by some of the best community organizations, we came together to celebrate our friends, our communities, and the collective power we have when we come together. = = = I mean it when I say Maryland is the best state in the country because we’re building up our communities, supporting our homegrown talent, and creating the best opportunities for our families and friends to thrive. If there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s that I’m never going to stop fighting for a better Maryland. It’s the reason I created the first State Plan in almost a decade. It’s the reason I’m working with our local leaders to pass meaningful legislation. So far, we’re 26 for 26 on the bills my administration has passed. I see the vision for the state, and I’m not stopping until we make it a reality. Join me in that work. = | = Elevate, Wes

name: Mike Thompson
subject: Happy Holidays, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://support
body:
# [#]
Peter,

I wish you a wonderful holiday season. I hope you can relax and spend time with your family, friends, and loved ones.

Thank you for all the support you’ve given this year. Our work is not possible without your incredible support. Please take this holiday to recharge and savor all of these special moments with your loved ones.

Here’s to a festive holiday season filled with joy!

Best,

Mike

subject: Happy Holidays, friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Harry Dunn for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99179542/519103263/604658357?refcode=LOC_EM_NONFR_2024.12.23_Happy-Holidays_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzc5MzdhOTQtNmFjMS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IwJ6Mz3j-MdwkpHuhd-5jwIym0QicCaz5whN-EdFLzE=#)

Hi there, friend! It's Harry.

I wanted to take a minute to wish you and your loved ones a happy holiday season! 2024 has been a laborious year to say the least.

All across the country, Democrats like you and I worked our tails off to fight MAGA-extremism and protect democracy. And while we face the reality of another Trump presidency, we also can end this year knowing we left it all out on the field.

In its first year since my run for Congress, Dunn’s Democracy Defenders invested nearly $300,000 this cycle thanks to your support, helping key races in the House and Senate.

We were a part of House races like Congresswomen Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, April McClain Delaney and Sarah Elfreth. We also supported Senators Jacky Rosen, Tammy Baldwin, Ruben Gallego and Angela Alsobrooks! These races came down to the wire, and our team is thankful to have had a small hand in their victories.

You can read more about the races we invested in and read our impact report [here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99179543/519103264/-1843022012?refcode=LOC_EM_NONFR_2024.12.23_Happy-Holidays_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzc5MzdhOTQtNmFjMS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IwJ6Mz3j-MdwkpHuhd-5jwIym0QicCaz5whN-EdFLzE=&emci=4ca379af-f4be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=77937a94-6ac1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=1446461)

With the holiday season just around the corner, I hope you take the opportunity to surround yourself with love, happiness and joy.

From my family to yours, happy holidays!

Harry ❤️
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99179544/519103265/604658357?refcode=LOC_EM_NONFR_2024.12.23_Happy-Holidays_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzODYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzc5MzdhOTQtNmFjMS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IwJ6Mz3j-MdwkpHuhd-5jwIym0QicCaz5whN-EdFLzE=) Harry Dunn for Congress

name: Riley Gaines
subject: With Trump, now is our chance
body:
Now the fight begins
| Friend, I’m Riley Gaines, the Director of the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute. I know what it’s like to stare radical leftism in the face. After all, I had to swim a race against a 6-foot-tall man.
**But Friend, we can work to put those days behind us now.** With Donald Trump back in the White House, you and I have a unique opportunity to turn the tide for women’s rights across America. American voters have proven with this election that they’ve had enough of the lunacy. They’ve had enough of the attacks on the very foundations of our society and our families. And they turned out in masses and voted to restore common sense. But this is only the beginning. While conservatives celebrate this victory, the left's agenda remains a significant threat to our rights and opportunities.
Because Friend , there are still leftist bureaucrats, elected and unelected, working to stop common sense Americans from setting things right.
**_You and I must be vigilant and proactive in defending the rights of female athletes and students everywhere._**
There is great opportunity in these turbulent times. The Riley Gaines Center is committed to ensuring that women’s voices are heard, and their rights are protected. It’s what my ambassadors work for -- day in and day out.
Right now, the Riley Gaines Center needs to raise $300,000 to start 2025 with a bang. This is a call to action for all who believe in fairness and biological reality.
[Your support will empower my Ambassadors and I to educate, mobilize, and advocate for policies that protect women’s rights.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e164e81581094a0f846555f1c07c4173&_e=YKb3cb8YU-EEnApE9zs6cIYTTj5a6xu47SDaUtC1U3gpj7nGV95A5PZep9cik0UAHi8sWxmF5LYFd3r4MC_rcs4MoXBAQCZENxvcMevXihMh0zaHlTA1IhlrwZ0sga178LRLILf8amUtYL5UeJSp8NN4R92n_hEqa1GCP3vpmupppVbQ6xofN2sjjKd2MxvCBUhUBgZSSDYaMM1UNurNWaEXaZyuZif_fzGjAMeK6R1eD7qVDxa8uf1wlRpI7fhpLI5Z8nrLES2WZ-S4Eb_MdHWPaWBoIBplRaMJ7w7XQ1lVlisvncvmOSsyvwr0f7WB5a9VOVTdXMpBbgORMY4BmVeJWsZrLnTTB0XMDWJ5RMKqpQ4HKzYHF4TP6e4ZKa92) Together, you and I can make a difference. Join in this fight for fairness and equality. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center

I promise I’ll keep this short, since I know everyone is busy preparing for the holiday week ahead of us. This holiday season, I’ll be joining Virginians across the Commonwealth as they spend their time with dear friends and family, but I wanted to send a quick message before you log off.

We’re just 8 days away from our final reporting deadline of this year, and this will be our biggest one yet – with the most eyes ever on how much we raise and how many contributions we receive. clean_body: We knew this race would be competitive, but if the 2024 Election showed us anything, this could be even tougher than we once thought. | = | Peter, I promise I’ll keep this short, since I know everyone is busy preparing for the holiday week ahead of us. This holiday season, I’ll be joining Virginians across the Commonwealth as they spend their time with dear friends and family, but I wanted to send a quick message before you log off. We’re just 8 days away from our final reporting deadline of this year, and this will be our biggest one yet – with the most eyes ever on how much we raise and how many contributions we receive. We knew this race would be competitive, but if the 2024 Election showed us anything, this could be even tougher than we once thought. = | = Thank you and Happy Holidays!! Abigail * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

Hours ago the House Ethics Committee published their findings of former MAGA Congressman Matt Gaetz. I read the entire report so you don't have to, and it is worse than many of us may have imagined. Statutory rape, drug abuse, and more--below I relate the five most damning findings the Committee documents. **Let 's Address This.**
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.**Subscribe and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._QFzR6r2CFTgcYEPUEktxPFGDUJweuAF8SMJcc6FwA8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153540692)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/733c395b-dd22-40a0-907b-5b2271c975f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Gaetz resigned from Congress on November 13, the same day Donald Trump nominated him to serve as U.S. Attorney General (from which Gaetz has since withdrawn his name). The [37-page ethics report](https://substack.com/redirect/2608e6d3-d47c-4d84-9645-094f09f29fa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), commissioned by a Republican led committee, is in a word, damning. And perhaps the only thing worse is that Gaetz appears to have escaped any meaningful accountability for the crimes alleged in the report. Here are the five most damning findings.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._QFzR6r2CFTgcYEPUEktxPFGDUJweuAF8SMJcc6FwA8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153540692)
## 1\. Matt Gaetz Violated State Laws Related to Sexual Misconduct
In addition to finding that Matt Gaetz regularly paid for sex with upwards of $90,000 while he was a sitting member of Congress, the ethics committee also found that at the age of 35, Matt Gaetz had sex with underage girls, lied about it, and was found to have violated Florida's laws against statutory rape:
> There is substantial evidence that Representative Gaetz engaged in sexual activity with a 17-year-old girl. The Committee received credible testimony from Victim A herself, as well as multiple individuals corroborating the allegation. Several of those witnesses have also testified under oath before a federal grand jury and in a civil litigation. Representative Gaetz denied the allegation but refused to testify under oath. He has publicly stated that Victim A "doesn't exist" and that he has not "had sex with a 17-year-old since I was 17." 125 The Committee found that to be untrue and determined that there is substantial evidence that Representative Gaetz had sex with Victim A in July 2017, when she was 17 years old, and he was 35. Representative Gaetz's actions were in violation of Florida's statutory rape law.
It is worth noting that in 2017, Gaetz was the only member of Congress to vote NAY on a bill criminalizing human trafficking. Also of note, Gaetz's close colleague Joel Greenberg is in prison for committing sex trafficking of the same individual mentioned above, i.e. Victim A. About Greenberg's testimony the Committee reported:
> The Committee received additional evidence from Mr. Greenberg that is not included in this Report, much of it salacious but unverifiable, _although consistent with the nature of the conduct that the Committee learned of from other witnesses_. The Committee found no reason to doubt the credibility of Victim A.
The statute of limitations for statutory rape in Florida was lifted only for rape crimes committed after Jan 1, 2020. Gaetz's rape crimes are alleged to have been committed prior to then, and thus it appears the statute of limitations for criminally prosecuting those crimes has expired.
## 2\. Matt Gaetz Used Illegal Drugs
The Committee found that Gaetz extensively used illicit drugs, while he was a sitting Congressman, and while using House computers:
> There is substantial evidence that Representative Gaetz used cocaine, ecstasy, and marijuana. At least two women saw Representative Gaetz using cocaine and ecstasy at different events.129 Even more women understood him to regularly be using ecstasy. There is also ample evidence that Representative Gaetz purchased and used marijuana; he appears to have set up a pseudonymous e-mail account from his House office in the Capitol complex for the purpose of purchasing marijuana.
The Committee went on to note that Gaetz provided drugs to women in exchange for sex, and violated numerous state laws in doing so. It is important to remember that while Gaetz voted to mandate drug testing for recipients of SNAP, TANF, and other public welfare benefits, he was a public employee collecting a taxpayer funded salary, and using extensive illicit drugs. The hypocrisy notwithstanding it begs the question why are members of congress exempt from drug testing?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._QFzR6r2CFTgcYEPUEktxPFGDUJweuAF8SMJcc6FwA8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153540692)
## 3\. Matt Gaetz Violated the House Gift Rule
The Committee further found that Gaetz likely accepted bribes, by any other name, and violated the House gift rule. The Committee wrote:
> There is substantial evidence that Representative Gaetz received impermissible gifts in connection with his travel to the Bahamas in September 2018. Specifically, Representative Gaetz accepted travel via a private plane and other travel costs. Contrary to Representative Gaetz's claims that he provided "substantial" evidence to the Committee "demonstrating his innocence" on this allegation, he provided no evidence showing how he paid for any travel costs other than his flight to the Bahamas, despite being given multiple opportunities to do so.
One theme that continues to emerge throughout the ethics report is that Gaetz vehemently denies each of the allegations against him, promises to provide exonerating evidence, yet provides no evidence substantiating the truth or "demonstrating his innocence." He's taking a page out of the Trump playbook to deny everything while claiming victory. Of course, to date, Gaetz has faced no accountability for this illegal act either.
## 4\. Matt Gaetz Gave Special Privileges & Favors to Personal Contacts
The Committee furthermore found that Gaetz gave special favors to women he was sleeping with:
> The Committee found substantial evidence that Representative Gaetz used the power of his office to assist a woman with whom he was engaged in a sexual relationship in obtaining an expedited passport. The woman was not his constituent, and the case was not handled in the same manner as similar passport assistance cases.
Adding to the hypocrisy is that Gaetz aligns precisely with Trump in demonizing immigrants and demanding immigrants "come here legally." Yet, while he spent his days demonizing immigrants and decrying undocumented immigration, he used his powers in Congress to help a woman "skip line" (to use MAGA terminology) and get access to a U.S. Passport through illegal means. And perhaps worst of all, rather than recognize that the entire immigration system is broken, unjust, and inefficient, and work with integrity to improve a broken system--Gaetz circumvented the process and committed an illegal act, while condemning those immigrants who get frustrated with this broken process. Another reminder that every MAGA accusation is a confession, and that Republicans claim government doesn't work, then get elected and prove it.
## 5\. Matt Gaetz Sought to Obstruct Investigation of His Conduct
Finally, as if the above findings were not devastating enough, the Committee found that Gaetz did everything in his power to obstruct the investigation into his criminal activity:
> The Committee found substantial evidence that Representative Gaetz engaged in obstructive conduct with respect to the Committee's investigation. Representative Gaetz pointed to evidence that would "exonerate" him yet failed to produce any such materials. Representative Gaetz continuously sought to deflect, deter, or mislead the Committee in order to prevent his actions from being exposed.
The Committee further reports that Gaetz deliberately withheld information requested of him, intimidated key witnesses if they cooperated with the committee, and hid financial transactions that was otherwise required to disclose. The Committee ultimately concluded that:
> There is substantial evidence that Representative Gaetz violated House Rules and other standards of conduct prohibiting prostitution, statutory rape, illicit drug use, impermissible gifts, special favors or privileges, and obstruction of Congress.
And thus the only question that remains is -- where is the accountability?
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.._QFzR6r2CFTgcYEPUEktxPFGDUJweuAF8SMJcc6FwA8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153540692)
## Conclusion
So where is the accountability? Yes, Gaetz is no longer in Congress, but so what? Donald Trump nominated an alleged rapist who committed any number of crimes to be America's top cop Attorney General. And while this tracks given that a judge confirmed Trump is a rapist in civil court as well. Either Trump knew Gaetz was credibly accused of statutory rape and nominated him anyway, or Trump is so incompetent that he unwittingly nominated a statutory rapist to be AG. Either way, it is clear that Trump is not sending us his best people.
It also only makes the question of accountability that much more important, and raises even more questions, including:
* Why did Speaker Johnson try to bury a report that a member of Congress committed these atrocious crimes and violations?
* Who else in Congress knew Gaetz was engaged in statutory rape, and said nothing?
* Where was Florida Governor Ron DeSantis and how do parents in Florida feel knowing full well that under their Governor's watch, minor girls suffered statutory rape from one of the Governor's colleagues, and he did nothing about it?
* How did no one in corporate media with its unlimited funding discover these grotesque crimes or report on them?
* Why did local law enforcement continue to miss years of sexual abuse, drug abuse, and illegal activity on behalf of a sitting member of Congress?
* How is it that none of Gaetz's staffers, colleagues, or anyone in law enforcement became aware of these crimes committed in the public eye?

One thing is clear. MAGA Republicans will not hold their own accountable. Releasing the ethics report is not accountability. It may be an admission, but an admission without action is lip service and nothing more. Moreover, the ethics report ends with a complaint with minority voting members of the Committee condemning releasing the report at all.
The bottom line is this. History will record that Donald Trump nominated a man to be AG, that the House Ethics Committee determined statutory rapist. History will record that GOP Speaker Johnson tried to cover it up and whitewash statutory rape. And history will record that Florida Governor DeSantis failed to act to hold a statutory rapist accountable. This is who MAGAs are, and we should believe them. The American people should get ready--because this is a microcosm of the corruption they will see from the GOP and the Trump administration over these next four years. It is that much more important we stay active, organized, and engaged, to protect our rights, our communities, and our democratic republic--because MAGAs will do everything possible to undermine our rights and our democracy at every turn. If statutory rape is not a deal breaker for MAGAs to demand criminal accountability, I shudder to imagine what might be their red line, if they even have one.
As Legacy media continues to fail to hold the powerful accountable, your support of _Let 's Address This_ remains more critical than ever. **Please become an active member of this community and subscribe.**

I thought our fundraising and enthusiasm for Republicans would be at an all-time high, but that couldn’t be further from the truth! Fundraising has PLUMMETED, and now I’m starting to get nervous that we may come up short of our final goal of the year. I really hate that I’m having to bother you with this, but you’ve been such an important supporter of my campaign that I wanted you to hear the truth directly from me. I hate even more to put you on the spot, but without your help, I’m worried my fellow Republicans and I may fail to reach our final goal of 2024. This would be a MAJOR setback for our new Republican Senate Majority. So, let me cut to the chase. I could really use your support right here and now before the New Year. I’m personally asking you to consider donating just $5, $10, or $15 to help chip away at my end of year goal. I wish so badly I didn’t have to ask you this. I promise you that. It’s the last thing I want to do, especially because I KNOW you probably get bombarded with lots of messages like this… But if sending you this message makes the difference between making and missing my goal, it’s a no-brainer in my book. I mean it when I say ANYTHING you can spare today will make a BIG difference. Thank you and God bless you, Marsha Blackburn Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: We’re here.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
This weekend I was asked on Instagram: “Are we really witnessing the start of an oligarchy in the US?” Here are my thoughts on that question:
I don’t think we’re witnessing the start of an oligarchy.
I think we are fully here.
You literally have a completely unelected billionaire who has just taken over and paused government funding to specifically take out provisions regarding China and other areas that pertain to him.
You have billionaires who run news outlets like Jeff Bezos and _The Washington Post_ —billionaires that run the _LA Times_ —completely interjecting into their editorial boards and manipulating what’s being written in them.
We’re here—living in an oligarchy. We are going to witness very unprecedented moments come January.
Alexandria doesn’t attend fancy cocktail party fundraisers or curry favor with billionaires. She’s in Congress to fight for us, not billionaires.
[Will you help us prepare to fight back against Donald Trump and Elon Musk by making a $5 contribution today? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241223.YxC8mb&refcode=em20241223-7795-P_FND_CTR_TAX&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7795%2E2526796%2EwDIIcu)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241223.YxC8mb&refcode=em20241223-7795-P_FND_CTR_TAX&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7795%2E2526796%2EwDIIcu)**
Pa’lante,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241223?refcode=em20241223-7795-P_FND_CTR_TAX&t=21&refcode2=7795_2526796_wDIIcu&akid=7795%2E2526796%2EwDIIcu)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241223-7795-P_FND_CTR_TAX&t=22&akid=7795%2E2526796%2EwDIIcu)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=7795%2E2526796%2EwDIIcu) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=7795%2E2526796%2EwDIIcu) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=7795%2E2526796%2EwDIIcu)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=7795%2E2526796%2EwDIIcu)

Jimmy Panetta

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Don’t Miss Our Special Christmas Episode with Father John Carney
body:
For dpwillis67@gmail.com | No Doubt About It Podcast is All New! 🎙️ | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=eb3d64dfd0&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | We’re excited to share a very special [Christmas episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2d4d4af826&e=567664f14c) that you won’t want to miss! Join us as we sit down with Father John Carney, a retired Catholic priest with an incredible backstory.

After spending 20 years in the Army, Father Carney was called by God into the priesthood, and his life journey is inspiring. However, the best reason to watch is Father Carney’s sense of humor!
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c852611045&e=567664f14c)
| **What’s Inside This Episode:**
* **Faith and Current Events:** Father Carney offers his unique perspective on the issues of our time, including the situation in Israel and the moral considerations surrounding nuclear weapons.

* **A Deeper Connection to God:** Learn how to approach sin in a way that draws you closer to God, rather than pushing you away.

* **Christmas Wisdom:** Father Carney shares his best advice for embracing the true spirit of Christmas, strengthening your faith, and finding hope this holiday season.

---
[Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=fc5347aae1&e=567664f14c)
| This conversation is filled with thought-provoking insights, funny anecdotes, heartfelt storytelling, and meaningful guidance for anyone seeking a deeper understanding of faith and its role in our complex world.

[**→ STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=5c9d9ed75a&e=567664f14c)
---
|
**Your Support Matters!
**
If you enjoy the episode, please [like, rate, and subscribe to the No Doubt About It Podcast](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=cc44b3cf2a&e=567664f14c) on your favorite podcast platform and on YouTube. Your support helps us reach more listeners who are looking for meaningful discussions and inspiring stories.
If you’d like to help us continue producing great content, [consider donating to the podcast on our website](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ddacf3ef65&e=567664f14c). Every contribution makes a difference and allows us to keep bringing you engaging, enlightening episodes.
Thank you for joining us on this spiritual and thought-provoking journey. We wish you a very Merry Christmas and a season filled with faith, hope, and love!
Warm Regards,

Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
_Hosts of the No Doubt About It Podcast_
---
| _
P.S._[_be sure to weigh in about your favorite Christmas movies_](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2a7d7edcce&e=567664f14c) _! We each went through our picks as the top holiday movie of all time — let us know if you’re on Team Mark or Team Krysty_
---

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: this Holiday season
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=i2GZvQ%2FNErbeoGEPNhm5d6zleeqFqHSWLA8lLRy7hgaZJ7Vx9c2g6s4lH%2FMdKVqPYygxWFTZC%2BJxqAqP3bjQ9jWp%2FKNa47H2If63B4OGQdwcyn25B4g0bsvLRcFLZhv1tevXwSDleRVj3g7ZEL%2BPZ%2BhIGsD81vDI1dr575WFOz%2Bn%2FdfvbBS6TwNy9lTBBBWm9d0z%2Fh6TUx%2FGJrq%2B5p7oOo7X5m8ihcQh%2FrqgSYtYiD%2BJupDjXoeEqxxWmtS%2FArrtXZNh%2B50XQPEeHfWIkxrWwlx%2FqCT1ma3GsYnQzEMVfUm8z0Eq9oJsgWFY3aENnR40qZGB2vSMOEp7fr9MZjxihaMSANIqUBj46VwsFrO8Dfe%2BlO%2B7v8h4u9CaytWpZgrZ3brRJp3n%2FkgAsZhnVxOzI2w1O5ch6m3FNm7OWmLWT1YCK6vwV%2ByHaAycdQJ2Nswj)
---
| |
---
Peter,

It’s become somewhat of a cliché to say that Rhode Islanders have such big hearts because we live in such a small state, but during this time of year, I see countless examples of kindness and generosity. Whether it’s neighbors helping neighbors after a big power outage or community leaders organizing canned food drives to help those in need, it’s an inspiring time of year that makes me so proud of our state.

This year, many of us are feeling uncertain about what the future will bring. In times like these, community means more now than ever. We must continue to take care of one another and come together to provide support. **[That’s why this Holiday season, I hope you’ll join me in donating to Crossroads Rhode Island.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99180608/519106853/-1421105142?source=EM_NBI_SM_20241223_FR_Charity_0_3MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmM5NTM0ZC03MGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSqNUKl-8sbfFb3keNdFTg8jNUj6aPo53IaxDrQRWm4=&emci=acd27ba0-7fbd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=cbc9534d-70c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=15384964)**

Together, we can invest in the people here in RI-02, build up our community, and continue working towards a better future for all of us.

Let’s get to work!

Seth
* * *
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99180611/519106856/1683961242?source=EM_NBI_SM_20241223_FR_Charity_0_3MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmM5NTM0ZC03MGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSqNUKl-8sbfFb3keNdFTg8jNUj6aPo53IaxDrQRWm4=&emci=acd27ba0-7fbd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=cbc9534d-70c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=15384964)[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99180614/519106859/1770123581?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_SM_20241223_FR_Charity_0_3MO_SethMagaziner_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmM5NTM0ZC03MGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSqNUKl-8sbfFb3keNdFTg8jNUj6aPo53IaxDrQRWm4=)

name: Mark Takano
subject: I’m not dropping these fights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| Peter, though Democrats gained in competitive seats in the House in the latest election, or efforts came up woefully short, and now we face down complete MAGA control across the federal government.

**But that doesn’t mean I’m giving up any of my most important fights in Congress.**

[**Can you chip in just $7 to help me and my Democratic colleagues continue our fight for veterans, working families, and LGBTQAI+ Americans & stand up to Donald Trump’s far-right agenda? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99180974/519108091/238616526?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20241223_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTVkN2VkYi03MGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LwiK1pJMvutL2I5wVx6iYp6vtfoG7SoB5RhGaOUYyjw=) Here’s what I’m fighting for: | _**A four day work week:**_
Americans deserve to live full lives that aren’t consumed by long hours of work. **I’ll continue to fight for this and other common sense solutions for American workers and their families in Congress.**
---
_**Fighting for our veterans:**_
I’m proud that my work has authored and helped pass legislation like the **PACT Act** and **VALOR Act** — **bills that greatly increase veteran access to critically needed healthcare and benefits. But there is still work to be done, and I’m not even close to relinquishing that fight.**
---
_**Standing up for LBTQAI+ Americans:**_
I know all too well the hate and vitriol that comes from rising homophobia and transphobia. Sadly, much of it comes from attention-seeking Republicans in Congress who care more about social media clicks than getting to the business of the American people. **I won’t let them throw LGBTQAI+ Americans under the bus for political gain. And I’ll be damned if I let them get away with it while I’m a member of Congress.**
---
Look, Peter – the next two years will try our patience, spirit, and political will. **But we can’t and won’t give up.**

[**So I’m looking to you today for help. Can I count on you to chip in a few dollars to help me and my Democratic colleagues win these tough fights and stop the hateful MAGA agenda? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99180975/519108092/238616526?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20241223_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTVkN2VkYi03MGMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LwiK1pJMvutL2I5wVx6iYp6vtfoG7SoB5RhGaOUYyjw=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | Peter, though Democrats gained in competitive seats in the House in the latest election, or efforts came up woefully short, and now we face down complete MAGA control across the federal government. But that doesn’t mean I’m giving up any of my most important fights in Congress. = Here’s what I’m fighting for: | A four day work week: Americans deserve to live full lives that aren’t consumed by long hours of work. I’ll continue to fight for this and other common sense solutions for American workers and their families in Congress. Fighting for our veterans: I’m proud that my work has authored and helped pass legislation like the PACT Act and VALOR Act — bills that greatly increase veteran access to critically needed healthcare and benefits. But there is still work to be done, and I’m not even close to relinquishing that fight. Standing up for LBTQAI+ Americans: I know all too well the hate and vitriol that comes from rising homophobia and transphobia. Sadly, much of it comes from attention-seeking Republicans in Congress who care more about social media clicks than getting to the business of the American people. I won’t let them throw LGBTQAI+ Americans under the bus for political gain. And I’ll be damned if I let them get away with it while I’m a member of Congress. Look, Peter – the next two years will try our patience, spirit, and political will. But we can’t and won’t give up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you! name: A.G. Holder
subject: Set your sights on where we need to go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
My challenge for you is to not despair over where we are today, as hard as that may be.
|
---

Peter,****
As we wrap up 2024 and prepare to welcome 2025, it’s natural to take time to reflect on this past year.
My challenge to you is not to despair over where we are today, as difficult as that may be.
Instead, set your sights on where we need to go, and let’s focus on figuring out how we are going to get there together.
We’re working towards a destination where the promises in the documents that shaped this country aren’t empty words on paper, but a lived reality for every single American.
**It’s a country where we are all counted equally in our democracy and we have a fair shot at electing leaders who support the policies we believe in.**
Anyone who tells you we can’t make this type of progress because of what else is going on around us is mistaken. Throughout our history Americans have made this nation more fair, not just, in spite of what seemed like immovable opposition.
We have made great progress in our time fueled by the courage and determination of people like you. But more work remains to be done.
[**Right now, all donations to All On The Line will be matched up to $50,000 total. If you’re looking for an opportunity to have a big impact on the fight for fair maps and a just democracy, this is the best time to send in a contribution.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99181214/519108824/-375470917?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_AGImpact_email_20241223-AOTL-RedLite-AGImpact_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241223-AOTL-RedLite-AGImpact_&utm_campaign=AGImpact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzNWQ3ZWRiLTcwYzEtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wDgQavtGXg8MhTONw2SonIbaO6evWj03GjGwvneBogo=)
In 2025, there are still elections across the country that will decide the control of multiple state legislatures, governorships, and at least four state supreme court seats.
We need to be ready for potential redistricting reforms — and also the concrete threats ahead like Donald Trump and his MAGA allies undermining the census, more attacks on the Voting Rights Act, and ongoing attempts to gerrymander.
**No matter what, All On The Line will continue to fight for fair maps and a stronger democracy. Because although the journey may be arduous, we have no choice but to embark on it. And there’s no team I’d rather be working alongside.[If you’re with me, please take advantage of this end-of-year match opportunity by making a generous contribution right now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99181215/519108827/-375470917?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_AGImpact_email_20241223-AOTL-RedLite-AGImpact_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241223-AOTL-RedLite-AGImpact_&utm_campaign=AGImpact&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzNWQ3ZWRiLTcwYzEtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wDgQavtGXg8MhTONw2SonIbaO6evWj03GjGwvneBogo=)**
Please don’t give up on 2025 or the four years ahead. We have it in our power to shape where the journey goes next — as long as we put in the work.
Thank you,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

name: Georgia HQ
subject: Who should lead Democrats? (poll)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
The next chair of the Democratic National Committee will be charged with paving our way forward.

**ABC News Reporting: “Democratic National Committee to begin its rebuilding project”** Peter, since the November election, Democratic voters across Georgia and the country as a whole have been asking one question above all others: **_Where do we go from here?_** The next chair of the Democratic National Committee will be charged with paving our way forward and answering that exact question, Peter. [With current chair Jaime Harrison stepping down, we’re gauging public opinion on who voters think should be the next chair of the DNC, and would appreciate if you could take just a minute of your time to share your thoughts in our survey:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99181368/519109444/878990918?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_122324_1_1_DNC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmFkNzRkMS03MWMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4tX1g8AxzHCdKTer2gMdlEy86QshRlNoa4gqWJ4fVKc=&emci=4dbc87c9-71c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=1fad74d1-71c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=43566853) | | **[TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99181369/519109445/878990918?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_122324_1_1_DNC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmFkNzRkMS03MWMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4tX1g8AxzHCdKTer2gMdlEy86QshRlNoa4gqWJ4fVKc=&emci=4dbc87c9-71c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=1fad74d1-71c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=43566853)**
---
As we prepare for yet another Trump presidency with a Republican trifecta in Congress, charting our path forward has never been more important — and right now, that decision lies in the hands of Democrats across all the country.
That’s why you’ve been selected to represent your area in an internal poll on who should be the next DNC Chair. [Will you take a minute to answer our short, one-click survey below?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99181370/519109446/878990918?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_122324_1_1_DNC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmFkNzRkMS03MWMxLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4tX1g8AxzHCdKTer2gMdlEy86QshRlNoa4gqWJ4fVKc=&emci=4dbc87c9-71c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=1fad74d1-71c1-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=43566853)

name: Mark Consuelos
subject: Join me in thanking our service members this holiday season.
body:
Please sign our card now
[](https://www.uso.org)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.)
---

[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/_K68QebW77Q0/R1BFY0hQcjZLb0IxNmdnemYycDdVVzdmVVhkWjRnR0JGZzBhaXBRdG1JMkpjYVZBOVRSeURFODZuR1ZlSmVreWc4bEt5U2RYUkptTEFSTUNod0ZCK0pSQTJVWG16VEJmR3lxZW0yWXR1blU9S0/VE5PbU8raE1iZ05DY1ozRjlLYU5Db1BhcnBXWWQ2SC9leFFpTHQwRkdiK1ZCUENadHNxUk9HRlBjNDE4a2ZMSUgwamQ5ZzRQMnNkOWJyUnlqbWVKNzVObG52amNsVG15S0)
---
★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★
| [**JOIN ME IN THANKING OUR SERVICE MEMBERS
FOR THEIR SACRIFICES THIS HOLIDAY SEASON**](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/zdb4h3eLYYJ_/R1BFY0hQcjZLb0IxNmdnemYycDdVVzdmVVhkWjRnR0JGZzBhaXBRdG1JMkpjYVZBOVRSeURFODZuR1ZlSmVreWc4bEt5U2RYUkptTEFSTUNod0ZCK0pSQTJVWG16VEJmR3lxZW0yWXR1blU9S0/VE5PbU8raE1iZ05DY1ozRjlLYU5Db1BhcnBXWWQ2SC9leFFpTHQwRkdiK1ZCUENadHNxUk9HRlBjNDE4a2ZMSUgwamQ5ZzRQMnNkOWJyUnlqbWVKNzVObG52amNsVG15S0) | [SIGN THE CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~CypNqqtR/R1BFY0hQcjZLb0IxNmdnemYycDdVVzdmVVhkWjRnR0JGZzBhaXBRdG1JMkpjYVZBOVRSeURFODZuR1ZlSmVreWc4bEt5U2RYUkptTEFSTUNod0ZCK0pSQTJVWG16VEJmR3lxZW0yWXR1blU9S0/VE5PbU8raE1iZ05DY1ozRjlLYU5Db1BhcnBXWWQ2SC9leFFpTHQwRkdiK1ZCUENadHNxUk9HRlBjNDE4a2ZMSUgwamQ5ZzRQMnNkOWJyUnlqbWVKNzVObG52amNsVG15S0)
---
Dear USO Supporter,
As we celebrate the holidays, I want to take a moment to say how grateful I am to our service members -- especially this time of year. My dad served in the Navy and my brother and father-in-law served in the Army, so I've personally seen the sacrifices these heroes make for our country.
**Many service members are far from their families this Christmas, and I believe it 's our duty to show them they're always in our hearts and minds. **
That's why I'm excited to partner with the USO and why I'm reaching out :
**[Will you join me in signing this holiday card for our service members? We're hoping to collect 100,000 signatures by midnight tonight to really show our service members they are not forgotten -- and it would mean a lot to me if you added yours:](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/pKbLQdjkXXt_/R1BFY0hQcjZLb0IxNmdnemYycDdVVzdmVVhkWjRnR0JGZzBhaXBRdG1JMkpjYVZBOVRSeURFODZuR1ZlSmVreWc4bEt5U2RYUkptTEFSTUNod0ZCK0pSQTJVWG16VEJmR3lxZW0yWXR1blU9S0/VE5PbU8raE1iZ05DY1ozRjlLYU5Db1BhcnBXWWQ2SC9leFFpTHQwRkdiK1ZCUENadHNxUk9HRlBjNDE4a2ZMSUgwamQ5ZzRQMnNkOWJyUnlqbWVKNzVObG52amNsVG15S0)**
[SIGN THE HOLIDAY CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~CypNqqtR/R1BFY0hQcjZLb0IxNmdnemYycDdVVzdmVVhkWjRnR0JGZzBhaXBRdG1JMkpjYVZBOVRSeURFODZuR1ZlSmVreWc4bEt5U2RYUkptTEFSTUNod0ZCK0pSQTJVWG16VEJmR3lxZW0yWXR1blU9S0/VE5PbU8raE1iZ05DY1ozRjlLYU5Db1BhcnBXWWQ2SC9leFFpTHQwRkdiK1ZCUENadHNxUk9HRlBjNDE4a2ZMSUgwamQ5ZzRQMnNkOWJyUnlqbWVKNzVObG52amNsVG15S0)
---
Right now, my family and I are enjoying our holiday traditions together -- eating Christmas cookies, decorating our tree and quoting our favorite holiday movies. However, I can't help but think of our service members who are facing this holiday season thousands of miles from home, far from their loved ones.
**That 's why I want to invite you to join me in signing the official USO holiday card for all our heroes in uniform. It's a simple and powerful way to express our gratitude. **Imagine what it could mean to them to receive a message of support from home, knowing that folks are thinking of them during this special time of year.
**[Will you take a moment to sign the card now and help us reach our goal of 100,000 signatures by midnight tonight? Let's come together to ensure our service members feel our appreciation and love this holiday season. ](https://links.e.uso.)**
[SIGN THE HOLIDAY CARD](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~CypNqqtR/R1BFY0hQcjZLb0IxNmdnemYycDdVVzdmVVhkWjRnR0JGZzBhaXBRdG1JMkpjYVZBOVRSeURFODZuR1ZlSmVreWc4bEt5U2RYUkptTEFSTUNod0ZCK0pSQTJVWG16VEJmR3lxZW0yWXR1blU9S0/VE5PbU8raE1iZ05DY1ozRjlLYU5Db1BhcnBXWWQ2SC9leFFpTHQwRkdiK1ZCUENadHNxUk9HRlBjNDE4a2ZMSUgwamQ5ZzRQMnNkOWJyUnlqbWVKNzVObG52amNsVG15S0)
---
Thank you for standing with me and supporting our heroes.
Happy holidays,
Mark Consuelos

The work we did this year has put us in a better position to tackle the challenges of the incoming administration. We could not have done it without you.

May the holiday season bring you a renewed sense of optimism for the year ahead.

Grateful to have you by my side,

Linda

disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Republicans are BARELY hanging onto the House Majority.
We know you’re probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!
| |
---
| | | **URGENT UPDATE ABOUT SPECIAL ELECTION TO FILL MATT GAETZ 'S SEAT:**
__First:__ Florida Governor Ron DeSantis announced a Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz.

__Then:__ Democrats were over the moon at the prospect of flipping a key Republican seat.

__Now:__ Early voting is about to begin in FL-01 and we urgently need your support to win key races like this!
| | [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=cc7e8deb3d6848ecaaea49e3b78ef32d&_e=YwCxoarKI6VDv7v6-amSyhhytaqKw9QuvV8zwMpwWI30BasR9aOofR5fbc29N8eiFrciTC2buokkkWH63LLvTPR-HDMYSW-gLMIgYULUUf0sF4lOF5yvS-WZsDotXlqsUXWSUCHFBDVpAr-d3MBkp6eDIBQiGfIZo4RwNwRq6k2v89uz_2GIK1-k7-ZZCb1dixBZDYBgwUo11oB2stOCwU7fMPpX8DQ5QSKBjAYjiddH5XX53_mFnC84MsA0FznQuzI0R3ewdkWwGrtOB8lOTvjaPjii6MglXDATSbYq7zYLS7vTQxiKEP8lU0HHVhWFFPqdlRbRJ3QInFZ4iWkUCtqXFsuzAXA8AVul6bDVIIJdfjiRmSgPsTttILfveqrJ70JCFNQmVEelqYhv9POmcg%3D%3D "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW")
---

Do not forget this:

Republicans are BARELY hanging onto the House Majority. **If Democrats flip even one or two of these Special Elections, our Republican Trifecta could come CRASHING DOWN.**

The consequences of Democrats winning back the House would be unthinkable. They'd have the power to bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt - despite his historic mandate!

**_[That's why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks - before early voting begins - to help fill Matt Gaetz's seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump's agenda.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=cc7e8deb3d6848ecaaea49e3b78ef32d&_e=YwCxoarKI6VDv7v6-amSyhhytaqKw9QuvV8zwMpwWI30BasR9aOofR5fbc29N8eiFrciTC2buokkkWH63LLvTPR-HDMYSW-gLMIgYULUUf0sF4lOF5yvS-WZsDotXlqsUXWSUCHFBDVpAr-d3MBkp6eDIBQiGfIZo4RwNwRq6k2v89uz_2GIK1-k7-ZZCb1dixBZDYBgwUo11oB2stOCwU7fMPpX8DQ5QSKBjAYjiddH5XX53_mFnC84MsA0FznQ5ZbQhWLlNSKQs6P3lQrfHhpFaKVJko9GiF8PRcH1U5wyizWYEkNFrbtdOV4kpw7gzWkSyJWFqUMGLzoi94qAijSrh8rfoTXdmfOYnlo-IcmKzcIN22BZcZNaa-McHB6QLr3o0HajmiBuRBXcjkiv9w%3D%3D "That’s why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks – before early voting begins – to help fill Matt Gaetz’s seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump’s agenda.")_**

We know you're probably sick and tired of these emails but our House Majority hangs in the balance and EVERYTHING is at stake!

_Can you please help us? _
| [SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=cc7e8deb3d6848ecaaea49e3b78ef32d&_e=YwCxoarKI6VDv7v6-amSyhhytaqKw9QuvV8zwMpwWI30BasR9aOofR5fbc29N8eiFrciTC2buokkkWH63LLvTPR-HDMYSW-gLMIgYULUUf0sF4lOF5yvS-WZsDotXlqsUXWSUCHFBDVpAr-d3MBkp6eDIBQiGfIZo4RwNwRq6k2v89uz_2GIK1-k7-ZZCb1dixBZDYBgwUo11oB2stOCwU7fMPpX8DQ5QSKBjAYjiddH5XX53_mFnC84MsA0FznQrzDtKZvadMGFNjozQNpZKPfuUL-iw_xseNtxmg6VkqygHAKUuAYPhgOQOsdW25pV1jSmz9Gcds_IR5mTi9hfCQS9pBbdGHMEyX_Ogfpzt61QmG1T6y643B6XLrnFnL5mew9LhZ4jI3j2vMYpcGUJYQ%3D%3D "SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: CONTRIBUTE NOW")

Thank you for all you do,

**HOUSE REPUBLICANS**
Sent via Team Scalise

| |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
Today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. | | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
