name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/23/2024
body:
It’s lower basin states versus the upper basin in fight over Colorado River water
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Merry Christmas Eve Eve!
As we gather with loved ones to celebrate the joy of the season, we want to let you know that there won’t be a newsletter for the next couple of days—unless there’s breaking news, of course. From all of us at Rocky Mountain Voice, we wish you a very Merry Christmas and Happy Holidays, filled with peace, love, and cherished memories. Thank you for being part of our community!
Here's a summary of today's newsletter:
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** Tensions continue to rise over the Colorado River as Upper Basin states, including Colorado, push back against [water usage proposals](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) that they argue unfairly favor Lower Basin states. Meanwhile, the [2025 Colorado Senate committee assignments](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) have stirred controversy, with significant changes following disciplinary actions and unexpected vacancies. Lastly, adding to the environmental conversation, Colorado’s Air Quality Control Commission [approved stringent emissions cuts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for the oil-and-gas midstream sector, igniting debates over the feasibility of such aggressive policies and their economic impact.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Senator Rand Paul’s annual "Festivus Report" highlighted [over $1 trillion in government waste](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), spotlighting eyebrow-raising expenditures like studies on lonely rats and foreign border security.
**🗣️ RMV Commentary Spotlight...** RMV's very own Social Media Manager and past TPUSA Regional Manager gives her unique perspective of this weekend's AmericaFest and the [future of the conservative movement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). C.J. Garbo delves into allegations of [mismanagement within the Biden administration](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), questioning who truly wielded power during a presidency marked by contentious decisions and apparent lapses in leadership.
This is the Mountain Minute for Monday, December 23, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[It’s lower basin states versus the upper basin in fight over Colorado River water](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY LINDY BROWNING, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
As he prepares to begin his first term in the U.S. House of Representatives, on priority for U.S. Rep.-elect Jeff Hurd will undoubtedly be protection of water in Western Colorado, via the Colorado River.
During a Dec. 5 conference in Las Vegas, Nev., representatives of the seven states that utilize water from the Colorado River Basin were so at odds over what states and how much water use needs to be cut that they couldn’t even be on stage at the same time.
Colorado, Utah, Wyoming and New Mexico make up the Upper Basin. California, Arizona and Nevada represent the Lower Basin. The current rules for sharing water expire in 2026, and each group has submitted a separate proposal for new guidelines thereafter. To say there is disagreement in the group is a glaring understatement.
The lower basin states, California, Nevada and Arizona, doubled down on their river management proposal, which outlines a system in which water cuts would be shared by all river basin states in severely dry water years. The Lower Basin states would take the first cuts in less-dry years.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[In 75th session, 6 of 10 Colorado Senate committees have one-seat Democratic majority](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado Senate committee assignments for the 2025 session include a narrow Democratic majority on six of the ten committees, highlighting the ongoing political balance in the legislature.
* Notable changes include the removal of Senator Sonya Jaquez Lewis from all committee roles due to allegations of mistreating aides, and the reinstatement of Senator Faith Winter as Chair of the Transportation & Energy Committee despite past controversies.
* Resignations from Senators Janet Buckner and Chris Hansen leave room for replacements, ensuring the session starting January 8 will involve significant realignments in leadership.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Commission approves ‘extremely aggressive’ emissions cuts for midstream oil& gas sector](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE SUM & SUBSTANCE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Colorado Air Quality Control Commission approved a rule mandating a 20.5% reduction in emissions for the midstream oil-and-gas sector by 2030, targeting equipment like engines and turbines.
* Industry leaders criticized the rules as technically and financially challenging, while environmental groups argued the measures don’t go far enough to protect disproportionately impacted communities (DICs).
* The new rules allow for carbon credit trading and operational flexibility, but operators are required to achieve significant onsite reductions before accessing these options.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[U.S. Sen. Rand Paul’s ‘festivus’ report highlights more than $1 trillion in federal waste](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [BREITBART](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Senator Rand Paul’s annual Festivus Report exposed over $1 trillion in federal spending waste, including $15.5 billion on unwanted electric vehicle initiatives and $10 billion on unused federal office spaces.
* Examples of waste include $419,470 on studying the cocaine preferences of lonely rats, $12 million on a Las Vegas pickleball complex, and over $7 million on “magical projects” such as a podcast about magic in U.S. history.
* Paul criticized bipartisan support for excessive spending, arguing that such waste contributes to high inflation, crippling interest rates, and a national debt crisis, urging greater accountability and efficiency in federal budgets.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Williams: Turning Point USA’s awakening of conservatism’s lion](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY LACI WILLIAMS, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_I worked for Turning Point USA for nearly five-and-a-half years. This year, I made my return at their annual conference, Americafest, in Phoenix, Arizona._
_It was a triumphant homecoming, as the energy in the room reflected the incredible momentum Turning Point has built. Their hard work has awakened a quiet lion within the conservative movement, a machine that is proving to be unstoppable. Despite being outspent this election cycle, Republicans were not outworked, thanks in large part to Turning Point USA, Charlie Kirk and his team of tireless culture warriors. As Kirk himself put it, “The good guys win if we push hard enough.”_
_Sitting in the press pool at AmericaFest, I couldn’t help but notice the stark contrast in perspectives. Over my shoulder, East Coast elites typed away, likely crafting hit pieces or, in one instance, referencing Ben Shapiro’s Wikipedia page — a surreal moment, to say the least. Yet the energy in the room was undeniable: louder, bigger and more electrified than ever before._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Garbo: Exposed! How Biden’s White House betrayed America. Who was REALLY in charge?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C.J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_The recent Wall Street Journal report, “How Biden’s White House Functioned With a Diminished President,” is more than an exposé – it is a damning indictment of corruption, deceit and betrayal that strikes at the very foundation of our democracy._ __
_From the moment Joe Biden took office, it has become increasingly clear that he lacked the executive function necessary to lead this nation. The Democratic Party knew it. The media knew it. Yet, instead of confronting the truth, they colluded to hide it. This is not just negligence — it is fraud._ __
_The mainstream media, tasked with holding power accountable, transformed into a public relations arm of the Democratic Party. For years, they gaslit the American public, dismissing concerns about Biden’s mental acuity as baseless right-wing conspiracy theories. They silenced whistleblowers, refused to ask hard questions and outright mocked those who dared to express doubts about his fitness for office._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Tina Peters is now a Larimer Co. inmate. Here’s detail on why Mesa Co. chose to transfer Peters](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | STATE | DECEMBER 20** _Fears expressed by Tina Peters to Mesa County Sheriff’s Office deputies during her stay in the county’s jail led to the decision this week to relocate the former Mesa County clerk, the Rocky Mountain Voice has learned._ __
**[Devotional: Reprogram your thinking to transform your life](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER****| COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 20** _Most Christians are familiar with the Great Commandment: “Love the Lord your God with all your heart, with all your soul, and with all your mind” (Matthew 22:37)._ _We often talk about the heart — linking it to trusting God’s love — and the soul, which relates to our physical energy and strength. But what about the mind?_ __
[**Court of Appeals vacates contempt conviction against Tina Peters in iPad recording case**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY LINDY BROWNING****| LOCAL |****DECEMBER 20** _In a court order filed Thursday, Dec. 19, 2024, the Court of Appeals ruled that the case against Tina Peters concerning a contempt of court conviction over an iPad recording in Mesa County be vacated._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|

---

name: Team VPP, me (1)
subject: Re: King Trump?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Was this a mistake?
| Friend, we sent you this time-sensitive poll to gauge public support for the **No Kings Act** , and we’re still waiting for your response.

We’re confused... **Do you support Trump effectively becoming a King, or _was this a mistake?_**

We need 12,242 more responses for conclusive data — please, correct the record immediately: **[Do you support the “No Kings Act” bill to limit Donald Trump’s power as President? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241223_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=18291%2E878179%2EpdyTuK)** | [YES, TRUMP CANNOT BE A KING! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241223_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=18291%2E878179%2EpdyTuK)
---
[NO, TRUMP SHOULD HAVE FULL IMMUNITY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241223_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=18291%2E878179%2EpdyTuK)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241223_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=18291%2E878179%2EpdyTuK)
Thank you SO much for your long awaited response,

_— The Voter Protection Project_

**_(Forwarded Message Below)_**
FROM: Your Response Requested (via VPP)
TO: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
SUBJECT: 🚫 No King Trump!
**❗ BREAKING NEWS ❗**
**"No Kings Act": Chuck Schumer says he will introduce a bill to try and reverse the Supreme Court’s immunity decision.**
---
**[Friend, do you support the “No Kings Act” bill to limit Donald Trump’s power as President? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241223_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=18291%2E878179%2EpdyTuK)**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241223_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=18291%2E878179%2EpdyTuK)

*** 10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT ***
* * *
Look, every day more and more Democrats call on Congress to pass the **No Kings Act** and __REVERSE__ the Supreme Court’s immunity decision...

But unless we - the PEOPLE - mount MAJOR pressure on Congress to take action, we’ll _lose our chance_ to put a check on Trump’s power.

**_That’s why we NEED to know where you stand:_**

**[Do you support the “No Kings Act” bill to limit Donald Trump’s power as President? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241223_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=15&akid=18291%2E878179%2EpdyTuK)**
[YES, TRUMP CANNOT BE A KING! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20241223_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=16&akid=18291%2E878179%2EpdyTuK)

Thank you for your response,

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. name: Brian H. Williams
subject: A year of advocacy in review
body:
This year, our community united around shared goals of justice, opportunity, and safety for all. | | | [View in Browser](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6769e109883e5b0c52d2f9bd&u=https%3A%2F%2Fbrianwilliamsmd.com%2Fcampaigns%2Fview-email%2FVJGaM2Jcby7NBESC3NxoO7fMnHIqmNxlADZ3KkSIUfY_4B35YtcG5pxdWJWGYp29VY-7GFG0-N-zG3z0rFNzi8rEPRSqNayDKg3YmPuIC_5ylrZ71IX2k7x3yrCqW3t2nfsyj2rzJzMrybPpxB3MU7n8dtV8KAJW0TbEUQ%3D%3D%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67697963f610004b43722775%26ss_email_id%3D6769e109883e5b0c52d2f9bd%26ss_campaign_name%3DA%2Byear%2Bof%2Badvocacy%2Bin%2Breview%2B%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-12-23T22%253A15%253A43Z&w=5ec4204c9456be6adcb47e64&c=b_67697963f610004b43722775&l=en-US&s=KPfsGaLppM4z_rHAD4e-kJ3jxbU%3D)
---
| **Dr. Brian Williams** | December 23, 2024
---|---
|
## Reflections on 2024 and Looking Ahead
---
Dear Peter,As 2024 draws to a close, I'm filled with gratitude for the incredible experiences and opportunities this year has brought. It's been a year of learning and growth, both personally and in my work advocating for change.Earlier this year, I ran for Congress in the Democratic primary. While the outcome wasn't what we'd hoped for, the journey itself was transformative. I was deeply inspired by the way our community united around shared goals of justice, opportunity, and safety for all.This year also marked the first anniversary of my memoir, _The Bodies Keep Coming_ , which was recognized as a finalist for the prestigious Carr P. Collins Award. Sharing my story has allowed me to amplify the voices of patients, colleagues, and the communities I've served, shedding light on critical issues like gun violence and racism in medicine.As I look ahead to 2025, I'm excited to embrace new opportunities to make a difference and build on the lessons and connections from this year. I'm energized and ready to continue the fight for a better future. Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful and restful holiday season – and hope for the year ahead.Onward,
Brian
---

name: Team Mazie
subject: Mazie would like to hear from you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter — thanks to this grassroots team’s support, Mazie is headed back to the Senate to continue serving the great state of Hawaii and fighting for our working families, our planet, and our future. Now, we must stay the course — to guarantee reproductive freedom, protect Social Security and Medicare, speak out against MAGA extremism, and expand voting rights. As Mazie prepares for her next term, it’s important that she knows what issues matter most to you, your family, and your community so that she best represents us in the Senate. [**Mazie would like to hear from you directly, Peter. name: API PA
subject: Thank You and Rest Up for 2025
body:
https://www.apipennsylvania.org [https://www.apipennsylvania.org]
Hi Peter,
As we reflect on 2024, we want to thank you for being a part of our community! Together we:
* Helped our community members make their voices heard in the 2024 election
* Built a mass movement to save Philadelphia’s Chinatown

* Advanced mental health reform through our Justice for Christian Hall campaign

We could not do this work without you. We hope you take this last week of 2024 to reflect and rest so that all of us can start 2025 refreshed and ready to fight for everything our communities need to be safe, healthy, and strong!
Donate to support our work in 2025 [https://www.apipennsylvania.org/donate?am=20.00&contactdata=HNYyPMfCL78Y6Glk38JtAAqsaNNu/56szXHzhL9GbT6B2jwDg5fffyh2zAQoGDpPiuoYZ+25YAy1mr24K8awUJ2C9sQDIc6l2kRs/4EtMYdH2xcM0or8P+cYwGL4+jodjoUBnYC+iobQUU9v84l1BSQcHxF1u5uH9FyYmap4kLc=]
Thanks and see you next year!

name: ELECTION ALERT
subject: Florida Special Elections:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If Democrats get their way, they'll sabotage our vision for America

|
---
| | |
**ATTN: Peter **

The Left is panicking as we near the start of our Republican Trifecta. In a desperate attempt to undermine our progress, they're targeting the Special Elections in Florida for the seats currently held by Republicans.

Democrats are lining up their most radical candidates to seize control of these critical House seats and stall the America First agenda in Congress. **If we fail to act, the floodgates of dark money will open, and the Left will pour in thousands of dollars to sabotage our vision for America.**

---

# **[Kari Lake](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=630282c55bd14474ab3bf36213e7bbc1&_e=m3YL2SDGcegEnBwT-OMYR1nSkTD_dt15Ywztd40ti099T7VoQ_kCRLtMSOAFHGbO79TJENyyG2TqEaqOCSs_F8janerVdkReXSaGTKxSZ1kFtKQoCPb7e1ksL8uErDM2N6q-DZ5LPVz7iObmQW5pOaLDg1RWsPmPCGPEI8N2lkNqD3COc622qsTBF7zgxkJzrRqFvEYj7VXuMrhLSC4lzbOkOFAQcDOoP-_tX8YW75cx2eOGMs2TxnXD22z6Yh1VyiyAgS2lZYnONxUkJjnkL7nDFx4Wsmg8pHdnUQo3MamdMIu6D8ZEIi24fcHM5HSN-klR7b-797KKVDfQhOHkqKZnstMrqo_k21H1R5c_yUluVSa0VkVx0nW15KWy2WfmhZNlfzW2-J5mzFqFGV07cePW2_ZZ-yRCL4ONY54wkDY%3D)**

Dear Peter,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Peter, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=630282c55bd14474ab3bf36213e7bbc1&_e=m3YL2SDGcegEnBwT-OMYR1nSkTD_dt15Ywztd40ti099T7VoQ_kCRLtMSOAFHGbO79TJENyyG2TqEaqOCSs_F8janerVdkReXSaGTKxSZ1kFtKQoCPb7e1ksL8uErDM2N6q-DZ5LPVz7iObmQW5pOaLDg1RWsPmPCGPEI8N2lkNqD3COc622qsTBF7zgxkJzrRqFvEYj7VXuMrhLSC4lzbOkOFAQcDOoP-_tX8YW75cx2eOGMs2TxnXD22z6Yh1VyiyAgS2lZYnONxUkJjnkLyQTHan0_rCRVa-iVdmgxSt6s7dJquMlFd6gCrMOT2i7rDrVmK0gIJg6MiL3ErghMnCNbIVd-YulVq6o0IgtQ6f3YaOm0FTyJLw5xkiYHK4H86YOAKAnG3w6TkCEHXg3k0nSu-9Kc5lsyn-0D-JwNiY%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Peter, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Peter, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=630282c55bd14474ab3bf36213e7bbc1&_e=m3YL2SDGcegEnBwT-OMYR1nSkTD_dt15Ywztd40ti099T7VoQ_kCRLtMSOAFHGbO79TJENyyG2TqEaqOCSs_F8janerVdkReXSaGTKxSZ1kFtKQoCPb7e1ksL8uErDM2N6q-DZ5LPVz7iObmQW5pOaLDg1RWsPmPCGPEI8N2lkNqD3COc622qsTBF7zgxkJzrRqFvEYj7VXuMrhLSC4lzbOkOFAQcDOoP-_tX8YW75cx2eOGMs2TxnXD22z6Yh1VyiyAgS2lZYnONxUkJjnkL18UKbAmVSLa8ABxwz1W8lAumCvZOv2oUnw2y0v-t7lQfQ40JUvNrcxjAUDSgleqb8i0IxHhLTwwyBkeX9xQQ-sYbMh2caSoSslV6yWRR5zvodyV4tfzV9_Re--AidQN9BaHQMYgK3j0wELo2ioDLZ4%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Peter, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=630282c55bd14474ab3bf36213e7bbc1&_e=m3YL2SDGcegEnBwT-OMYR1nSkTD_dt15Ywztd40ti099T7VoQ_kCRLtMSOAFHGbO79TJENyyG2TqEaqOCSs_F8janerVdkReXSaGTKxSZ1kFtKQoCPb7e1ksL8uErDM2N6q-DZ5LPVz7iObmQW5pOaLDg1RWsPmPCGPEI8N2lkNqD3COc622qsTBF7zgxkJzrRqFvEYj7VXuMrhLSC4lzbOkOFAQcDOoP-_tX8YW75cx2eOGMs2TxnXD22z6Yh1VyiyAgS2lZYnONxUkJjnkL6v_HHLL8sHRBue4zIW5H5pzS6cKH6F-qXmBC5yiZLwLElxZ8UU4f6Pbi-Gy8sOeOmV0A_yDeCgXiQJe8C5g8ASCq_hX3trsNm7UXPR4C4AmmHdyQ9sX2ZTMxgfMGfqA4AQkqSUSg9Go7nGMmPEeYXw%3D)

clean_body: Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.| | | | | | | MERRY CHRISTMAS From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo | | From the Desk of | Dear Peter,I wanted to send you this Christmas Card to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to “Make life hell” for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Peter, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Peter, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones. Peter, I’m not giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you. You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country. Not the Left’s lawfare.Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth. generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Peter, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family. Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. Christmas is coming up fast, so I hope my message doesn’t get lost in the shuffle. I need your help. The left’s lawfare has put hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees on my lap. A generous group has stepped up and offered to help me pay off these outstanding bills, but they can’t do it without your generous support. Will you please help me end this lawfare by rushing your h Thank you for your support during this difficult time, and Merry Christmas to you and your family. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602****

name: Mark Guethle
subject: Happy holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025trivianight?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_211124_FR_Trivia [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025trivianight?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_211124_FR_Trivia]

Happy Holidays, team!

With Hanukkah starting tomorrow night, Christmas the day after, and Kwanzaa beginning the day after that, there’s much to celebrate this week!

It’s been a long year – trust me, we’re all feeling it. But now is our opportunity to spend time with those who mean the most to us, enjoy our holiday traditions, and reflect on the past year.

I hope you can take this holiday season to celebrate the love, hope, and joy from this previous year – and that you can do so in the company and community of your loved ones.

And I hope that you can get the rest you need to join us back in this fight in January.

Thank you for everything you’ve done, and have a joyous holiday season and a happy new year!

– Mark Guethle
President, IDCCA

Sen. John Kennedy went **[SCORCHED EARTH](https://substack.com/redirect/53b5239a-8373-4f45-833e-2ee3ed6045a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on an ultra-woke Democrat climate expert during a heated senate hearing.
"You are a political extremist, aren't you?" Kennedy bluntly asked woke professor, Dr. Benjamin Keys. **[Watch what happens next:](https://substack.com/redirect/53b5239a-8373-4f45-833e-2ee3ed6045a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/53b5239a-8373-4f45-833e-2ee3ed6045a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/53b5239a-8373-4f45-833e-2ee3ed6045a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Kennedy accused Keys, a real estate professor the Democrats chose to testify about the effects of climate change on real estate mortgages, of left-wing extremism, dragging out several of his previous quotes to expose him as a radical in front of the Senate.
"On July 9, 2024 did you tweet the following: 'Honestly the biggest problem the Demo rats have is they don't know how to talk to low-information morons'" Kennedy pressed. "You can't make this cat walk backwards professor!"
Key's clarifies that he merely "liked" an X post that read as quoted.
"Do you usually 'like' tweets that you disagree with?" Kennedy fired back.
**[Watch the Louisiana senator](https://substack.com/redirect/53b5239a-8373-4f45-833e-2ee3ed6045a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** tear this guy limb from limb in front of the entire country.
* * *
# _Kennedy at his Best:_ Sen. Kennedy TAKES OVER Trump rally, what happens next is unbelievable...
Sen. John Kennedy stole the show at an iconic 2019 Trump rally that should NEVER be lost to history. **[Watch what he does when Trump hands him the mic:](https://substack.com/redirect/a9486198-60da-4248-b9e5-799d7b4abb53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"It must SUCK to be that dumb!!!" Kennedy roasted Speaker Nancy Pelosi as the crowd lost their mind.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a9486198-60da-4248-b9e5-799d7b4abb53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/a9486198-60da-4248-b9e5-799d7b4abb53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Fight Musk via Our Revolution
subject: Musk controlled how the votes went in Congress last week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1011?refcode=email-20241223_v&akid=7431%2E5885482%2EhbSrsA ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis — Elon Musk
blew up a funding bill in Congress last week and threatened lawmakers if
they didn’t support cuts to critical government programs. He did it
because he could.

Musk has an incredible amount of power now, and he’s threatening to fund
primary challenges to ANY lawmaker that goes against his wishes, his
whims, his tweets. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20733?t=1061&akid=7431%2E5885482%2EhbSrsA ]We’re fighting back with Bernie, but we need your
grassroots support if we have a chance to stop the worst of the Musk-Trump
presidency.

Bernie said that funding for health care and a provision for lowering drug
prices were “stripped from this bill by an unelected billionaire named
Elon Musk.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20733?t=1062&akid=7431%2E5885482%2EhbSrsA ][IMG]

Bernie and Our Revolution aren’t about to let Musk take power away from
the people. We need a mass movement of progressives ready to stop the
worst of the Musk-Trump presidency. We’re building up our campaigns right
now to counter Musk, and we need your grassroots support to stand a chance
against Trump and his unelected billionaire co-president.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241223nd&akid=7431%2E5885482%2EhbSrsA ]Can you donate today to Bernie & Our Revolution’s fight to take on the
Oligarchs and billionaire class? We need to take up Bernie’s rallying call
and stop Trump-Musk from their disastrous, extremist agenda.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1042?express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20241223nd&akid=7431%2E5885482%2EhbSrsA ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1043?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20241223nd&akid=7431%2E5885482%2EhbSrsA ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1045?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20241223nd&akid=7431%2E5885482%2EhbSrsA ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20241223nd&akid=7431%2E5885482%2EhbSrsA ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1047?express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20241223nd&akid=7431%2E5885482%2EhbSrsA ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20725?t=1048?&amount=9&refcode=email-20241223nd&akid=7431%2E5885482%2EhbSrsA ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Our Revolution’s executive director, Joseph Geevarghese saw the dangers of
Musk taking over the legislative process last week and threatening
Democrats with primary challenges.

"The threat of limitless super-PAC spending from the world's wealthiest
man could have proven enough to shut down the federal government days
before Christmas,” Joseph said in Common Dreams. “We are sliding into a
new era of American oligarchy, and unless we take decisive action, the
integrity of our democracy is at risk."

Trump, Musk and the billionaire class want to privatize the government and
plunder our tax dollars to pad their pockets. They want to slash taxes for
the rich and regulations that protect people from corporate greed. They
want to gut Medicare and Social Security.

Our movement and the American people are all that’s standing in Musk’s
way. We have to be ready to fight back and protect the most important
parts of our society and social safety net.

Bernie is calling on us to take on the Oligarchs, and the only way we can
do it is with the resources to mount massive campaigns to hold the line.

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Peter Willis — Elon Musk blew up a funding bill in Congress last week and threatened lawmakers if they didn’t support cuts to critical government programs. He did it because he could. Musk has an incredible amount of power now, and he’s threatening to fund primary challenges to ANY lawmaker that goes against his wishes, his whims, his tweets. [ ]We’re fighting back with Bernie, but we need your grassroots support if we have a chance to stop the worst of the Musk-Trump presidency. Bernie said that funding for health care and a provision for lowering drug prices were “stripped from this bill by an unelected billionaire named Elon Musk.” [ ][IMG] Bernie and Our Revolution aren’t about to let Musk take power away from the people. We need a mass movement of progressives ready to stop the worst of the Musk-Trump presidency. We’re building up our campaigns right now to counter Musk, and we need your grassroots support to stand a chance against Trump and his unelected billionaire co-president. [ ]Can you donate today to Bernie & Our Revolution’s fight to take on the Oligarchs and billionaire class? We need to take up Bernie’s rallying call and stop Trump-Musk from their disastrous, extremist agenda. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT Our Revolution’s executive director, Joseph Geevarghese saw the dangers of Musk taking over the legislative process last week and threatening Democrats with primary challenges. "The threat of limitless super-PAC spending from the world's wealthiest man could have proven enough to shut down the federal government days before Christmas,” Joseph said in Common Dreams. “We are sliding into a new era of American oligarchy, and unless we take decisive action, the integrity of our democracy is at risk." Trump, Musk and the billionaire class want to privatize the government and plunder our tax dollars to pad their pockets. They want to slash taxes for the rich and regulations that protect people from corporate greed. They want to gut Medicare and Social Security. Our movement and the American people are all that’s standing in Musk’s way. We have to be ready to fight back and protect the most important parts of our society and social safety net. Bernie is calling on us to take on the Oligarchs, and the only way we can do it is with the resources to mount massive campaigns to hold the line. subject: We have a shot at TWO Senate flips?!?!!?!
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]

They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

name: Team DLCC
subject: The fight isn't over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, dlcc
body:
Despite the setback our movement faced last month, our work must continue to build the country and future we want. We have upcoming special elections we're fighting to win – take a look: | | |
---
| |
---|---
**Despite the setback our movement faced last month, our work must continue to build the country and future we want.** State Democrats will be the last line of defense against a second Trump presidency, and with our end-of-year deadline just days away, we're already gearing up for nearly a dozen special elections. Take a look at just a few of our upcoming races: | ****State** ** | ****District** **
---|---
Virginia
| SD-32
Virginia
| HD-26
South Carolina
| HD-113
Delaware
| SD-1
Delaware
| SD-5
**Every special election marks a chance to defend or expand Democratic power in state legislatures, and with Republicans taking power at the federal level, we need to seize every opportunity to fight back. That's why, from now until December 31st, all gifts will be 7X-matched.**
[We’re counting on this grassroots team to step up and help continue our fight to elect state Democrats nationwide. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Did you read this in the news?
body:
Did you read in the news how several leading colleges and universities reacted to last month’s election?

|
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=833b97719f634977a4da90fae0524943&_t=EyFfsMBVBBoh5vLgNQM98SHXZr6HoJHuEtBkoNdRqIO4-l9qCpLBU7jezyZb2twA4MjdFogy8QSKxdatFgAFgKHqcuBCSnWtIcbtYn3CUHrENN2IBLIfkEAoMb3d1ygy)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=833b97719f634977a4da90fae0524943&_e=M0dBVVzVc1oNg-cR8BguGu3nD3nEaRiX-nnHt-DDTM82QJWk0FaagH5TOp2ZAK3gzorM_K6kGfOtiGEyTo4sq8pP0fVbV0AssKEWmHpVlxEzNVrBkasFFEhTo1uqVlA1PbgTB5V8Yxbszhh9nmkTlZdqw-BYCCC2SfKSmaTjF4XxqxI0fS4ySGygbd4UGPOhxflUrUa2S089zj2v4j_oN1brYIN7Owtw5mbNS_ZH-eviJ3O6JgoKX4Yg3mWQlOIEd7dzkZfcidgrtfC-x7ok1g3nQjSxXax2nYvN388_r8w4A9nWO_RgMa-t4APiw-p03bvy6RwTwW4m899OPIw2UVvZgEX5VdAY4rj1fZ4vyWyqRewvz1fBKGU6HBMK6zc9)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Did you read in the news how several leading colleges and universities reacted to last month's election?

Some of these so-called elite institutions canceled classes and gave students coloring books, hot cocoa, and counseling so they could cope with the election results.

Could there be better proof that too many of America's schools fail to prepare their students to be responsible citizens of the world's greatest and longest-lasting constitutional republic?

Yet, we should not really be surprised by this. After all, the forces of the anti-American Left have been focused on seizing control of our educational institutions since the late 1960s.

Too many young Americans are taught that our nation's founding principles were developed to promote white supremacy, that natural rights and private property are codewords for fascism, and that justice requires the destruction of capitalism.

To normal, hard-working Americans, this sounds insane. That's because it _is_ insane.

Our American way of life is under relentless attack on campuses across the country. This problem won't be fixed quickly or easily--although I believe we have the opportunity to score significant victories in the coming year.

I am hopeful for our future, and one of the main reasons I am hopeful is the sense of civic responsibility and generosity of people like **YOU**.

With your support, Hillsdale College plans to redouble its efforts in 2025 to revive and preserve liberty through education.

**[Given the urgency of engaging the Left on the battleground of education, will you consider a tax-deductible gift today to help Hillsdale College expand its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=833b97719f634977a4da90fae0524943&_e=M0dBVVzVc1oNg-cR8BguGu3nD3nEaRiX-nnHt-DDTM82QJWk0FaagH5TOp2ZAK3gzorM_K6kGfOtiGEyTo4sq8pP0fVbV0AssKEWmHpVlxEzNVrBkasFFEhTo1uqVlA1PbgTB5V8Yxbszhh9nmkTlZdqw-BYCCC2SfKSmaTjF4XxqxI0fS4ySGygbd4UGPOhxflUrUa2S089zj2v4j_oN1brYIN7Owtw5mbNS_ZH-et3qaTsQ5cnuTTsmxu9xRuWMZqAYo60PMM6IGK4HdoNYkVbi9mDh4Mjgi0Tz9LRIJC9mBiIl4sRweaQnOViPNaCx2GhWGKt-ucDwYRbgIRlkTM07T41n3ga6m_5HYwV5F3F9N_qAtlDmH3yq2CU_OoX)**

You will help us to expand the production of our free online courses, increase the readership of _Imprimis_ , and launch increasing numbers of Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Stepping up the battle to retake American education from the anti-American Left is an essential part of restoring and preserving the American way of life. It will take a mighty effort--but in the words of Hillsdale's motto, "Strength Rejoices in the Challenge."

Your generous support of our educational outreach programs will help us to reach and teach additional millions of our fellow citizens.

**As you know, Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. **

This allows Hillsdale to remain **genuinely independent** and focused on its mission, free of burdensome and corrupting federal regulations.

But it also means that all our work--including our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--**is entirely dependent on the support of citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.**

2025 will be a critical year, and the Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on our government and on our schools.

It will take significant resources to promote our online courses--such as our recent course on "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism"--while also expanding Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

Many of our most faithful supporters give gifts of **$25** or **$50** , while others give gifts of **$100** , **$500** , or even more. What's most important is that you give what you can.

Please help today by making your best tax-deductible, year-end gift using the secure, convenient link below:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=833b97719f634977a4da90fae0524943&_e=M0dBVVzVc1oNg-cR8BguGu3nD3nEaRiX-nnHt-DDTM82QJWk0FaagH5TOp2ZAK3gzorM_K6kGfOtiGEyTo4sq8pP0fVbV0AssKEWmHpVlxEzNVrBkasFFEhTo1uqVlA1PbgTB5V8Yxbszhh9nmkTlZdqw-BYCCC2SfKSmaTjF4XxqxI0fS4ySGygbd4UGPOhxflUrUa2S089zj2v4j_oN1brYIN7Owtw5mbNS_ZH-euvBAeDIUnkWVIbqrFnX7n-56ZUThtBLCjBxCeu-JcePkQS6iFJAl5vDe19WbOvqvka0Tg9g0ei-c4z8Y0aL-_Zc7c5GmQ8GnVUcB5exsSGP8pi-VZyaIzuu082btMflxgqKadN8FiTkbprbgUNVCZc)

Thank you for your partnership in our educational efforts to preserve liberty and the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=833b97719f634977a4da90fae0524943&_t=EyFfsMBVBBoh5vLgNQM98SHXZr6HoJHuEtBkoNdRqIO4-l9qCpLBU7jezyZb2twA4MjdFogy8QSKxdatFgAFgNozLilbALg58aH1Z2XpQmu-c-5vtKReaJ9sLtk0mGpCOn_K9YkAhx8fke9zItqnwD0Fdd90oaSzIx9t_iVmE08%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=833b97719f634977a4da90fae0524943&_t=EyFfsMBVBBoh5vLgNQM98SHXZr6HoJHuEtBkoNdRqIO4-l9qCpLBU7jezyZb2twA4MjdFogy8QSKxdatFgAFgKHqcuBCSnWtIcbtYn3CUHrENN2IBLIfkEAoMb3d1ygy).

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: my recent letter in JAMA Peds
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC
body:
| | | If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9v_zDMKsOhIsGaYsSQAIlT46RJ1cLFi0RbsWsZWZVQtXmgyDsn337uID04JUXAsI6orsUbi_w-ZL2hmMGJwRhHIefRVoqd30JPYnwQ9zX1klIwzRPgLdZo_6g0htNe8-8kHcFhekNhehwUSEXZqSokRhMMbrQCzL2Kj2gMTh2r0WRLuqDk6p7qYY_IU4gKdg_uGCq1EAbIg83TBoz17p_ESFlV_Z9tbLme30l7FyYCn3Iv4L1d_22Z-0GiFY5-2B9rlcY7BUWBdceD4Um0v0pfg42H06vI7M4MRfgBRv7OP4JfJfO4X9rhr0OfozmipT9NAZvDwsU_-8jcoSs5f0XGF8N5mNZg9S1Ra3gEJNH3aKve6HP7UFKnncaeyR18sPc/4cj/4zDXSNfBTvmVesB8ZWSb_Q/h0/h001.gcRD05YvusxH4NvBIALXQqhuU-xffvaF-I424laM3Jg) | |
---
As you know, I’m a pediatrician who decided three years ago to run for Congress. Then, I decided to start a Political Action Committee for kids. Why? Because believe it or not — a pro-child PAC had yet to exist....

In America, we have PACs for tacos, credit cards, chicken farmers and practically every medical specialty BESIDES pediatrics. Our lack of political engagement on behalf of kids has had dire consequences, including the infiltration of BAD politics into the practice of pediatrics.

Read my recent letter in JAMA Pediatrics below:

**My Letter:**

I must begin this letter by expressing my deep admiration for the authors of the editorial published this month in _JAMA Pediatrics_ entitled “Promoting Child Health by Protecting the Patient-Clinician Relationship from Politics.” They are some of the greats of our field.

In their editorial, the authors outline many of the ways in which politics has infiltrated our exam rooms. From access to reproductive healthcare to gun safety to bans on gender-affirming care to disinformation about masking and vaccines that has led to a rise in preventable infectious disease. I share their concern. This unprecedented political intrusion into the sanctity of science, healthcare, and the patient-clinician relationship cannot be ignored. Of course, our instinct is to defend children. I couldn't agree more. But where I disagree is in the proposed call to action.

About 3 years ago, after working as a pediatrician for over ten years, I took a hard pivot into politics and ran for Congress. I ran for my kids and the sick and injured kids I care for. I was tired of watching politicians use our kids in their political games. I saw the same concerning trends the authors outlined, and I decided to do something about it.

And even though I lost, I learned a critically important lesson that I am determined to get my pediatrician colleagues to understand.

We can’t protect children from politics with more research, policy papers, and earnest scientific explanations. That is a prescription from a half century ago. And it’s not working. We must lean in, we must move outside of our comfort zone, and we must engage in politics FOR kids.

And this isn’t just the right thing to do, voters favor candidates who support pro-child policies. The problem is, voters don’t hear about candidates’ pro-child positions because there is no political money being spent on child-centered messaging. The American Academy of Pediatrics is one of the only professional medical organizations that hasn’t built a political arm, a political action committee (PAC). In the 2020 election cycle the American Society of Anesthesiologists’ PAC spent $4.3M. The American Association of Orthopedic Surgeons’ PAC spent $2.2M. The American College of Emergency Physicians’ PAC spent $1.6M. The American Academy of Pediatrics’ PAC...doesn’t exist.

You can’t fight back against nefarious political forces without engaging in politics. And it is long past time we accepted that and got in the fight for kids.
Until the kids are alright,

Dr. Annie Andrews
* * *
| | PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC
---
---

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [#] Team,

As we gather with family and friends to celebrate the holidays, I wanted to wish you and your family a happy holiday season and a hopeful new year. This year, I am particularly grateful for my supporters, like you, who have helped me make a difference for the hardworking people of New Jersey.

I’ve been inspired by the outpouring of energy and ideas from supporters like you. Together, we’re building a movement to tackle the challenges our state and country faces: lowering taxes and costs, standing up for hardworking families, and solving problems for Jersey and America.

As we step into the New Year, I’m reminded that none of this would be possible without the strength of this incredible community. Your support, your ideas, and your belief in what we can accomplish together fuel my determination every single day.

Enjoy the holidays, and here’s to a bright 2024 filled with progress and possibility.

Yours,
Josh
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: This holiday season, I'm so grateful to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
From the bottom of my heart: Thank you.
| | |
---
Dear friend,
**Thank you for helping me win reelection to the U.S. Senate in Nevada.**
Republicans threw everything AND the kitchen sink at us this year, but your generous support powered us to victory. As I get ready to celebrate Hanukkah with my family in a few days, I’ll be reflecting on how grateful I am for you.
In a year when the presidential race didn’t go our way, I’m especially honored and humbled by the trust that Nevadans put in me to continue serving as your United States senator.
To be sure, we have challenges ahead of us. But together, I know we can keep making progress for all of us. From the bottom of my heart: Thank you again for being part of the grassroots team that made this victory possible.
**However you celebrate, I sincerely wish you and your family a wonderful holiday season. I look forward to proudly serving you in the new year.**
With _immense_ gratitude,

Jacky Rosen

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: before the holidays
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter, it's Maxwell Frost.

I know the amount of emails being sent this time of year can be overwhelming – trust me, my inbox is no picnic either.

Honestly, this is the best way for me to keep my team in the loop and my fundraising on track. Knowing I can trust people like you to chip in via email lets me stay focused on the rest of the work.

But here’s what I can say: This will be the last time I’ll reach out before the holidays.

Spending quality time with family and friends is important to me, just like I know it is for you. We all deserve a break to relax with our people. I won’t keep you from that.

But that means I’m accepting the risk that the far right will keep fundraising – and they could start off 2025 by drowning our movement in shady money.

That’s why I’m reaching out one more time, to ask if you can give us a head start before we go dark for the holidays. Before everybody logs off, can you give $27 – or whatever you have – to make sure we start 2025 ready to fight back against the far right?

Here’s the link: http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/PIcoEbhUsb6YzsuzDAJBHA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRpTHQ2P0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MTIyM19lbV9mcl9iMV9ob2xpZGF5c19lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjdXA3NwY0IKZ2U272lnuA8bJVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~

Thanks so much, and happy holidays,

Maxwell

Sent from my iPhone

Maxwell Frost for Congress
PO Box 772671
Orlando, FL 32877-2671
United States

You can unsubscribe using http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/fg3FDvQjvpalTj4mJU_c6Q~~/AAPPAAA~~.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: WHY Women’s Rights Are Under Attack
body:
This is our opportunity
| Peter, Donald Trump’s victory brings renewed hope for conservative values. A renewed chance to set things right.
But the work is far from over. As a matter of fact, **it's just begun.** The radical left is determined to undermine women’s rights, and they still hold power all over our country, especially on college campuses. Consider this -- in recent years, males competing against women has led to female athletes who have lost out on opportunities, been exploited in changing rooms, and suffered injuries from male athletes posing as women on the opposing team. This isn't just an issue of wins and losses -- it’s about **respect** , **opportunity** , and **equality**. Now, consider this -- there is an entire political movement dedicated to cramming men into locker rooms with our daughters. Just sit with that for a second.
It is crucial that you and I stand firm against the forces that threaten our hard-fought gains. Women’s sports and opportunities are at risk, and must be protected.
At the Riley Gaines Center, **_my ambassadors and I are taking action_** to educate the public, advocate for women’s rights, and build a community of supporters. I’m asking for your help to expand our initiatives and reach even more individuals who share this vision.
Before the end of the year, I need to raise $300,000 to fully fund our Ambassador program. [Please consider a generous contribution now.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=4bd7460563a44d3787ea5c52847b0083&_e=ljWZtOUn9xrszCxDaZUoj-zKS1S0B2tyRZwAX0s3SKBy5rQVbDVvE_Lte9C1BHJBlkn3YdQgndXK1OJ8weQJj8m4cmusEWPPgUGoEu40Ui17rUpZ2FDwzb8BAMS74ieHEZ39qVvBafLp4ZoizwKbbd8AsP7C7F9qSmaxKkg0Ns1yMlEQPPppNyFMx5qWr4fnWVeEK0VG3iufVQCGarSZk9KnY83Mls5XiKc8coPTmFt-eT4ZF2WP2EON04gTL2Nu8Brg093W_9s0mhNAttuGS1fDvbcIq76DKqmmgWMIaeBjfeMv75z2ksTfd5woRVf3aeZlhuZWDS6g0XHC7xQ4YuCA-zqlrTbUkAJtUpanCq08XUZeoWDOdjZNrSDEP4pt) Stand with us today to defend our rights and ensure a fair playing field for all women. clean_body: This is our opportunity | Peter, Donald Trump’s victory brings renewed hope for conservative values. A renewed chance to set things right. But the work is far from over. As a matter of fact, it's just begun. The radical left is determined to undermine women’s rights, and they still hold power all over our country, especially on college campuses. Consider this -- in recent years, males competing against women has led to female athletes who have lost out on opportunities, been exploited in changing rooms, and suffered injuries from male athletes posing as women on the opposing team. This isn't just an issue of wins and losses -- it’s about respect , opportunity , and equality. Now, consider this -- there is an entire political movement dedicated to cramming men into locker rooms with our daughters. Just sit with that for a second. It is crucial that you and I stand firm against the forces that threaten our hard-fought gains. Women’s sports and opportunities are at risk, and must be protected. At the Riley Gaines Center, my ambassadors and I are taking action to educate the public, advocate for women’s rights, and build a community of supporters. I’m asking for your help to expand our initiatives and reach even more individuals who share this vision. Before the end of the year, I need to raise $300,000 to fully fund our Ambassador program. Stand with us today to defend our rights and ensure a fair playing field for all women. Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute P.S. - Your contribution today can have a profound impact. my ambassadors and I can continue to fight back and ensure that women’s voices are heard loud and clear. | The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States, (703) 247-2000

name: ELECTION ALERT
subject: 2 Special Elections ANNOUNCED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We must act NOW to protect these seats and ensure the continued success of our America First movement
If Democrats get their way, they’ll sabotage our vision for America
|
---
| | |
**ATTN: Friend **

The Left is panicking as we near the start of our Republican Trifecta. In a desperate attempt to undermine our progress, they're targeting the Special Elections in Florida for the seats currently held by Republicans.

for our service members this Christmas** ](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/N-6VBp9Pw0tz/OEF2UGpDSHNFaEhmemhYNER3bmZubXM3S0VmdG9KbXZ1OGJHYWcreElhR283bmhhQkFXUm1Rb1lMSUhvSmYwTGVoZ3VDMmRpMXlpdlRTbHIrZWdjbmprcW5kczlUZmhqS0VNdUIzaVphV1k9S0/VkNSa0RZMGRxV0EvazEyN1BEOWtpTDRDbU9JUFZFbzJyYmZXU0ovOGtVZUx2ZUhDRGNPL0p6TUZHUnIyYjY1ZkVXUS9IL0tKNDB1OHgvUExKQmhJY3NJSDZOL3JsTEZxS0)
[SIGN THE CARD NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
USO Supporter,
Nobody wants to be thousands of miles away while their family is gathered for Christmas. That's why it's so important that we let our service members know how much we appreciate them and all that they sacrifice for us during the holidays.
**But right now, we 're falling short of our 100,000-signature goal to honor our heroes this Christmas. And it looks like we're still waiting on YOU!**
| | |
---|---|---
| [ HOLIDAY ](https://links.e.uso.) [ SUPPORT RECORD ](https://links.e.uso.) [ SUPPORTER ID: ](https://links.e.uso.) [★ 19495977 ★](https://links.e.uso.) [ GOAL: ](https://links.e.uso.) [100,000 SIGNATURES](https://links.e.uso.) [ DEADLINE: ](https://links.e.uso.) [MIDNIGHT](https://links.e.uso.) [ YOUR SIGNATURE: ](https://links.e.uso.) [PENDING](https://links.e.uso.) |
| |
[SIGN THE CARD NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
There are few times of year that are harder on service members than when they are forced to spend the holidays on active deployment instead of celebrating at home with their families -- and they deserve all of our gratitude for making that sacrifice for us.
That's why we're asking you, a dedicated member of this community, to take this small action now for our service members before it's too late and they spend the holidays feeling alone and forgotten.
Please**don 't let our service members go through this Christmas without giving them the thanks and good cheer they deserve: [Sign the USO's official holiday card to thank our heroes now!](https://links.e.uso.)**
[SIGN THE CARD NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you for taking a moment out of your own holiday to show our service members how much you appreciate them during this difficult and lonely time of year to serve.
--Team USO

clean_body: Background on House weaponization committee report of government abuses [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [image] [] RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL "When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial Watch" - SEAN HANNITY Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable institutions of American rights and freedoms. Order Tom Fitton's Must-Read Today! [] [600x300] [] Weaponization Committee exposes censorship, FBI abuses, and lawfare in nearly 2-year probe [] Source: Just the News [] The House Select Committee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government uncovered censorship, FBI whistleblower retaliation, and politicization of the nation’s top law enforcement and intelligence agencies over its nearly two-year probe into federal agencies. T [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] June 20, 2024 FBI Provided Democrats with Information on Whistleblowers Who Testified at Weaponization Hearing [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch received 54 pages of records from the DOJ that show the FBI provided a Democrat staffer with information on FBI whistleblowers who detailed the bureau’s targeting of political opponents and retaliation for their testifying at a May 18, 2023, hearing of the House weaponization subcommittee. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] December 11, 2024 Director Wray’s Resignation is a Good First Step [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: "The FBI is irredeemably corrupt. From sitting on Hunter Biden’s laptop in order to influence the 2020 election, the raid of President Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home, and the censorship of Americans, to the targeting of traditional Catholics, this FBI has been turned into the political police for partisan leftists. Accordingly, Wray should be subject to criminal investigation." [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] December 05, 2024 Judicial Watch Sues Justice for Details of Meeting Between Milley and Garland about President Trump [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch sued the DOJ for details of a reported meeting between Attorney General Merrick Garland and Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman General Mark A. Milley in which they discussed President Trump and during which Milley pressured Garland to target American “far right” militia movements. name: Team Jayapal
subject: With your support, we know we can win this fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
If we’re going to take on Donald Trump and the corporate establishment next year, we need to hit our final fundraising goal of this year.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241223-4615-footer&t=1&akid=4615%2E420207%2EcJs9wW)
Hi Peter, Team Jayapal here with a quick last minute request.
**Even though the holidays are here, our Q4 deadline is just eight days away — and we’re not quite where we need to be:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241223?refcode=em20241223-4615&amount=3&refcode2=4615_420207_cJs9wW&akid=4615%2E420207%2EcJs9wW)
**[Pitch in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241223?amount=3&refcode=em20241223-4615&refcode2=4615_420207_cJs9wW&akid=4615%2E420207%2EcJs9wW)**
If we’re going to take on Donald Trump and the corporate establishment _next_ year, we need to hit our final fundraising goal of _this_ year.
Defending our democracy and ending the influence of corporate PACs in Democratic primaries won’t be easy. But with your grassroots support we know we can win this fight.
[**Peter, before you sign off for the holidays, will you pitch in $3 or more to help us reach our end of year goal and hit the ground running in 2025?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241223?refcode=em20241223-4615&amount=3&refcode2=4615_420207_cJs9wW&akid=4615%2E420207%2EcJs9wW)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241223?amount=3&refcode=em20241223-4615&refcode2=4615_420207_cJs9wW&akid=4615%2E420207%2EcJs9wW)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241223-4615-footer&t=2&refcode2=4615_420207_cJs9wW&akid=4615%2E420207%2EcJs9wW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4615%2E420207%2EcJs9wW)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4615%2E420207%2EcJs9wW)
